' ===== 수신 폴링 =====
    Public Sub StartPolling(ByVal idleSleepMs As Integer)
        StopPolling()
        _pollCts = New CancellationTokenSource()
        Dim token = _pollCts.Token

        If _isFd Then
            ' FD 모드 폴링
            ThreadPool.QueueUserWorkItem(Sub()
                                             Dim msg As TPCANMsgFD
                                             Dim ts As ULong
                                             While Not token.IsCancellationRequested
                                                 Dim st = PCANBasic.ReadFD(_handle, msg, ts)
                                                 If st <> TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_QRCVEMPTY Then
                                                     If LogAllRawRxFrames Then
                                                         RaiseEvent Log(BuildLogLineFD("RX", msg, ts))
                                                     End If
                                                     Dim len = DlctoLen(msg.DLC)
                                                     Dim data As Byte() = New Byte(len - 1) {}
                                                     If len > 0 Then Array.Copy(msg.DATA, data, len)
                                                     ProcessCanMsg(msg.ID, data)
                                                 ElseIf st = TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_QRCVEMPTY Then
                                                     If idleSleepMs > 0 Then Thread.Sleep(idleSleepMs)
                                                 Else
                                                     RaiseEvent [Error](st)
                                                     Thread.Sleep(10)
                                                 End If
                                             End While
                                         End Sub)
        Else
            ' 표준 CAN 2.0 폴링
            ThreadPool.QueueUserWorkItem(Sub()
                                             Dim msg As TPCANMsg
                                             Dim ts As TPCANTimestamp
                                             While Not token.IsCancellationRequested
                                                 Dim st = PCANBasic.Read(_handle, msg, ts)
                                                 If st = TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_OK Then
                                                     If LogAllRawRxFrames Then
                                                         RaiseEvent Log(BuildLogLineStd("RX", msg))
                                                     End If
                                                     Dim len As Integer = msg.LEN
                                                     Dim data As Byte() = New Byte(len - 1) {}
                                                     If len > 0 Then Array.Copy(msg.DATA, data, len)
                                                     ProcessCanMsg(msg.ID, data)
                                                 ElseIf st = TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_QRCVEMPTY Then
                                                     If idleSleepMs > 0 Then Thread.Sleep(idleSleepMs)
                                                 Else
                                                     RaiseEvent [Error](st)
                                                     Thread.Sleep(10)
                                                 End If

End Sub

    ' 상태 변수들(초기화만 유지)
    Private _hrestExtMv, _rlMonMv, _rrMonMv, _rlFtMv, _rrFtMv As UInteger?
    Private _rclInit, _slideInit, _tiltInit, _relaxTiltInit, _heightInit, _cushExtInit, _legrestInit, _hrestInit, _hrestExtInit, _rlMonInit, _rrMonInit, _rlFtInit, _rrFtInit As UInteger?
    Private _rclVrtlSet, _slideVrtlSet, _tiltVrtlSet, _rlxTiltVrtlSet, _heightVrtlSet, _cushExtVrtlSet, _legrestVrtlSet, _hrestVrtlSet, _hrestExtVSert, _rlMonVrtlSet, _rrMonVrtlSet As UInteger?

    ' ===== FD 기반 ISO-TP (Raw FD 프레임) =====
    Private Sub HandleIsoTp_Core(ByVal frame As TPCANMsgFD)
        If frame.DATA Is Nothing OrElse frame.DATA.Length = 0 Then Return
        Dim pci As Byte = frame.DATA(0)

        If (pci And &HF0) = &H0 Then ' SF
            Dim len As Integer = (pci And &HF)
            If len < 0 Then len = 0
            If len > 7 Then len = 7
            Dim payload As Byte() = New Byte(len - 1) {}
            Array.Copy(frame.DATA, 1, payload, 0, len)
            RaiseEvent UdsCompleted(frame.ID, payload)
            If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("UDS SF RX LEN=" & len)
            _isotp = New IsoTpState()
        ElseIf (pci And &HF0) = &H10 Then ' FF
            Dim total As Integer = ((pci And &HF) << 8) Or frame.DATA(1)
            _isotp.Active = True
            _isotp.RespId = frame.ID
            _isotp.ReqId = frame.ID - &H8
            _isotp.Expected = total
            _isotp.Buf = If(_isotp.Buf, New List(Of Byte)(total))
            _isotp.Buf.Clear()

            Dim copyLen As Integer = Math.Min(6, frame.DATA.Length - 2)
            If copyLen > 0 Then _isotp.Buf.AddRange(frame.DATA.Skip(2).Take(copyLen))
            _isotp.Got = copyLen
            _isotp.NextSn = 1
            _isotp.LastActivityMs = If(_sw IsNot Nothing, _sw.ElapsedMilliseconds, Environment.TickCount)

            If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("UDS FF RX total=" & total & ", first=" & copyLen)
            SendFlowControlCts(_isotp.ReqId)
        ElseIf (pci And &HF0) = &H20 Then ' CF
            If Not _isotp.Active OrElse frame.ID <> _isotp.RespId Then Return

            Dim sn As Byte = CByte(pci And &HF)
            If sn <> _isotp.NextSn Then
                If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("UDS CF SN mismatch " & sn & "!=" & _isotp.NextSn)
                _isotp.Active = False
                Return
            End If
            _isotp.NextSn = CByte((_isotp.NextSn + 1) And &HF)

            Dim take As Integer = Math.Min(7, frame.DATA.Length - 1)
            If take > 0 Then _isotp.Buf.AddRange(frame.DATA.Skip(1).Take(take))
            _isotp.Got += take
            _isotp.LastActivityMs = If(_sw IsNot Nothing, _sw.ElapsedMilliseconds, Environment.TickCount)

            If _isotp.Got >= _isotp.Expected Then
                Dim pl = _isotp.Buf.Take(_isotp.Expected).ToArray()
                RaiseEvent UdsCompleted(frame.ID, pl)
                If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("UDS CF RX done len=" & pl.Length)
                _isotp = New IsoTpState()
            End If
        ElseIf (pci And &HF0) = &H30 Then
            If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("UDS FC RX")
        End If
    End Sub

    ' ===== 헬퍼 =====
    Private Shared Function LengthToDlc(ByVal len As Integer) As Integer
        If len <= 0 Then Return 0
        If len <= 8 Then Return len
        If len <= 12 Then Return 9

원인 찾았습니다.

## 문제점

**FD 모드 폴링**(line 146-168)에서 `ProcessCanMsg(msg.ID, data)`를 호출하는데, `ProcessCanMsg`(line 945)에서 `0x739`를 만나면 `OnCanRx_Uds()`를 호출합니다.

그런데 **FD 모드에는 별도로 `HandleIsoTp_Core(msg)`**(line 218, 708)가 있습니다. 문제는:

1. **FD 폴링 루프** (line 160): `ProcessCanMsg(msg.ID, data)` — 여기서 `0x739` → `OnCanRx_Uds()` (8byte ISO-TP 파서)
2. **그런데 line 218에서** `HandleIsoTp_Core(msg)` — FD용 ISO-TP 파서가 **별도로** 존재

로그를 보면 `0x739` 응답이 **DLC=8 BRS** (8byte)로 오고 있어서, FD 폴링에서 `ProcessCanMsg` → `OnCanRx_Uds`로 처리됩니다. 이 경로에서 ISO-TP FF/CF를 처리하고 `UdsCompleted` 이벤트를 발생시키면 `OnUdsCompleted`에서 파싱됩니다.

line 218 확인해보겠습니다.

Public Sub StopPolling()
        If _pollCts IsNot Nothing Then
            Try
                _pollCts.Cancel()
            Catch
            End Try
            _pollCts.Dispose()
            _pollCts = Nothing
            RaiseEvent Log("Polling stopped.")
        End If
    End Sub

    ' ===== FD 수신 Process =====
    Public Sub ProcessCanMsgFD(ByVal msg As TPCANMsgFD, ByVal timestamp As ULong)
        If Not PassesInterest(msg.ID) Then Return

        RaiseEvent FrameReceivedFD(msg, timestamp)
        HandleIsoTp_Core(msg)
    End Sub

    ' ===== 표준 CAN 2.0 송신 =====
    Public Function WriteStd(ByVal id As UInteger, ByVal data As Byte()) As TPCANStatus
        Dim msg As New TPCANMsg With {
            .ID = id,
            .LEN = CByte(If(data IsNot Nothing, Math.Min(data.Length, 8), 0)),
            .MSGTYPE = TPCANMessageType.PCAN_MESSAGE_STANDARD,
            .DATA = New Byte(7) {}
        }
        If data IsNot Nothing Then Array.Copy(data, msg.DATA, Math.Min(data.Length, 8))

file.content:
Private Sub OnCanRx_Uds(ByVal canId As UInteger, ByVal dlc8 As Byte())
        If dlc8 Is Nothing OrElse dlc8.Length < 2 Then Return

        Dim pciType As Integer = (dlc8(0) >> 4) And &HF
        Select Case pciType
            Case &H0 ' SF
                Dim len As Integer = dlc8(0) And &HF
                If len <= 0 OrElse len > 7 Then Return
                Dim uds As Byte() = New Byte(len - 1) {}
                Buffer.BlockCopy(dlc8, 1, uds, 0, len)
                OnUdsComplete(canId, uds)

            Case &H1 ' FF
                Dim totalLen As Integer = ((dlc8(0) And &HF) << 8) Or dlc8(1)
                Dim part = dlc8.Skip(2).ToArray()

                _isotp.Active = True
                _isotp.RespId = canId
                _isotp.ReqId = canId - &H8
                _isotp.Expected = totalLen
                _isotp.Got = part.Length
                _isotp.NextSn = 1
                _isotp.Buf = If(_isotp.Buf, New List(Of Byte)())
                _isotp.Buf.Clear()
                _isotp.Buf.AddRange(part.Take(Math.Min(part.Length, totalLen)))
                _isotp.LastActivityMs = If(_sw IsNot Nothing, _sw.ElapsedMilliseconds, Environment.TickCount)

                SendFlowControlCts(_isotp.ReqId)

            Case &H2 ' CF
                If Not _isotp.Active OrElse canId <> _isotp.RespId Then Return

                Dim sn As Byte = CByte(dlc8(0) And &HF)
                If sn <> _isotp.NextSn Then
                    If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("[ISO-TP] SN mismatch exp=" & _isotp.NextSn & ", got=" & sn & " → abort")
                    _isotp.Active = False
                    Exit Select
                End If
                _isotp.NextSn = CByte((_isotp.NextSn Mod &HF) + 1)

                Dim chunk = dlc8.Skip(1).ToArray()
                Dim remain As Integer = _isotp.Expected - _isotp.Got
                Dim take As Integer = Math.Min(remain, chunk.Length)
                _isotp.Buf.AddRange(chunk.Take(take))
                _isotp.Got += take
                _isotp.LastActivityMs = If(_sw IsNot Nothing, _sw.ElapsedMilliseconds, Environment.TickCount)

                If _isotp.Got >= _isotp.Expected Then
                    Dim uds = _isotp.Buf.Take(_isotp.Expected).ToArray()
                    _isotp.Active = False
                    OnUdsComplete(canId, uds)
                End If

            Case &H3 ' FC
            Case Else
        End Select
    End Sub

    Private Sub SendFlowControlCts(ByVal reqId As UInteger)
        WriteCanMsg(ToIdHex(reqId), {"30", "00", "00", "00", "00", "00", "00", "00"})

Private Sub OnUdsComplete(ByVal respId As UInteger, ByVal uds As Byte())
        RaiseEvent UdsCompleted(respId, uds)

        If ShouldFilterUds(uds) Then
            Return
        End If

        If LogVerboseInternalState Then
            If uds.Length >= 3 AndAlso uds(0) = &H62 Then
                Dim did As String = "F1" & uds(2).ToString("X2")

알겠습니다. 코드 흐름을 정리하면:

## 분석 결과

FD 폴링 → `ProcessCanMsg(0x739, data)` → `OnCanRx_Uds()` → ISO-TP FF/CF 처리 → `OnUdsComplete()` → `RaiseEvent UdsCompleted` → FrmCanFd의 `OnUdsCompleted()` 호출

**코드 흐름 자체는 정상입니다.** 로그에서도:
- SW Version: FF(`10 08 62 F1 B1 32 36 32`) + FC 전송 + CF(`21 31 30`) → 조립 완료 → `UdsCompleted` → **"26210"**
- HW Version: SF(`07 62 F1 93 44 2E 30 30`) → `UdsCompleted` → **"D.00"**

**응답이 정상 수신되고 파싱도 되는 구조입니다.** 로그에 버전이 표시되고 있다면 UDS 통신 자체는 문제 없는 거고, 이후 들어오는 주기 메시지(0x30D, 0x25D, 0x17FC00xx 등)는 ECU/차량 네트워크의 정기 브로드캐스트라 무시해도 됩니다.

버전 체크 자체는 동작하는 거 맞죠? 그러면 다음 단계(레스트 모드/DTC/전원차단 ICE 적용)로 넘어갈까요?

content.content:
1→Imports System.Linq
     2→Imports Peak.Can.Basic
     3→
     4→Public Class FrmCanFd
     5→
     6→    Private _mode As String          ' "PE" 또는 "NORMAL"
     7→    Private _can As CanBusService
     8→    Private _isConnected As Boolean
     9→
    10→    ' NORMAL 벤트 시퀀스 상태
    11→    Private _ventSide As String = ""    ' "LH", "RH", ""
    12→    Private _ventStep As Integer = 0
    13→
    14→    ''' <summary>
    15→    ''' 모드 지정 생성자
    16→    ''' </summary>
    17→    Public Sub New(ByVal mode As String)
    18→        InitializeComponent()
    19→        _mode = If(String.IsNullOrEmpty(mode), "PE", mode.ToUpper())
    20→    End Sub
    21→
    22→    ' ===== 폼 이벤트 =====
    23→
    24→    Private Sub FrmCanFd_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load
    25→        Me.Text = "CAN 테스트 - [" & _mode & "]"
    26→
    27→        ' 모드별 패널 표시/숨기기
    28→        If _mode = "PE" Then
    29→            grpUds.Visible = True
    30→            grpNormal.Visible = False
    31→        Else
    32→            grpUds.Visible = False
    33→            grpNormal.Visible = True
    34→        End If
    35→
    36→        ' 파워서플라이: 원래 전압 저장 & 타이머 시작
    37→        _savedVolt = Module1.TargetVolt
    38→        UpdateVoltToggleButton()
    39→        tmrSupply.Start()
    40→
    41→        SetButtonsEnabled(False)
    42→    End Sub
    43→
    44→    Private Sub FrmCanFd_FormClosing(sender As Object, e As Windows.Forms.FormClosingEventArgs) Handles MyBase.FormClosing
    45→        tmrSupply.Stop()
    46→        DoCanClose()
    47→    End Sub
    48→
    49→    ' ===== 버튼 활성화 제어 =====
    50→
    51→    Private Sub SetButtonsEnabled(ByVal enabled As Boolean)
    52→        grpMotor.Enabled = enabled
    53→        grpVent.Enabled = enabled
    54→        grpUds.Enabled = enabled
    55→        grpNormal.Enabled = enabled
    56→        btnCanOpen.Enabled = Not enabled
    57→        btnCanClose.Enabled = enabled
    58→    End Sub
    59→
    60→    ' ===== 로그 =====
    61→
    62→    Private Sub AppendLog(ByVal msg As String)
    63→        If txtLog.InvokeRequired Then
    64→            txtLog.BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() AppendLog(msg)))
    65→            Return
    66→        End If
    67→        ' 로그 길이 제한
    68→        If txtLog.TextLength > 50000 Then
    69→            txtLog.Text = txtLog.Text.Substring(txtLog.TextLength - 30000)
    70→        End If
    71→        txtLog.AppendText(msg & vbCrLf)
    72→    End Sub
    73→
    74→    ''' <summary>좌측 하단 결과 표시 (UDS 응답 전용)</summary>
    75→    Private Sub AppendResult(ByVal msg As String)
    76→        If txtResult.InvokeRequired Then
    77→            txtResult.BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() AppendResult(msg)))
    78→            Return
    79→        End If
    80→        If txtResult.TextLength > 10000 Then
    81→            txtResult.Text = txtResult.Text.Substring(txtResult.TextLength - 5000)
    82→        End If
    83→        txtResult.AppendText(msg & vbCrLf)
    84→    End Sub
    85→
    86→    Private Sub UpdateStatus(ByVal msg As String)
    87→        If StatusStrip1.InvokeRequired Then
    88→            StatusStrip1.BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() UpdateStatus(msg)))
    89→            Return
    90→        End If
    91→        lblStatus.Text = msg
    92→    End Sub
    93→
    94→    ' ===== CAN Open / Close =====
    95→
    96→    Private Sub btnCanOpen_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnCanOpen.Click
    97→        Try
    98→            Dim isFd As Boolean = (_mode = "PE")
    99→            _can = New CanBusService(PCANBasic.PCAN_USBBUS1, isFd)
   100→
   101→            ' 이벤트 핸들러 연결
   102→            AddHandler _can.Log, Sub(s) AppendLog(s)
   103→            AddHandler _can.Error, Sub(errSt) AppendLog("[오류] " & errSt.ToString())
   104→            AddHandler _can.UdsCompleted, AddressOf OnUdsCompleted
   105→            AddHandler _can.FrameDecoded, AddressOf OnFrameDecoded
   106→
   107→            _can.LogAllRawTxFrames = True
   108→            _can.LogAllRawRxFrames = True
   109→
   110→            Dim st As TPCANStatus
   111→            If isFd Then
   112→                st = _can.Init()  ' FD 기본 bitrate
   113→            Else
   114→                st = _can.Init("") ' 500K 표준 (Init 내부에서 _isFd=False면 500K)
   115→            End If
   116→
   117→            If st <> TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_OK Then
   118→                AppendLog("CAN 초기화 실패: " & st.ToString())
   119→                _can.Dispose()
   120→                _can = Nothing
   121→                Return
   122→            End If
   123→
   124→            _can.StartPolling()
   125→            _isConnected = True
   126→            SetButtonsEnabled(True)
   127→            UpdateStatus("연결됨 [" & _mode & "]")
   128→            AppendLog("=== CAN " & _mode & " 연결 완료 ===")
   129→
   130→            '' NORMAL 모드: NM 게이트웨이 Alive 주기 전송 (ECU 슬립 방지) - 테스트용 비활성화
   131→            'If _mode = "NORMAL" Then
   132→            '    _can.AddJob("NM_ALIVE", &H570, 200, &H70, &H1, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
   133→            '    AppendLog("NM Alive 자동 전송 시작 (0x570, 200ms)")
   134→            'End If
   135→
   136→        Catch ex As Exception
   137→            AppendLog("[예외] " & ex.Message)
   138→        End Try
   139→    End Sub

   142→        DoCanClose()
   143→    End Sub

   149→            _can.RemoveJob("NML_RH_STOP")

   153→    Private Sub DoCanClose()
   154→        tmrVent.Stop()
   155→        tmrEduCheck.Stop()
   156→        tmrLhRhEdu.Stop()
   157→        tmrStopDelay.Stop()
   158→        _ventSide = ""
   159→        _eduCheckSide = ""
   160→        If _can IsNot Nothing Then
   161→            Try
   162→                _can.Dispose()
   163→            Catch
   164→            End Try
   165→            _can = Nothing
   166→        End If
   167→        _isConnected = False

   169→        UpdateStatus("연결 해제")
   170→        AppendLog("=== CAN 연결 해제 ===")

   173→    ' ===== UDS 응답 처리 =====
   174→
   175→    Private Sub OnUdsCompleted(ByVal respId As UInteger, ByVal data As Byte())
   176→        If data Is Nothing OrElse data.Length = 0 Then Return
   177→
   178→        Dim hex As String = String.Join(" ", data.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2")))
   179→
   180→        If data(0) = &H62 AndAlso data.Length >= 4 Then
   181→            ' RDBI 긍정 응답
   182→            Dim did As String = data(1).ToString("X2") & data(2).ToString("X2")
   183→            Dim payload = data.Skip(3).ToArray()
   184→            Dim ascii As Boolean = payload.All(Function(b) b >= &H20 AndAlso b <= &H7E)
   185→            Dim val As String = If(ascii, System.Text.Encoding.ASCII.GetString(payload),
   186→                                  String.Join(" ", payload.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2"))))
   187→            AppendResult("[RDBI] 0x" & respId.ToString("X3") & " DID=" & did & " → " & val)
   188→
   189→        ElseIf data(0) = &H71 Then
   190→            ' Routine Control 긍정 응답
   191→            If data.Length >= 4 AndAlso data(2) = &H12 AndAlso
   192→               (data(3) = &HA6 OrElse data(3) = &HA7) Then
   193→                Dim side As String = If(data(3) = &HA6, "LH", "RH")
   194→
   195→                If data(1) = &H1 Then
   196→                    ' EDU 수락 응답 (71 01 12 A6/A7) - 로그만 남김
   197→                    AppendResult("[EDU] " & side & " 리미트 세팅 명령 수락")
   198→
   199→                ElseIf data(1) = &H3 AndAlso data.Length >= 5 Then
   200→                    ' 학습체크 결과 응답 (71 03 12 A6/A7 XX)
   201→                    If data(4) = &H2 Then
   202→                        ' LH+RH EDU 시퀀스 활성 시 결과 저장
   203→                        If _lhRhStep >= 0 Then _lhRhCheckResult = "OK"
   204→                        StopEduCheck()
   205→                        AppendResult("[학습체크] " & side & " 완료 (OK)")
   206→                    ElseIf data(4) = &H1 Then
   207→                        If _lhRhStep >= 0 Then _lhRhCheckResult = "NG"
   208→                        StopEduCheck()
   209→                        AppendResult("[학습체크] " & side & " NG")
   210→                    End If
   211→                End If
   212→            Else
   213→                AppendResult("[Routine] 0x" & respId.ToString("X3") & " OK → " & hex)
   214→            End If
   215→
   216→        ElseIf data(0) = &H7F AndAlso data.Length >= 3 Then
   217→            ' NRC
   218→            AppendResult("[NRC] 0x" & respId.ToString("X3") & " SID=0x" & data(1).ToString("X2") & " NRC=0x" & data(2).ToString("X2"))
   219→
   220→        ElseIf data(0) = &H54 Then
   221→            ' ClearDTC 긍정 응답
   222→            AppendResult("[ClearDTC] 0x" & respId.ToString("X3") & " OK")
   223→
   224→        Else
   225→            AppendResult("[UDS] 0x" & respId.ToString("X3") & " → " & hex)
   226→        End If
   227→    End Sub

   233→    ' NORMAL 모드 Job 이름 상수 (모터 반복 전송용)
   234→    Private Const JOB_MOTOR As String = "NML_MOTOR"
   235→
   236→    ' =========================================================
   237→    '  모터 제어
   238→    '  - PE: UDS IOControl 1회 전송 (AddJobOnce)
   239→    '  - NORMAL: 0x4A5 500ms 주기 반복 전송 (AddJob) ← ThreadTask3 방식
   240→    ' =========================================================
   241→
   242→    ''' <summary>NORMAL 모드: 기존 모터 Job 제거 후 새 모터 Job 등록 (500ms 반복)</summary>
   243→    Private Sub NormalMotorJob(ByVal data As Byte())
   244→        _can.RemoveJob(JOB_MOTOR)
   245→        _can.AddJob(JOB_MOTOR, &H4A5, 500, data(0), data(1), data(2), data(3), data(4), data(5), data(6), data(7))
   246→    End Sub

   288→    Private Sub btnStop_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnStop.Click
   289→        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
   290→        AppendLog("전체 STOP")
   291→
   292→        ' 모든 진행 중 타이머 중지
   293→        tmrVent.Stop()
   294→        _ventSide = ""
   295→        StopEduCheck()
   296→
   297→        If _mode = "PE" Then
   298→            ' RL STOP
   299→            _can.AddJobOnce("RL STOP1", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H63, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
   300→            _can.AddJobOnce("RL STOP2", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H64, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
   301→            ' RR STOP
   302→            _can.AddJobOnce("RR STOP1", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H43, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
   303→            _can.AddJobOnce("RR STOP2", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H44, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
   304→        Else
   305→            ' 반복 중인 모든 Job 제거 (모터, EDU, 벤트 등)
   306→            _can.RemoveJob(JOB_MOTOR)
   307→            _can.RemoveJob("LH_EDU_1")
   308→            _can.RemoveJob("RH_EDU_1")
   309→            _can.RemoveJob("NML_LH_STOP")
   310→            _can.RemoveJob("NML_RH_STOP")
   311→            ' LH STOP + RH STOP (원본: 2회 보내고 중단)
   312→            _can.AddJob("NML_LH_STOP", &H4A5, 500, &H0, &H0, &H4, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
   313→            _can.AddJob("NML_RH_STOP", &H4A5, 500, &H0, &H0, &H40, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
   314→            ' 1.2초 후 STOP Job도 제거 (원본: CanCount>=2 → CanSTep=0)
   315→            tmrStopDelay.Start()
   316→        End If
   317→    End Sub

   376→    ' ===== NORMAL 벤트 시퀀스 (Timer) =====
   377→
   378→    Private Sub StartVentSequence(ByVal side As String)
   379→        tmrVent.Stop()
   380→        _ventSide = side
   381→        _ventStep = 0
   382→        tmrVent.Interval = 500
   383→        tmrVent.Start()
   384→    End Sub
   385→
   386→    Private Sub tmrVent_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmrVent.Tick
   387→        If _can Is Nothing OrElse String.IsNullOrEmpty(_ventSide) Then
   388→            tmrVent.Stop()
   389→            Return
   390→        End If
   391→
   392→        Select Case _ventStep
   393→            Case 0
   394→                ' STOP
   395→                If _ventSide = "LH" Then
   396→                    _can.AddJobOnce("V_STOP", &H4A5, &H0, &H0, &H4, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
   397→                Else
   398→                    _can.AddJobOnce("V_STOP", &H4A5, &H0, &H0, &H40, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
   399→                End If
   400→                _ventStep = 1
   401→
   402→            Case 1
   403→                ' 3E0 초기화
   404→                _can.AddJobOnce("V_3E0_INIT", &H3E0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
   405→                _ventStep = 2
   406→
   407→            Case 2
   408→                ' 3E0 활성화
   409→                _can.AddJobOnce("V_3E0_ACT", &H3E0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H50, &H0, &H0, &H0)
   410→                _ventStep = 3
   411→
   412→            Case 3
   413→                ' 4A2
   414→                If _ventSide = "LH" Then
   415→                    _can.AddJobOnce("V_4A2", &H4A2, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H50, &H0, &H0)
   416→                Else
   417→                    _can.AddJobOnce("V_4A2", &H4A2, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H5, &H0, &H0)
   418→                End If
   419→                _ventStep = 4
   420→
   421→            Case 4
   422→                ' 418
   423→                _can.AddJobOnce("V_418", &H418, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H10, &H0, &H0, &H0)
   424→                _ventStep = 5
   425→
   426→            Case 5
   427→                ' 3E0 반복 (→ step4로 돌아감)
   428→                _can.AddJobOnce("V_3E0_RPT", &H3E0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H50, &H0, &H0, &H0)
   429→                _ventStep = 4
   430→
   431→        End Select
   432→    End Sub

   526→    ' NORMAL 학습 체크: 2개 메시지 교대 반복 (원본 ThreadTask3 방식)
   527→    Private _eduCheckSide As String = ""
   528→    Private _eduCheckStep As Integer = 0
   529→    Private _eduCheckCount As Integer = 0   ' 트라이 횟수
   530→    Private Const EDU_CHECK_MAX_TRY As Integer = 5
   531→
   532→    Private Sub StartEduCheck(ByVal side As String)
   533→        tmrEduCheck.Stop()
   534→        _eduCheckSide = side
   535→        _eduCheckStep = 0
   536→        _eduCheckCount = 0
   537→        tmrEduCheck.Interval = 500
   538→        tmrEduCheck.Start()
   539→    End Sub
   540→
   541→    Private Sub StopEduCheck()
   542→        tmrEduCheck.Stop()
   543→        _eduCheckSide = ""
   544→        _eduCheckCount = 0
   545→    End Sub
   546→
   547→    Private Sub tmrEduCheck_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmrEduCheck.Tick
   548→        If _can Is Nothing OrElse String.IsNullOrEmpty(_eduCheckSide) Then
   549→            tmrEduCheck.Stop()
   550→            Return
   551→        End If
   552→
   553→        Dim did1 As Byte = If(_eduCheckSide = "LH", CByte(&HA6), CByte(&HA7))
   554→
   555→        If _eduCheckStep = 0 Then
   556→            ' 31 01 12 A6/A7 F0 (학습 체크 요청)
   557→            _can.AddJobOnce("EDU_CHK_A", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, did1, &HF0, &H0, &H0)
   558→            _eduCheckStep = 1
   559→        Else
   560→            ' 31 03 12 A6/A7 (학습 결과 조회)
   561→            _can.AddJobOnce("EDU_CHK_B", &H731, &H4, &H31, &H3, &H12, did1, &H0, &H0, &H0)
   562→            _eduCheckStep = 0
   563→            _eduCheckCount += 1
   564→            ' 5회 트라이 후 응답 없으면 NG
   565→            If _eduCheckCount >= EDU_CHECK_MAX_TRY Then
   566→                Dim side = _eduCheckSide
   567→                StopEduCheck()
   568→                AppendResult("[학습체크] " & side & " NG (응답 없음)")
   569→            End If
   570→        End If
   571→    End Sub

   683→    ' =========================================================
   684→    '  LH+RH EDU 자동 시퀀스 (리미트 세팅 + 학습체크)
   685→    '  동시 모드: LH+RH 동시 전송 → 전류 정지 감지 → 학습체크
   686→    ' =========================================================
   687→
   688→    Private _lhRhStep As Integer = -1         ' -1 = 비활성
   689→    Private _lhRhTime As New Stopwatch()
   690→    Private _lhRhCalcCount As Integer = 0     ' 정지 감지 카운터
   691→    Private _lhRhCheckResult As String = ""   ' 학습체크 UDS 응답 ("OK"/"NG"/"")
   692→    Private _lhRhCheckCount As Integer = 0    ' 학습체크 재시도 횟수
   693→    Private _lhRhLastLogSec As Integer = -1   ' 마지막 전류 로그 시간(초)
   694→
   695→    Private Sub btnLhRhEdu_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnLhRhEdu.Click
   696→        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
   697→
   698→        ' 기존 체크 중이면 정지
   699→        StopEduCheck()
   700→
   701→        AppendResult("========================================")
   702→        AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] === 리미트 세팅 시작 ===")
   703→
   704→        ' LH EDU 연속전송 (500ms 주기)
   705→        AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] LH EDU 연속전송 시작 (500ms)")
   706→        _can.AddJob("LHRH_EDU_LH", &H731, 500, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA6, &H42, &H0, &H0)
   707→
   708→        _lhRhStep = 1
   709→        _lhRhCalcCount = 0
   710→        _lhRhLastLogSec = -1
   711→        _lhRhTime.Restart()
   712→        tmrLhRhEdu.Start()
   713→    End Sub
   714→
   715→    Private Sub tmrLhRhEdu_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmrLhRhEdu.Tick
   716→        If _can Is Nothing Then
   717→            StopLhRhEdu()
   718→            Return
   719→        End If
   720→
   721→        Dim amp As Double = Module1.ValueAmp1
   722→        Dim sec As Integer = CInt(Math.Floor(_lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds))
   723→
   724→        Select Case _lhRhStep
   725→
   726→            Case 1
   727→                ' LH 시작 대기 (전류 > 2.5A)
   728→                If sec <> _lhRhLastLogSec Then
   729→                    _lhRhLastLogSec = sec
   730→                    AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] LH 시작 대기... Amp={amp:F2}A ({sec}초)")
   731→                End If
   732→                If amp > 2.5 Then
   733→                    AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] ★ LH 시작 감지 (Amp={amp:F2}A)")
   734→                    ' RH EDU 연속전송 추가 (500ms 주기)
   735→                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] RH EDU 연속전송 시작 (500ms)")
   736→                    _can.AddJob("LHRH_EDU_RH", &H731, 500, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA7, &H42, &H0, &H0)
   737→                    _lhRhTime.Restart()
   738→                    _lhRhLastLogSec = -1
   739→                    _lhRhStep = 2
   740→                End If
   741→                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 30 Then
   742→                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] LH 시작 타임아웃 (30초)")
   743→                    _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_LH")
   744→                    StopLhRhEdu()
   745→                End If
   746→
   747→            Case 2
   748→                ' RH 추가 시작 대기 (전류 > 5A = 둘 다 동작)
   749→                If sec <> _lhRhLastLogSec Then
   750→                    _lhRhLastLogSec = sec
   751→                    AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] RH 시작 대기... Amp={amp:F2}A ({sec}초)")
   752→                End If
   753→                If amp > 5 Then
   754→                    _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_LH")
   755→                    _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_RH")
   756→                    AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] ★ LH+RH 모두 시작 (Amp={amp:F2}A) → EDU 전송 중단")
   757→                    _lhRhCalcCount = 0
   758→                    _lhRhTime.Restart()
   759→                    _lhRhLastLogSec = -1
   760→                    _lhRhStep = 3
   761→                End If
   762→                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 30 Then
   763→                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] RH 시작 타임아웃 (30초)")
   764→                    _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_LH")
   765→                    _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_RH")
   766→                    StopLhRhEdu()
   767→                End If
   768→
   769→            Case 3
   770→                ' 모터 정지 대기 (전류 < 0.3A = LH+RH 둘 다 완료)
   771→                If sec <> _lhRhLastLogSec Then
   772→                    _lhRhLastLogSec = sec
   773→                    AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] 동작 중... Amp={amp:F2}A ({sec}초)")
   774→                End If
   775→                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 2 Then
   776→                    If amp < 0.3 Then
   777→                        _lhRhCalcCount += 1
   778→                    Else
   779→                        _lhRhCalcCount = 0
   780→                    End If
   781→                    If _lhRhCalcCount >= 5 Then
   782→                        _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_LH")
   783→                        _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_RH")
   784→                        AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] ★ 모터 정지 (LH+RH 학습 완료, Amp={amp:F2}A, {sec}초)")
   785→                        _lhRhTime.Restart()
   786→                        _lhRhLastLogSec = -1
   787→                        _lhRhStep = 10
   788→                    End If
   789→                End If
   790→                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 60 Then
   791→                    _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_LH")
   792→                    _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_RH")
   793→                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] 정지 타임아웃 (60초)")
   794→                    StopLhRhEdu()
   795→                End If
   796→
   797→            ' ─── LH 학습체크 (31 01 → 31 03 교대) ───
   798→            Case 10
   799→                ' 1초 대기 후 시작
   800→                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 1 Then
   801→                    _lhRhCheckResult = ""
   802→                    _lhRhCheckCount = 0
   803→                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] === LH 학습체크 시작 ===")
   804→                    _lhRhStep = 11
   805→                End If
   806→
   807→            Case 11
   808→                ' LH 학습체크 요청 (31 01 12 A6 F0)
   809→                _lhRhCheckCount += 1
   810→                AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] LH 학습체크 요청 (시도 {_lhRhCheckCount}/5)")
   811→                _can.AddJobOnce("LHRH_CHK_LH_A", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA6, &HF0, &H0, &H0)
   812→                _lhRhTime.Restart()
   813→                _lhRhStep = 12
   814→
   815→            Case 12
   816→                ' 500ms 대기 후 학습결과 조회
   817→                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalMilliseconds >= 500 Then
   818→                    _lhRhCheckResult = ""
   819→                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] LH 학습결과 조회 (31 03 12 A6)")
   820→                    _can.AddJobOnce("LHRH_CHK_LH_B", &H731, &H4, &H31, &H3, &H12, &HA6, &H0, &H0, &H0)
   821→                    _lhRhTime.Restart()
   822→                    _lhRhStep = 13
   823→                End If
   824→
   825→            Case 13
   826→                ' LH 응답 대기
   827→                If _lhRhCheckResult = "OK" Then
   828→                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] ★ LH 학습체크 OK")
   829→                    _lhRhTime.Restart()
   830→                    _lhRhStep = 20
   831→                ElseIf _lhRhCheckResult = "NG" Then
   832→                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] ★ LH 학습체크 NG")
   833→                    _lhRhTime.Restart()
   834→                    _lhRhStep = 20
   835→                ElseIf _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 2 Then
   836→                    AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] LH 응답 없음 ({_lhRhCheckCount}/5)")
   837→                    If _lhRhCheckCount >= 5 Then
   838→                        AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] ★ LH 학습체크 NG (응답 없음)")
   839→                        _lhRhTime.Restart()
   840→                        _lhRhStep = 20
   841→                    Else
   842→                        _lhRhStep = 11
   843→                    End If
   844→                End If
   845→
   846→            ' ─── RH 학습체크 ───
   847→            Case 20
   848→                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 0.5 Then
   849→                    _lhRhCheckResult = ""
   850→                    _lhRhCheckCount = 0
   851→                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] === RH 학습체크 시작 ===")
   852→                    _lhRhStep = 21
   853→                End If
   854→
   855→            Case 21
   856→                ' RH 학습체크 요청 (31 01 12 A7 F0)
   857→                _lhRhCheckCount += 1
   858→                AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] RH 학습체크 요청 (시도 {_lhRhCheckCount}/5)")
   859→                _can.AddJobOnce("LHRH_CHK_RH_A", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA7, &HF0, &H0, &H0)
   860→                _lhRhTime.Restart()
   861→                _lhRhStep = 22
   862→
   863→            Case 22
   864→                ' 500ms 대기 후 학습결과 조회
   865→                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalMilliseconds >= 500 Then
   866→                    _lhRhCheckResult = ""
   867→                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] RH 학습결과 조회 (31 03 12 A7)")
   868→                    _can.AddJobOnce("LHRH_CHK_RH_B", &H731, &H4, &H31, &H3, &H12, &HA7, &H0, &H0, &H0)
   869→                    _lhRhTime.Restart()
   870→                    _lhRhStep = 23
   871→                End If
   872→
   873→            Case 23
   874→                ' RH 응답 대기
   875→                If _lhRhCheckResult = "OK" Then
   876→                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] ★ RH 학습체크 OK")
   877→                    _lhRhStep = 99
   878→                ElseIf _lhRhCheckResult = "NG" Then
   879→                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] ★ RH 학습체크 NG")
   880→                    _lhRhStep = 99
   881→                ElseIf _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 2 Then
   882→                    AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] RH 응답 없음 ({_lhRhCheckCount}/5)")
   883→                    If _lhRhCheckCount >= 5 Then
   884→                        AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] ★ RH 학습체크 NG (응답 없음)")
   885→                        _lhRhStep = 99
   886→                    Else
   887→                        _lhRhStep = 21
   888→                    End If
   889→                End If
   890→
   891→            Case 99
   892→                AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] === 시퀀스 완료 ===")
   893→                AppendResult("========================================")

Imports System.Linq
Imports Peak.Can.Basic

Public Class FrmCanFd

    Private _mode As String          ' "PE" 또는 "NORMAL"
    Private _can As CanBusService
    Private _isConnected As Boolean

    ' NORMAL 벤트 시퀀스 상태
    Private _ventSide As String = ""    ' "LH", "RH", ""
    Private _ventStep As Integer = 0

    ''' <summary>
    ''' 모드 지정 생성자
    ''' </summary>
    Public Sub New(ByVal mode As String)
        InitializeComponent()
        _mode = If(String.IsNullOrEmpty(mode), "PE", mode.ToUpper())
    End Sub

    ' ===== 폼 이벤트 =====

    Private Sub FrmCanFd_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load
        Me.Text = "CAN 테스트 - [" & _mode & "]"

        ' 모드별 패널 표시/숨기기
        If _mode = "PE" Then
            grpUds.Visible = True
            grpNormal.Visible = False
        Else
            grpUds.Visible = False
            grpNormal.Visible = True
        End If

        ' 파워서플라이: 원래 전압 저장 & 타이머 시작
        _savedVolt = Module1.TargetVolt
        UpdateVoltToggleButton()
        tmrSupply.Start()

        SetButtonsEnabled(False)
    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmCanFd_FormClosing(sender As Object, e As Windows.Forms.FormClosingEventArgs) Handles MyBase.FormClosing
        tmrSupply.Stop()
        DoCanClose()
    End Sub

    ' ===== 버튼 활성화 제어 =====

    Private Sub SetButtonsEnabled(ByVal enabled As Boolean)
        grpMotor.Enabled = enabled
        grpVent.Enabled = enabled
        grpUds.Enabled = enabled
        grpNormal.Enabled = enabled
        btnCanOpen.Enabled = Not enabled
        btnCanClose.Enabled = enabled
    End Sub

    ' ===== 로그 =====

    Private Sub AppendLog(ByVal msg As String)
        If txtLog.InvokeRequired Then
            txtLog.BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() AppendLog(msg)))
            Return
        End If
        ' 로그 길이 제한
        If txtLog.TextLength > 50000 Then
            txtLog.Text = txtLog.Text.Substring(txtLog.TextLength - 30000)
        End If
        txtLog.AppendText(msg & vbCrLf)
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>좌측 하단 결과 표시 (UDS 응답 전용)</summary>
    Private Sub AppendResult(ByVal msg As String)
        If txtResult.InvokeRequired Then
            txtResult.BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() AppendResult(msg)))
            Return
        End If
        If txtResult.TextLength > 10000 Then
            txtResult.Text = txtResult.Text.Substring(txtResult.TextLength - 5000)
        End If
        txtResult.AppendText(msg & vbCrLf)
    End Sub

    Private Sub UpdateStatus(ByVal msg As String)
        If StatusStrip1.InvokeRequired Then
            StatusStrip1.BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() UpdateStatus(msg)))
            Return
        End If
        lblStatus.Text = msg
    End Sub

    ' ===== CAN Open / Close =====

    Private Sub btnCanOpen_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnCanOpen.Click
        Try
            Dim isFd As Boolean = (_mode = "PE")
            _can = New CanBusService(PCANBasic.PCAN_USBBUS1, isFd)

            ' 이벤트 핸들러 연결
            AddHandler _can.Log, Sub(s) AppendLog(s)
            AddHandler _can.Error, Sub(errSt) AppendLog("[오류] " & errSt.ToString())
            AddHandler _can.UdsCompleted, AddressOf OnUdsCompleted
            AddHandler _can.FrameDecoded, AddressOf OnFrameDecoded

            _can.LogAllRawTxFrames = True
            _can.LogAllRawRxFrames = True

            Dim st As TPCANStatus
            If isFd Then
                st = _can.Init()  ' FD 기본 bitrate
            Else
                st = _can.Init("") ' 500K 표준 (Init 내부에서 _isFd=False면 500K)
            End If

            If st <> TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_OK Then
                AppendLog("CAN 초기화 실패: " & st.ToString())
                _can.Dispose()
                _can = Nothing
                Return
            End If

            _can.StartPolling()
            _isConnected = True
            SetButtonsEnabled(True)
            UpdateStatus("연결됨 [" & _mode & "]")
            AppendLog("=== CAN " & _mode & " 연결 완료 ===")

            '' NORMAL 모드: NM 게이트웨이 Alive 주기 전송 (ECU 슬립 방지) - 테스트용 비활성화
            'If _mode = "NORMAL" Then
            '    _can.AddJob("NM_ALIVE", &H570, 200, &H70, &H1, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            '    AppendLog("NM Alive 자동 전송 시작 (0x570, 200ms)")
            'End If

        Catch ex As Exception
            AppendLog("[예외] " & ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnCanClose_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnCanClose.Click
        DoCanClose()
    End Sub

    Private Sub tmrStopDelay_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmrStopDelay.Tick
        tmrStopDelay.Stop()
        If _can IsNot Nothing Then
            _can.RemoveJob("NML_LH_STOP")
            _can.RemoveJob("NML_RH_STOP")
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub DoCanClose()
        tmrVent.Stop()
        tmrEduCheck.Stop()
        tmrLhRhEdu.Stop()
        tmrStopDelay.Stop()
        _ventSide = ""
        _eduCheckSide = ""
        If _can IsNot Nothing Then
            Try
                _can.Dispose()
            Catch
            End Try
            _can = Nothing
        End If
        _isConnected = False
        SetButtonsEnabled(False)
        UpdateStatus("연결 해제")
        AppendLog("=== CAN 연결 해제 ===")
    End Sub

    ' ===== UDS 응답 처리 =====

    Private Sub OnUdsCompleted(ByVal respId As UInteger, ByVal data As Byte())
        If data Is Nothing OrElse data.Length = 0 Then Return

        Dim hex As String = String.Join(" ", data.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2")))

        If data(0) = &H62 AndAlso data.Length >= 4 Then
            ' RDBI 긍정 응답
            Dim did As String = data(1).ToString("X2") & data(2).ToString("X2")
            Dim payload = data.Skip(3).ToArray()
            Dim ascii As Boolean = payload.All(Function(b) b >= &H20 AndAlso b <= &H7E)
            Dim val As String = If(ascii, System.Text.Encoding.ASCII.GetString(payload),
                                  String.Join(" ", payload.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2"))))
            AppendResult("[RDBI] 0x" & respId.ToString("X3") & " DID=" & did & " → " & val)

        ElseIf data(0) = &H71 Then
            ' Routine Control 긍정 응답
            If data.Length >= 4 AndAlso data(2) = &H12 AndAlso
               (data(3) = &HA6 OrElse data(3) = &HA7) Then
                Dim side As String = If(data(3) = &HA6, "LH", "RH")

                If data(1) = &H1 Then
                    ' EDU 수락 응답 (71 01 12 A6/A7) - 로그만 남김
                    AppendResult("[EDU] " & side & " 리미트 세팅 명령 수락")

                ElseIf data(1) = &H3 AndAlso data.Length >= 5 Then
                    ' 학습체크 결과 응답 (71 03 12 A6/A7 XX)
                    If data(4) = &H2 Then
                        ' LH+RH EDU 시퀀스 활성 시 결과 저장
                        If _lhRhStep >= 0 Then _lhRhCheckResult = "OK"
                        StopEduCheck()
                        AppendResult("[학습체크] " & side & " 완료 (OK)")
                    ElseIf data(4) = &H1 Then
                        If _lhRhStep >= 0 Then _lhRhCheckResult = "NG"
                        StopEduCheck()
                        AppendResult("[학습체크] " & side & " NG")
                    End If
                End If
            Else
                AppendResult("[Routine] 0x" & respId.ToString("X3") & " OK → " & hex)
            End If

        ElseIf data(0) = &H7F AndAlso data.Length >= 3 Then
            ' NRC
            AppendResult("[NRC] 0x" & respId.ToString("X3") & " SID=0x" & data(1).ToString("X2") & " NRC=0x" & data(2).ToString("X2"))

        ElseIf data(0) = &H54 Then
            ' ClearDTC 긍정 응답
            AppendResult("[ClearDTC] 0x" & respId.ToString("X3") & " OK")

        Else
            AppendResult("[UDS] 0x" & respId.ToString("X3") & " → " & hex)
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub OnFrameDecoded(ByVal canId As UInteger, ByVal data As Byte())
        ' 필요 시 특정 ID 프레임 파싱 추가 가능
    End Sub

    ' NORMAL 모드 Job 이름 상수 (모터 반복 전송용)
    Private Const JOB_MOTOR As String = "NML_MOTOR"

    ' =========================================================
    '  모터 제어
    '  - PE: UDS IOControl 1회 전송 (AddJobOnce)
    '  - NORMAL: 0x4A5 500ms 주기 반복 전송 (AddJob) ← ThreadTask3 방식
    ' =========================================================

    ''' <summary>NORMAL 모드: 기존 모터 Job 제거 후 새 모터 Job 등록 (500ms 반복)</summary>
    Private Sub NormalMotorJob(ByVal data As Byte())
        _can.RemoveJob(JOB_MOTOR)
        _can.AddJob(JOB_MOTOR, &H4A5, 500, data(0), data(1), data(2), data(3), data(4), data(5), data(6), data(7))
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnRlFwd_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRlFwd.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RL FWD")
        If _mode = "PE" Then
            _can.AddJobOnce("RL FWD", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H63, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        Else
            NormalMotorJob(New Byte() {&H0, &H0, &H8, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0})
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnRlBwd_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRlBwd.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RL BWD")
        If _mode = "PE" Then
            _can.AddJobOnce("RL BWD", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H64, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        Else
            NormalMotorJob(New Byte() {&H0, &H0, &H2, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0})
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnRrFwd_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRrFwd.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RR FWD")
        If _mode = "PE" Then
            _can.AddJobOnce("RR FWD", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H43, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        Else
            NormalMotorJob(New Byte() {&H0, &H0, &H80, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0})
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnRrBwd_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRrBwd.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RR BWD")
        If _mode = "PE" Then
            _can.AddJobOnce("RR BWD", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H44, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        Else
            NormalMotorJob(New Byte() {&H0, &H0, &H20, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0})
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnStop_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnStop.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("전체 STOP")

        ' 모든 진행 중 타이머 중지
        tmrVent.Stop()
        _ventSide = ""
        StopEduCheck()

        If _mode = "PE" Then
            ' RL STOP
            _can.AddJobOnce("RL STOP1", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H63, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            _can.AddJobOnce("RL STOP2", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H64, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            ' RR STOP
            _can.AddJobOnce("RR STOP1", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H43, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            _can.AddJobOnce("RR STOP2", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H44, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        Else
            ' 반복 중인 모든 Job 제거 (모터, EDU, 벤트 등)
            _can.RemoveJob(JOB_MOTOR)
            _can.RemoveJob("LH_EDU_1")
            _can.RemoveJob("RH_EDU_1")
            _can.RemoveJob("NML_LH_STOP")
            _can.RemoveJob("NML_RH_STOP")
            ' LH STOP + RH STOP (원본: 2회 보내고 중단)
            _can.AddJob("NML_LH_STOP", &H4A5, 500, &H0, &H0, &H4, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            _can.AddJob("NML_RH_STOP", &H4A5, 500, &H0, &H0, &H40, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            ' 1.2초 후 STOP Job도 제거 (원본: CanCount>=2 → CanSTep=0)
            tmrStopDelay.Start()
        End If
    End Sub

    ' =========================================================
    '  벤트
    ' =========================================================

    Private Sub btnRlVent_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRlVent.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RL VENT ON")
        If _mode = "PE" Then
            _can.AddJob32("RL_VENT_ON", &H49B, 500,
                          &HFF, &HFF, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H5,
                          &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H10,
                          &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                          &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        Else
            ' NORMAL 벤트 시퀀스 시작
            StartVentSequence("LH")
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnRrVent_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRrVent.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RR VENT ON")
        If _mode = "PE" Then
            _can.AddJob32("RR_VENT_ON", &H49B, 500,
                          &HFF, &HFF, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                          &H0, &H5, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H10,
                          &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                          &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        Else
            ' NORMAL 벤트 시퀀스 시작
            StartVentSequence("RH")
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnVentOff_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnVentOff.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("VENT OFF")
        If _mode = "PE" Then
            _can.AddJobOnce32("VENT_OFF", &H49B,
                              &HFF, &HFF, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                              &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                              &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                              &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        Else
            ' NORMAL 벤트 중지
            tmrVent.Stop()
            _ventSide = ""
            ' 모터 Job도 제거
            _can.RemoveJob(JOB_MOTOR)
            ' STOP 메시지 전송 (반복 2회 후 중단)
            _can.AddJob("NML_LH_STOP", &H4A5, 500, &H0, &H0, &H4, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            _can.AddJob("NML_RH_STOP", &H4A5, 500, &H0, &H0, &H40, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            ' 1.2초 후 STOP Job도 제거 (원본: CanCount>=2 → CanSTep=0)
            tmrStopDelay.Start()
        End If
    End Sub

    ' ===== NORMAL 벤트 시퀀스 (Timer) =====

    Private Sub StartVentSequence(ByVal side As String)
        tmrVent.Stop()
        _ventSide = side
        _ventStep = 0
        tmrVent.Interval = 500
        tmrVent.Start()
    End Sub

    Private Sub tmrVent_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmrVent.Tick
        If _can Is Nothing OrElse String.IsNullOrEmpty(_ventSide) Then
            tmrVent.Stop()
            Return
        End If

        Select Case _ventStep
            Case 0
                ' STOP
                If _ventSide = "LH" Then
                    _can.AddJobOnce("V_STOP", &H4A5, &H0, &H0, &H4, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                Else
                    _can.AddJobOnce("V_STOP", &H4A5, &H0, &H0, &H40, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                End If
                _ventStep = 1

            Case 1
                ' 3E0 초기화
                _can.AddJobOnce("V_3E0_INIT", &H3E0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                _ventStep = 2

            Case 2
                ' 3E0 활성화
                _can.AddJobOnce("V_3E0_ACT", &H3E0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H50, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                _ventStep = 3

            Case 3
                ' 4A2
                If _ventSide = "LH" Then
                    _can.AddJobOnce("V_4A2", &H4A2, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H50, &H0, &H0)
                Else
                    _can.AddJobOnce("V_4A2", &H4A2, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H5, &H0, &H0)
                End If
                _ventStep = 4

            Case 4
                ' 418
                _can.AddJobOnce("V_418", &H418, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H10, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                _ventStep = 5

            Case 5
                ' 3E0 반복 (→ step4로 돌아감)
                _can.AddJobOnce("V_3E0_RPT", &H3E0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H50, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                _ventStep = 4

        End Select
    End Sub

    ' =========================================================
    '  UDS / 진단 (PE 전용)
    ' =========================================================

    Private Sub btnSession_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnSession.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("Session Start (Extended)")
        _can.AddJobOnce("Session", &H731, &H2, &H10, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnTp_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnTp.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("Tester Present 시작 (2초 주기)")
        _can.AddJob("TP", &H731, 2000, &H2, &H3E, &H80, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnSwVer_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnSwVer.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("Request SW Version (DID F1B1)")
        _can.AddJobOnce("SW_VER", &H731, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &HB1, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnHwVer_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnHwVer.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("Request HW Version (DID F193)")
        _can.AddJobOnce("HW_VER", &H731, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &H93, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnIgnOn_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnIgnOn.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("IGN ON (0x3D1, 200ms 주기)")
        _can.AddJob32("IGN", &H3D1, 200,
                      &HFF, &HFF, &H0, &H55, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                      &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                      &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                      &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnLimitSet_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnLimitSet.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("Slide Limit Set (DID 12A7, Param 0x40)")
        _can.AddJobOnce("LimitSet", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA7, &H40, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnLimitCheck_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnLimitCheck.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("Slide Limit Check (DID 12A7, Param 0xF0)")
        _can.AddJobOnce("LimitCheck", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA7, &HF0, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnLimitClear_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnLimitClear.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("Slide Limit Clear (RoutineID FF00)")
        _can.AddJobOnce("LimitClear", &H731, &H4, &H31, &H1, &HFF, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    ' =========================================================
    '  학습 / 클리어 (NORMAL 전용)
    ' =========================================================

    Private Sub btnLhEdu_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnLhEdu.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("LH EDU (DID 12A6)")
        _can.AddJobOnce("LH_EDU_1", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA6, &H42, &H0, &H0)
        _can.AddJobOnce("LH_EDU_2", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA6, &H42, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnRhEdu_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRhEdu.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RH EDU (DID 12A7)")
        _can.AddJobOnce("RH_EDU_1", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA7, &H42, &H0, &H0)
        _can.AddJobOnce("RH_EDU_2", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA7, &H42, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnLhEduCheck_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnLhEduCheck.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("LH 학습 체크 (DID 12A6) - 교대 반복 시작")
        ' 원본: CanSTep 500↔501 교대 반복 (F0 → 31 03 → F0 → ...)
        _can.RemoveJob("LH_EDU")
        _can.RemoveJob("RH_EDU")
        StartEduCheck("LH")
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnRhEduCheck_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRhEduCheck.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RH 학습 체크 (DID 12A7) - 교대 반복 시작")
        ' 원본: CanSTep 600↔601 교대 반복
        _can.RemoveJob("LH_EDU")
        _can.RemoveJob("RH_EDU")
        StartEduCheck("RH")
    End Sub

    ' NORMAL 학습 체크: 2개 메시지 교대 반복 (원본 ThreadTask3 방식)
    Private _eduCheckSide As String = ""
    Private _eduCheckStep As Integer = 0
    Private _eduCheckCount As Integer = 0   ' 트라이 횟수
    Private Const EDU_CHECK_MAX_TRY As Integer = 5

    Private Sub StartEduCheck(ByVal side As String)
        tmrEduCheck.Stop()
        _eduCheckSide = side
        _eduCheckStep = 0
        _eduCheckCount = 0
        tmrEduCheck.Interval = 500
        tmrEduCheck.Start()
    End Sub

    Private Sub StopEduCheck()
        tmrEduCheck.Stop()
        _eduCheckSide = ""
        _eduCheckCount = 0
    End Sub

    Private Sub tmrEduCheck_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmrEduCheck.Tick
        If _can Is Nothing OrElse String.IsNullOrEmpty(_eduCheckSide) Then
            tmrEduCheck.Stop()
            Return
        End If

        Dim did1 As Byte = If(_eduCheckSide = "LH", CByte(&HA6), CByte(&HA7))

        If _eduCheckStep = 0 Then
            ' 31 01 12 A6/A7 F0 (학습 체크 요청)
            _can.AddJobOnce("EDU_CHK_A", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, did1, &HF0, &H0, &H0)
            _eduCheckStep = 1
        Else
            ' 31 03 12 A6/A7 (학습 결과 조회)
            _can.AddJobOnce("EDU_CHK_B", &H731, &H4, &H31, &H3, &H12, did1, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            _eduCheckStep = 0
            _eduCheckCount += 1
            ' 5회 트라이 후 응답 없으면 NG
            If _eduCheckCount >= EDU_CHECK_MAX_TRY Then
                Dim side = _eduCheckSide
                StopEduCheck()
                AppendResult("[학습체크] " & side & " NG (응답 없음)")
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnRlccsClear_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRlccsClear.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RLCCS DTC Clear (0x712)")

        If _can Is Nothing Then Return

    Private Sub btnRlccsVer_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRlccsVer.Click

        _can.AddJobOnce("RLCCS_SW", &H712, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &HB1, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnRrccsVer_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRrccsVer.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RRCCS SW Version 조회 (0x707)")
        _can.AddJobOnce("RRCCS_SW", &H707, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &HB1, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)

    ' DTC Clear All (TSA: 0x731)
    Private Sub btnDtcClearAll_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnDtcClearAll.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("DTC Clear All (0x731)")

        _can.AddJobOnce("DTC_ALL_2", &H731, &H4, &H14, &HFF, &HFF, &HFF, &H0, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    ' Relax/Return (TSA: 0x2A5)
    Private Sub btnLhRelax_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnLhRelax.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("LH OneTouch Relax (0x2A5)")
        _can.AddJobOnce("LH_RELAX_1", &H2A5, &H18, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        _can.AddJobOnce("LH_RELAX_2", &H2A5, &H18, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnLhReturn_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnLhReturn.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("LH OneTouch Return (0x2A5)")

        _can.AddJobOnce("LH_RETURN_2", &H2A5, &H10, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnRhRelax_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRhRelax.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return

        _can.AddJobOnce("RH_RELAX_2", &H2A5, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)

        _can.AddJobOnce("RH_RETURN_2", &H2A5, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H2, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)

    ' =========================================================
    '  파워서플라이 제어 (0V ↔ 기존전압 토글)
    ' =========================================================

    ' FrmBasic에서 설정된 원래 전압 (폼 로드시 저장)
    Private _savedVolt As Double = 0

    ''' <summary>타이머: Module1의 전압/전류 값을 라벨에 표시</summary>
    Private Sub tmrSupply_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmrSupply.Tick
        lblSupplyVolt.Text = "V: " & Module1.ValueVolt1.ToString("F2")
        lblSupplyAmp.Text = "A: " & Module1.ValueAmp1.ToString("F3")
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>전압 ON/OFF 토글 (0V ↔ 기존 TargetVolt)</summary>
    Private Sub btnVoltToggle_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnVoltToggle.Click
        If Module1.TargetVolt > 0 Then
            ' 현재 ON → 0V로 (전원 차단)
            Module1.TargetVolt = 0
        Else
            ' 현재 OFF → 원래 전압으로 복원
            Module1.TargetVolt = _savedVolt
        End If
        UpdateVoltToggleButton()
    End Sub

    Private Sub UpdateVoltToggleButton()
        If Module1.TargetVolt > 0 Then
            btnVoltToggle.Text = "ON " & Module1.TargetVolt.ToString("F1") & "V"
            btnVoltToggle.BackColor = System.Drawing.Color.LightGreen
        Else
            btnVoltToggle.Text = "OFF 0V"
            btnVoltToggle.BackColor = System.Drawing.Color.LightCoral
        End If
    End Sub

    ' =========================================================
    '  로그 지우기
    ' =========================================================

    Private Sub btnLogClear_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnLogClear.Click
        txtLog.Clear()
    End Sub

    ' =========================================================
    '  LH+RH EDU 자동 시퀀스 (리미트 세팅 + 학습체크)
    '  동시 모드: LH+RH 동시 전송 → 전류 정지 감지 → 학습체크
    ' =========================================================

    Private _lhRhStep As Integer = -1         ' -1 = 비활성
    Private _lhRhTime As New Stopwatch()
    Private _lhRhCalcCount As Integer = 0     ' 정지 감지 카운터
    Private _lhRhCheckResult As String = ""   ' 학습체크 UDS 응답 ("OK"/"NG"/"")
    Private _lhRhCheckCount As Integer = 0    ' 학습체크 재시도 횟수
    Private _lhRhLastLogSec As Integer = -1   ' 마지막 전류 로그 시간(초)

    Private Sub btnLhRhEdu_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnLhRhEdu.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return

        ' 기존 체크 중이면 정지
        StopEduCheck()

        AppendResult("========================================")
        AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] === 리미트 세팅 시작 ===")

        ' LH EDU 연속전송 (500ms 주기)
        AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] LH EDU 연속전송 시작 (500ms)")
        _can.AddJob("LHRH_EDU_LH", &H731, 500, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA6, &H42, &H0, &H0)

        _lhRhStep = 1
        _lhRhCalcCount = 0
        _lhRhLastLogSec = -1
        _lhRhTime.Restart()
        tmrLhRhEdu.Start()
    End Sub

    Private Sub tmrLhRhEdu_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmrLhRhEdu.Tick
        If _can Is Nothing Then
            StopLhRhEdu()
            Return
        End If

        Dim amp As Double = Module1.ValueAmp1
        Dim sec As Integer = CInt(Math.Floor(_lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds))

        Select Case _lhRhStep

            Case 1
                ' LH 시작 대기 (전류 > 2.5A)
                If sec <> _lhRhLastLogSec Then
                    _lhRhLastLogSec = sec
                    AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] LH 시작 대기... Amp={amp:F2}A ({sec}초)")
                End If
                If amp > 2.5 Then
                    AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] ★ LH 시작 감지 (Amp={amp:F2}A)")
                    ' RH EDU 연속전송 추가 (500ms 주기)
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] RH EDU 연속전송 시작 (500ms)")
                    _can.AddJob("LHRH_EDU_RH", &H731, 500, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA7, &H42, &H0, &H0)
                    _lhRhTime.Restart()
                    _lhRhLastLogSec = -1
                    _lhRhStep = 2
                End If
                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 30 Then
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] LH 시작 타임아웃 (30초)")
                    _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_LH")
                    StopLhRhEdu()
                End If

            Case 2
                ' RH 추가 시작 대기 (전류 > 5A = 둘 다 동작)
                If sec <> _lhRhLastLogSec Then
                    _lhRhLastLogSec = sec
                    AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] RH 시작 대기... Amp={amp:F2}A ({sec}초)")
                End If
                If amp > 5 Then
                    _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_LH")
                    _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_RH")
                    AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] ★ LH+RH 모두 시작 (Amp={amp:F2}A) → EDU 전송 중단")
                    _lhRhCalcCount = 0
                    _lhRhTime.Restart()
                    _lhRhLastLogSec = -1
                    _lhRhStep = 3
                End If
                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 30 Then
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] RH 시작 타임아웃 (30초)")
                    _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_LH")
                    _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_RH")
                    StopLhRhEdu()
                End If

            Case 3
                ' 모터 정지 대기 (전류 < 0.3A = LH+RH 둘 다 완료)
                If sec <> _lhRhLastLogSec Then
                    _lhRhLastLogSec = sec
                    AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] 동작 중... Amp={amp:F2}A ({sec}초)")
                End If
                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 2 Then
                    If amp < 0.3 Then
                        _lhRhCalcCount += 1
                    Else
                        _lhRhCalcCount = 0
                    End If
                    If _lhRhCalcCount >= 5 Then
                        _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_LH")
                        _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_RH")
                        AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] ★ 모터 정지 (LH+RH 학습 완료, Amp={amp:F2}A, {sec}초)")
                        _lhRhTime.Restart()
                        _lhRhLastLogSec = -1
                        _lhRhStep = 10
                    End If
                End If
                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 60 Then
                    _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_LH")
                    _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_RH")
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] 정지 타임아웃 (60초)")
                    StopLhRhEdu()
                End If

            ' ─── LH 학습체크 (31 01 → 31 03 교대) ───
            Case 10
                ' 1초 대기 후 시작
                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 1 Then
                    _lhRhCheckResult = ""
                    _lhRhCheckCount = 0
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] === LH 학습체크 시작 ===")
                    _lhRhStep = 11
                End If

            Case 11
                ' LH 학습체크 요청 (31 01 12 A6 F0)
                _lhRhCheckCount += 1
                AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] LH 학습체크 요청 (시도 {_lhRhCheckCount}/5)")
                _can.AddJobOnce("LHRH_CHK_LH_A", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA6, &HF0, &H0, &H0)
                _lhRhTime.Restart()
                _lhRhStep = 12

            Case 12
                ' 500ms 대기 후 학습결과 조회
                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalMilliseconds >= 500 Then
                    _lhRhCheckResult = ""
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] LH 학습결과 조회 (31 03 12 A6)")
                    _can.AddJobOnce("LHRH_CHK_LH_B", &H731, &H4, &H31, &H3, &H12, &HA6, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    _lhRhTime.Restart()
                    _lhRhStep = 13
                End If

            Case 13
                ' LH 응답 대기
                If _lhRhCheckResult = "OK" Then
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] ★ LH 학습체크 OK")
                    _lhRhTime.Restart()
                    _lhRhStep = 20
                ElseIf _lhRhCheckResult = "NG" Then
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] ★ LH 학습체크 NG")
                    _lhRhTime.Restart()
                    _lhRhStep = 20
                ElseIf _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 2 Then
                    AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] LH 응답 없음 ({_lhRhCheckCount}/5)")
                    If _lhRhCheckCount >= 5 Then
                        AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] ★ LH 학습체크 NG (응답 없음)")
                        _lhRhTime.Restart()
                        _lhRhStep = 20
                    Else
                        _lhRhStep = 11
                    End If
                End If

            ' ─── RH 학습체크 ───
            Case 20
                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 0.5 Then
                    _lhRhCheckResult = ""
                    _lhRhCheckCount = 0
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] === RH 학습체크 시작 ===")
                    _lhRhStep = 21
                End If

            Case 21
                ' RH 학습체크 요청 (31 01 12 A7 F0)
                _lhRhCheckCount += 1
                AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] RH 학습체크 요청 (시도 {_lhRhCheckCount}/5)")
                _can.AddJobOnce("LHRH_CHK_RH_A", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA7, &HF0, &H0, &H0)
                _lhRhTime.Restart()
                _lhRhStep = 22

            Case 22
                ' 500ms 대기 후 학습결과 조회
                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalMilliseconds >= 500 Then
                    _lhRhCheckResult = ""
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] RH 학습결과 조회 (31 03 12 A7)")
                    _can.AddJobOnce("LHRH_CHK_RH_B", &H731, &H4, &H31, &H3, &H12, &HA7, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    _lhRhTime.Restart()
                    _lhRhStep = 23
                End If

            Case 23
                ' RH 응답 대기
                If _lhRhCheckResult = "OK" Then
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] ★ RH 학습체크 OK")
                    _lhRhStep = 99
                ElseIf _lhRhCheckResult = "NG" Then
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] ★ RH 학습체크 NG")
                    _lhRhStep = 99
                ElseIf _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 2 Then
                    AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] RH 응답 없음 ({_lhRhCheckCount}/5)")
                    If _lhRhCheckCount >= 5 Then
                        AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] ★ RH 학습체크 NG (응답 없음)")
                        _lhRhStep = 99
                    Else
                        _lhRhStep = 21
                    End If
                End If

            Case 99
                AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] === 시퀀스 완료 ===")
                AppendResult("========================================")
                StopLhRhEdu()

        End Select
    End Sub

    Private Sub StopLhRhEdu()
        tmrLhRhEdu.Stop()
        _lhRhStep = -1
        _lhRhTime.Stop()
        If _can IsNot Nothing Then
            _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_LH")
            _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_RH")
        End If
    End Sub

End Class

content.text:
분리 방안:
- **FrmCanPe** — CAN FD (PE/ICE): 연결, 모터, 벤트, UDS(Session/TP/Ver/IGN/Limit), 파워서플라이
- **FrmCanNormal** — CAN 2.0 (NORMAL/STD): 연결, 모터, 벤트, 학습/클리어/Relax, 파워서플라이

공통 부분(연결, 모터, 벤트, 로그, 파워서플라이, UDS 파싱)은 양쪽에 각각 포함하되, 모드별 분기(`If _mode = "PE"`)를 제거하고 각 폼이 단일 모드만 담당하게 합니다.

FrmMainRH에서 메뉴 호출 부분도 확인하겠습니다.

content.text:
FrmMainRH.vb에서 호출 부분:
- Line 4463: `New FrmCanFd("PE")` — PE 메뉴
- Line 4468: `New FrmCanFd("NORMAL")` — NORMAL 메뉴

분리 계획:
1. **FrmCanPe** — PE 전용 (CAN FD, UDS, IGN, Limit, 모터/벤트는 PE 방식만)
2. **FrmCanNormal** — 기존 FrmCanFd를 NORMAL 전용으로 유지 (학습/클리어/Relax, 모터/벤트는 NORMAL 방식만)
3. FrmMainRH 메뉴 호출 변경

진행할까요?

message.content: 분리시키고 기존 frmcanpe 에서 레스트모드 lh/rh 전진/후진 각각 / dtc 클리어 신호 / 버튼 따로 만들어주고 그에 따른 로그도 기록해줘
