    ' =========================================================
    '  NORMAL 자동검사 시퀀스 (tmrNormalTest)
    ' =========================================================

    Private nStep As Integer = 0
    Private nStepCount As Integer = 0
    Private nStepTime As New Stopwatch()
    Private FlagNmlVerDone As Boolean = False
    Private FlagNmlDone As Boolean = False
    Private _savedTargetVolt As Double = 0
    Private testSw As New Stopwatch()         ' TmrWork + tmrNormalTest 공용
    Private stats As New TestStats()          ' TmrWork + tmrNormalTest 공용
    Private _nmlEduCheckResult As String = ""
    Private _nmlEduCheckCount As Integer = 0
    Private _nmlVerRetry As Integer = 0            ' 버전 체크 재시도 횟수

    ' NORMAL 모터 제어 (0x4A5 500ms 주기)
    Private Const NML_MOTOR_JOB As String = "NML_MOTOR"

    ' NORMAL 벤트 시퀀스 상태
    Private _nmlVentSide As String = ""    ' "LH", "RH", ""
    Private _nmlVentStep As Integer = 0

    Private Sub NmlMotorStart(ByVal data As Byte())
        _can.RemoveJob(NML_MOTOR_JOB)
        _can.AddJob(NML_MOTOR_JOB, &H4A5, 500, data(0), data(1), data(2), data(3), data(4), data(5), data(6), data(7))
    End Sub

    Private Sub NmlMotorStop()
        _can.RemoveJob(NML_MOTOR_JOB)
        ' LH STOP + RH STOP
        _can.AddJobOnce("NML_LH_STP", &H4A5, &H0, &H0, &H4, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        _can.AddJobOnce("NML_RH_STP", &H4A5, &H0, &H0, &H40, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    Private Sub tmrNormalTest_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmrNormalTest.Tick

        Try

            ' ─── nStep 1-9: CAN 연결 + ECU 버전 체크 (SW→HW 2패스) ───
            If nStep = 1 Then
                CanStart()
                _versionPhase = "SW"
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 2

            ElseIf nStep = 2 Then
                If FlagCanStart = True Then
                    ' RPSU 버전 요청 (SW: F1B1, HW: F1B0)
                    If _versionPhase = "SW" Then
                        strVersion = ""
                        _can.AddJobOnce("RPSU_SW", &H731, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &HB1, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    Else
                        strHwVersion = ""
                        _can.AddJobOnce("RPSU_HW", &H731, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &H93, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    End If
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 3
                ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 5 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] CAN 연결 실패")
                    nStep = 0
                    tmrNormalTest.Stop()
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 3 Then
                ' RPSU 응답 대기
                If _versionPhase = "SW" Then
                    If strVersion <> "" Then
                        srcSWValRPSU.Text = strVersion
                        srcSWValRPSU2.Text = strVersion
                        If strVersion.Contains(TargetRPSUSwNml) Then
                            srcSWDecRPSU.Text = "OK"
                            srcSWDecRPSU.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        Else
                            srcSWDecRPSU.Text = "NG"
                            srcSWDecRPSU.BackColor = Color.Red
                        End If
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 4
                    ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 3 Then
                        strVersion = ""
                        _can.AddJobOnce("RPSU_SW2", &H731, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &HB1, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                    End If
                Else ' HW
                    If strHwVersion <> "" Then
                        srcHWValRPSU.Text = strHwVersion
                        srcHWValRPSU2.Text = strHwVersion
                        If strHwVersion.Contains(TargetRPSUHwNml) Then
                            srcHWDecRPSU.Text = "OK"
                            srcHWDecRPSU.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        Else
                            srcHWDecRPSU.Text = "NG"
                            srcHWDecRPSU.BackColor = Color.Red
                        End If
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 4
                    ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 3 Then
                        strHwVersion = ""
                        _can.AddJobOnce("RPSU_HW2", &H731, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &H93, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 4 Then
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 0.5 Then
                    ' RRCCS 버전 요청
                    _nmlVerRetry = 0
                    If _versionPhase = "SW" Then
                        _nmlSwVersion = ""
                        _nmlSwRespId = 0
                        _can.AddJobOnce("RRCCS_SW", &H707, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &HB1, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    Else
                        _nmlHwVersion = ""
                        _nmlHwRespId = 0
                        _can.AddJobOnce("RRCCS_HW", &H707, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &H93, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    End If
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 5
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 5 Then
                ' RRCCS 응답 대기
                If _versionPhase = "SW" Then
                    If _nmlSwRespId = &H70F Then
                        srcSWValRRCCS.Text = _nmlSwVersion
                        srcSWValRRCCS2.Text = _nmlSwVersion
                        If _nmlSwVersion.Contains(TargetRRCCSSwNml) Then
                            srcSWDecRRCCS.Text = "OK"
                            srcSWDecRRCCS.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        Else
                            srcSWDecRRCCS.Text = "NG"
                            srcSWDecRRCCS.BackColor = Color.Red
                        End If
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 6
                    ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 3 Then
                        _nmlVerRetry += 1
                        If _nmlVerRetry <= 2 Then
                            AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] RRCCS SW 응답 없음 → 재전송 ({_nmlVerRetry}/2)")
                            _nmlSwVersion = ""
                            _nmlSwRespId = 0
                            _can.AddJobOnce("RRCCS_SW", &H707, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &HB1, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                            nStepTime.Restart()
                        Else
                            srcSWDecRRCCS.Text = "NG"
                            srcSWDecRRCCS.BackColor = Color.Red
                            nStepTime.Restart()
                            nStep = 6
                        End If
                    End If
                Else ' HW
                    If _nmlHwRespId = &H70F Then
                        srcHWValRRCCS.Text = _nmlHwVersion
                        srcHWValRRCCS2.Text = _nmlHwVersion
                        If _nmlHwVersion.Contains(TargetRRCCSHwNml) Then
                            srcHWDecRRCCS.Text = "OK"
                            srcHWDecRRCCS.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        Else
                            srcHWDecRRCCS.Text = "NG"
                            srcHWDecRRCCS.BackColor = Color.Red
                        End If
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 6
                    ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 3 Then
                        _nmlVerRetry += 1
                        If _nmlVerRetry <= 2 Then
                            AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] RRCCS HW 응답 없음 → 재전송 ({_nmlVerRetry}/2)")
                            _nmlHwVersion = ""
                            _nmlHwRespId = 0
                            _can.AddJobOnce("RRCCS_HW", &H707, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &H93, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                            nStepTime.Restart()
                        Else
                            srcHWDecRRCCS.Text = "NG"
                            srcHWDecRRCCS.BackColor = Color.Red
                            nStepTime.Restart()
                            nStep = 6
                        End If
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 6 Then
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 0.5 Then
                    ' RLCCS 버전 요청
                    _nmlVerRetry = 0
                    If _versionPhase = "SW" Then
                        _nmlSwVersion = ""
                        _nmlSwRespId = 0
                        _can.AddJobOnce("RLCCS_SW", &H712, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &HB1, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    Else
                        _nmlHwVersion = ""
                        _nmlHwRespId = 0
                        _can.AddJobOnce("RLCCS_HW", &H712, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &H93, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    End If
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 7
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 7 Then
                ' RLCCS 응답 대기
                If _versionPhase = "SW" Then
                    If _nmlSwRespId = &H71A Then
                        FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcSWValRLCCS.Text = _nmlSwVersion
                        FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcSWValRLCCS2.Text = _nmlSwVersion
                        If _nmlSwVersion.Contains(TargetRLCCSSwNml) Then
                            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcSWDecRLCCS.Text = "OK"
                            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcSWDecRLCCS.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        Else
                            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcSWDecRLCCS.Text = "NG"
                            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcSWDecRLCCS.BackColor = Color.Red
                        End If
                        nStep = 9
                    ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 3 Then
                        _nmlVerRetry += 1
                        If _nmlVerRetry <= 2 Then
                            AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] RLCCS SW 응답 없음 → 재전송 ({_nmlVerRetry}/2)")
                            _nmlSwVersion = ""
                            _nmlSwRespId = 0
                            _can.AddJobOnce("RLCCS_SW", &H712, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &HB1, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                            nStepTime.Restart()
                        Else
                            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcSWDecRLCCS.Text = "NG"
                            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcSWDecRLCCS.BackColor = Color.Red
                            nStep = 9
                        End If
                    End If
                Else ' HW
                    If _nmlHwRespId = &H71A Then
                        FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcHWValRLCCS.Text = _nmlHwVersion
                        FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcHWValRLCCS2.Text = _nmlHwVersion
                        If _nmlHwVersion.Contains(TargetRLCCSHwNml) Then
                            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcHWDecRLCCS.Text = "OK"
                            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcHWDecRLCCS.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        Else
                            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcHWDecRLCCS.Text = "NG"
                            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcHWDecRLCCS.BackColor = Color.Red
                        End If
                        nStep = 9
                    ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 3 Then
                        _nmlVerRetry += 1
                        If _nmlVerRetry <= 2 Then
                            AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] RLCCS HW 응답 없음 → 재전송 ({_nmlVerRetry}/2)")
                            _nmlHwVersion = ""
                            _nmlHwRespId = 0
                            _can.AddJobOnce("RLCCS_HW", &H712, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &H93, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                            nStepTime.Restart()
                        Else
                            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcHWDecRLCCS.Text = "NG"
                            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcHWDecRLCCS.BackColor = Color.Red
                            nStep = 9
                        End If
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 9 Then
                ' SW 완료 → HW 패스 시작, HW 완료 → 버전 체크 종료
                If _versionPhase = "SW" Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] SW 버전 체크 완료, HW 체크 시작")
                    _versionPhase = "HW"
                    nStep = 2
                Else
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] 버전 체크 완료 (SW+HW)")
                    FlagNmlVerDone = True
                    nStep = 0
                    tmrNormalTest.Stop()
                End If

                ' ─── nStep 10-19: 버니싱 ───
            ElseIf nStep = 10 Then
                If NumBurnishing = 0 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] 버니싱 건너뜀 (NumBurnishing=0)")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 19
                Else
                    AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] 버니싱 FWD ({BurnishingCount + 1}/{NumBurnishing})")
                    ' LH+RH FWD (0x4A5, {0,0,0x88,0,0,0,0,0})
                    NmlMotorStart(New Byte() {&H0, &H0, &H88, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0})
                    CalcCount1 = 0
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 11
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 11 Then
                ' FWD 모터 시작 대기
                If ValueAmp1 > 1 Then
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 12
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 12 Then
                ' FWD 끝 정지 감지 (CalcCount>=5)
                TotalTime1 = nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                If TotalTime1 > 2 Then
                    If ValueAmp1 < 0.32 Then
                        CalcCount1 += 1
                    Else
                        CalcCount1 = 0
                    End If
                    If CalcCount1 >= 5 Then
                        NmlMotorStop()
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 13
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 13 Then
                ' 1초 대기
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 1 Then nStep = 14

            ElseIf nStep = 14 Then
                ' LH+RH BWD (0x4A5, {0,0,0x22,0,0,0,0,0})
                AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] 버니싱 BWD ({BurnishingCount + 1}/{NumBurnishing})")
                NmlMotorStart(New Byte() {&H0, &H0, &H22, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0})
                CalcCount1 = 0
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 15

            ElseIf nStep = 15 Then
                ' BWD 모터 시작 대기
                If ValueAmp1 > 1 Then
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 16
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 16 Then
                ' BWD 끝 정지 감지 (CalcCount>=5)
                TotalTime1 = nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                If TotalTime1 > 2 Then
                    If ValueAmp1 < 0.32 Then
                        CalcCount1 += 1
                    Else
                        CalcCount1 = 0
                    End If
                    If CalcCount1 >= 5 Then
                        NmlMotorStop()
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 17
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 17 Then
                ' 1초 대기 후 카운트 증가
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 1 Then
                    BurnishingCount += 1
                    AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] 버니싱 완료 ({BurnishingCount}/{NumBurnishing})")
                    If BurnishingCount < NumBurnishing Then
                        nStep = 10
                    Else
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 19
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 19 Then
                ' 리미트 세팅 전 1초 대기
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 1 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] 리미트 세팅 전 1초 대기 완료")
                    nStep = 20
                End If

                ' ─── nStep 20-24: 리미트 세팅 (LH 전류감지 → RH 전류감지 → 완료) ───
            ElseIf nStep = 20 Then
                AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] 1차 리미트 세팅 시작 (LH EDU 연속전송)")
                _can.AddJob("NML_EDU_LH", &H731, 500, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA6, &H42, &H0, &H0)
                CalcCount1 = 0
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 21

            ElseIf nStep = 21 Then
                ' LH 시작 대기 (전류 > 2.5A)
                If ValueAmp1 > 2.5 Then
                    AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] LH 시작 감지 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A, {nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds:F1}초)")
                    ' RH EDU 연속전송 추가
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] RH EDU 연속전송 시작")
                    _can.AddJob("NML_EDU_RH", &H731, 500, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA7, &H42, &H0, &H0)
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 22
                End If
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 30 Then
                    AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] LH 시작 타임아웃 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A)")
                    _can.RemoveJob("NML_EDU_LH")
                    srclbDecEcuEDURH.Text = "NG"
                    srclbDecEcuEDURH.BackColor = Color.Red
                    nStep = 99
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 22 Then
                ' RH 추가 시작 대기 (전류 > 5A = 둘 다 동작)
                If ValueAmp1 > 5 Then
                    _can.RemoveJob("NML_EDU_LH")
                    _can.RemoveJob("NML_EDU_RH")
                    AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] LH+RH 모두 시작 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A, {nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds:F1}초) → EDU 전송 중단")
                    CalcCount1 = 0
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 23
                End If
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 30 Then
                    AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] RH 시작 타임아웃 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A)")
                    _can.RemoveJob("NML_EDU_LH")
                    _can.RemoveJob("NML_EDU_RH")
                    srclbDecEcuEDURH.Text = "NG"
                    srclbDecEcuEDURH.BackColor = Color.Red
                    nStep = 99
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 23 Then
                ' 모터 정지 대기 (전류 < 0.3A = LH+RH 둘 다 완료)
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 2 Then
                    If ValueAmp1 < 0.3 Then
                        CalcCount1 += 1
                    Else
                        CalcCount1 = 0
                    End If
                    If CalcCount1 >= 5 Then
                        _can.RemoveJob("NML_EDU_LH")
                        _can.RemoveJob("NML_EDU_RH")
                        AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] 1차 리미트 세팅 완료 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A, {nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds:F1}초)")
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 25
                    End If
                End If
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 60 Then
                    _can.RemoveJob("NML_EDU_LH")
                    _can.RemoveJob("NML_EDU_RH")
                    AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] 리미트 세팅 타임아웃 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A)")
                    srclbDecEcuEDURH.Text = "NG"
                    srclbDecEcuEDURH.BackColor = Color.Red
                    nStep = 99
                End If

                ' ─── nStep 25-29: 리미트세팅확인 LH (학습체크) ───
            ElseIf nStep = 25 Then
                ' 1초 대기 후 학습체크 시작
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 1 Then
                    _nmlEduCheckResult = ""
                    _nmlEduCheckCount = 0
                    nStep = 26
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 26 Then
                ' LH 학습체크 요청 (31 01 12 A6 F0)
                AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] LH 학습체크 요청 (시도 {_nmlEduCheckCount + 1}/5)")
                _can.AddJobOnce("EDU_CHK_LH_A", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA6, &HF0, &H0, &H0)
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 27

            ElseIf nStep = 27 Then
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 0.5 Then
                    ' LH 학습결과 조회 (31 03 12 A6)
                    _nmlEduCheckResult = ""
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] LH 학습결과 조회 (31 03 12 A6)")
                    _can.AddJobOnce("EDU_CHK_LH_B", &H731, &H4, &H31, &H3, &H12, &HA6, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 28
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 28 Then
                If _nmlEduCheckResult = "OK" Then
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULH.Text = "OK"
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULH.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] LH 학습체크 OK")
                    nStep = 30
                ElseIf _nmlEduCheckResult = "NG" Then
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULH.Text = "NG"
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULH.BackColor = Color.Red
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] LH 학습체크 NG (ECU 응답 NG)")
                    nStep = 30
                ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 2 Then
                    _nmlEduCheckCount += 1
                    AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] LH 학습체크 응답 없음 ({_nmlEduCheckCount}/5)")
                    If _nmlEduCheckCount > 5 Then
                        FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULH.Text = "NG"
                        FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULH.BackColor = Color.Red
                        AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] LH 학습체크 NG (5회 응답 없음)")
                        nStep = 30
                    Else
                        nStep = 26  ' 재시도
                    End If
                End If

                ' ─── nStep 30-39: 리미트세팅확인 RH (동일 패턴, DID A7) ───
            ElseIf nStep = 30 Then
                _nmlEduCheckResult = ""
                _nmlEduCheckCount = 0
                nStep = 31

            ElseIf nStep = 31 Then
                ' RH 학습체크 요청 (31 01 12 A7 F0)
                AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] RH 학습체크 요청 (시도 {_nmlEduCheckCount + 1}/5)")
                _can.AddJobOnce("EDU_CHK_RH_A", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA7, &HF0, &H0, &H0)
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 32

            ElseIf nStep = 32 Then
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 0.5 Then
                    _nmlEduCheckResult = ""
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] RH 학습결과 조회 (31 03 12 A7)")

                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 0.5 Then
                    _nmlEduCheckResult = ""
                    _can.AddJobOnce("EDU2_CHK_RH_B", &H731, &H4, &H31, &H3, &H12, &HA7, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 76
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 76 Then
                If _nmlEduCheckResult = "OK" Then
                    srclbDecEcuEDURHFINAL.Text = "OK"
                    srclbDecEcuEDURHFINAL.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] 2차 RH 학습체크 OK")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 90
                ElseIf _nmlEduCheckResult = "NG" Then
                    srclbDecEcuEDURHFINAL.Text = "NG"
                    srclbDecEcuEDURHFINAL.BackColor = Color.Red
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] 2차 RH 학습체크 NG")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 90
                ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 2 Then
                    _nmlEduCheckCount += 1
                    If _nmlEduCheckCount > 5 Then
                        srclbDecEcuEDURHFINAL.Text = "NG"
                        srclbDecEcuEDURHFINAL.BackColor = Color.Red
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 90
                    Else
                        nStep = 74
                    End If
                End If

                ' ─── nStep 90-91: RPSU DTC 클리어 (0x731) ───
            ElseIf nStep = 90 Then
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 0.5 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] RPSU DTC Clear (0x731)")
                    _nmlDtcClearResult = ""
                    _can.AddJobOnce("RPSU_CLR", &H731, &H4, &H14, &HFF, &HFF, &HFF, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 91
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 91 Then
                If _nmlDtcClearResult = "OK" Then
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbrpsudtcclear.Text = "OK"
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbrpsudtcclear.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] RPSU DTC Clear OK")
                    nStep = 99
                ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 3 Then
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbrpsudtcclear.Text = "NG"
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbrpsudtcclear.BackColor = Color.Red
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] RPSU DTC Clear NG (타임아웃)")
                    nStep = 99
                End If

                ' ─── nStep 99: 완료 ───
            ElseIf nStep = 99 Then
                AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] 전체 시퀀스 완료")
                FlagNmlDone = True
                nStep = 0
                tmrNormalTest.Stop()

            End If

        Catch ex As Exception
            AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL 예외] " & ex.Message)
        End Try

    End Sub

    ' NORMAL SW 버전 응답용 변수
    Private _nmlSwVersion As String = ""
    Private _nmlSwRespId As UInteger = 0
    Private _nmlHwVersion As String = ""
    Private _nmlHwRespId As UInteger = 0
    Private strHwVersion As String = ""
    Private _versionPhase As String = "SW"  ' "SW" → "HW" 2패스

    ' NORMAL DTC 클리어 응답용 변수
    Private _nmlDtcClearResult As String = ""

End Class

﻿Imports System.Linq
Imports Peak.Can.Basic

Public Class FrmCanFd

    Private _mode As String          ' "PE" 또는 "NORMAL"
    Private _can As CanBusService
    Private _isConnected As Boolean

    ' NORMAL 벤트 시퀀스 상태
    Private _ventSide As String = ""    ' "LH", "RH", ""
    Private _ventStep As Integer = 0

    ''' <summary>
    ''' 모드 지정 생성자
    ''' </summary>
    Public Sub New(ByVal mode As String)
        InitializeComponent()
        _mode = If(String.IsNullOrEmpty(mode), "PE", mode.ToUpper())
    End Sub

    ' ===== 폼 이벤트 =====

    Private Sub FrmCanFd_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load
        Me.Text = "CAN 테스트 - [" & _mode & "]"

        ' 모드별 패널 표시/숨기기
        If _mode = "PE" Then
            grpUds.Visible = True
            grpNormal.Visible = False
        Else
            grpUds.Visible = False
            grpNormal.Visible = True
        End If

        ' 파워서플라이: 원래 전압 저장 & 타이머 시작
        _savedVolt = Module1.TargetVolt
        UpdateVoltToggleButton()
        tmrSupply.Start()

        SetButtonsEnabled(False)
    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmCanFd_FormClosing(sender As Object, e As Windows.Forms.FormClosingEventArgs) Handles MyBase.FormClosing
        tmrSupply.Stop()
        DoCanClose()
    End Sub

    ' ===== 버튼 활성화 제어 =====

    Private Sub SetButtonsEnabled(ByVal enabled As Boolean)
        grpMotor.Enabled = enabled
        grpVent.Enabled = enabled
        grpUds.Enabled = enabled
        grpNormal.Enabled = enabled
        btnCanOpen.Enabled = Not enabled
        btnCanClose.Enabled = enabled
    End Sub

    ' ===== 로그 =====

    Private Sub AppendLog(ByVal msg As String)
        If txtLog.InvokeRequired Then
            txtLog.BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() AppendLog(msg)))
            Return
        End If
        ' 로그 길이 제한
        If txtLog.TextLength > 50000 Then
            txtLog.Text = txtLog.Text.Substring(txtLog.TextLength - 30000)
        End If
        txtLog.AppendText(msg & vbCrLf)
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>좌측 하단 결과 표시 (UDS 응답 전용)</summary>
    Private Sub AppendResult(ByVal msg As String)
        If txtResult.InvokeRequired Then
            txtResult.BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() AppendResult(msg)))
            Return
        End If
        If txtResult.TextLength > 10000 Then
            txtResult.Text = txtResult.Text.Substring(txtResult.TextLength - 5000)
        End If
        txtResult.AppendText(msg & vbCrLf)
    End Sub

    Private Sub UpdateStatus(ByVal msg As String)
        If StatusStrip1.InvokeRequired Then
            StatusStrip1.BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() UpdateStatus(msg)))
            Return
        End If
        lblStatus.Text = msg
    End Sub

    ' ===== CAN Open / Close =====

    Private Sub btnCanOpen_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnCanOpen.Click
        Try
            Dim isFd As Boolean = (_mode = "PE")
            _can = New CanBusService(PCANBasic.PCAN_USBBUS1, isFd)

            ' 이벤트 핸들러 연결
            AddHandler _can.Log, Sub(s) AppendLog(s)
            AddHandler _can.Error, Sub(errSt) AppendLog("[오류] " & errSt.ToString())
            AddHandler _can.UdsCompleted, AddressOf OnUdsCompleted
            AddHandler _can.FrameDecoded, AddressOf OnFrameDecoded

            _can.LogAllRawTxFrames = True
            _can.LogAllRawRxFrames = True

            Dim st As TPCANStatus
            If isFd Then
                st = _can.Init()  ' FD 기본 bitrate
            Else
                st = _can.Init("") ' 500K 표준 (Init 내부에서 _isFd=False면 500K)
            End If

            If st <> TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_OK Then
                AppendLog("CAN 초기화 실패: " & st.ToString())
                _can.Dispose()
                _can = Nothing
                Return
            End If

            _can.StartPolling()
            _isConnected = True
            SetButtonsEnabled(True)
            UpdateStatus("연결됨 [" & _mode & "]")
            AppendLog("=== CAN " & _mode & " 연결 완료 ===")

            '' NORMAL 모드: NM 게이트웨이 Alive 주기 전송 (ECU 슬립 방지) - 테스트용 비활성화
            'If _mode = "NORMAL" Then
            '    _can.AddJob("NM_ALIVE", &H570, 200, &H70, &H1, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            '    AppendLog("NM Alive 자동 전송 시작 (0x570, 200ms)")
            'End If

        Catch ex As Exception
            AppendLog("[예외] " & ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnCanClose_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnCanClose.Click
        DoCanClose()
    End Sub

    Private Sub tmrStopDelay_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmrStopDelay.Tick
        tmrStopDelay.Stop()
        If _can IsNot Nothing Then
            _can.RemoveJob("NML_LH_STOP")
            _can.RemoveJob("NML_RH_STOP")
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub DoCanClose()
        tmrVent.Stop()
        tmrEduCheck.Stop()
        tmrLhRhEdu.Stop()
        tmrStopDelay.Stop()
        _ventSide = ""
        _eduCheckSide = ""
        If _can IsNot Nothing Then
            Try
                _can.Dispose()
            Catch
            End Try
            _can = Nothing
        End If
        _isConnected = False
        SetButtonsEnabled(False)
        UpdateStatus("연결 해제")
        AppendLog("=== CAN 연결 해제 ===")
    End Sub

    ' ===== UDS 응답 처리 =====

    Private Sub OnUdsCompleted(ByVal respId As UInteger, ByVal data As Byte())
        If data Is Nothing OrElse data.Length = 0 Then Return

        Dim hex As String = String.Join(" ", data.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2")))

        If data(0) = &H62 AndAlso data.Length >= 4 Then
            ' RDBI 긍정 응답
            Dim did As String = data(1).ToString("X2") & data(2).ToString("X2")
            Dim payload = data.Skip(3).ToArray()
            Dim ascii As Boolean = payload.All(Function(b) b >= &H20 AndAlso b <= &H7E)
            Dim val As String = If(ascii, System.Text.Encoding.ASCII.GetString(payload),
                                  String.Join(" ", payload.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2"))))
            AppendResult("[RDBI] 0x" & respId.ToString("X3") & " DID=" & did & " → " & val)

        ElseIf data(0) = &H71 Then
            ' Routine Control 긍정 응답
            If data.Length >= 4 AndAlso data(2) = &H12 AndAlso
               (data(3) = &HA6 OrElse data(3) = &HA7) Then
                Dim side As String = If(data(3) = &HA6, "LH", "RH")

                If data(1) = &H1 Then
                    ' EDU 수락 응답 (71 01 12 A6/A7) - 로그만 남김
                    AppendResult("[EDU] " & side & " 리미트 세팅 명령 수락")

                ElseIf data(1) = &H3 AndAlso data.Length >= 5 Then
                    ' 학습체크 결과 응답 (71 03 12 A6/A7 XX)
                    If data(4) = &H2 Then
                        ' LH+RH EDU 시퀀스 활성 시 결과 저장
                        If _lhRhStep >= 0 Then _lhRhCheckResult = "OK"
                        StopEduCheck()
                        AppendResult("[학습체크] " & side & " 완료 (OK)")
                    ElseIf data(4) = &H1 Then
                        If _lhRhStep >= 0 Then _lhRhCheckResult = "NG"
                        StopEduCheck()
                        AppendResult("[학습체크] " & side & " NG")
                    End If
                End If
            Else
                AppendResult("[Routine] 0x" & respId.ToString("X3") & " OK → " & hex)
            End If

        ElseIf data(0) = &H7F AndAlso data.Length >= 3 Then
            ' NRC
            AppendResult("[NRC] 0x" & respId.ToString("X3") & " SID=0x" & data(1).ToString("X2") & " NRC=0x" & data(2).ToString("X2"))

        ElseIf data(0) = &H54 Then
            ' ClearDTC 긍정 응답
            AppendResult("[ClearDTC] 0x" & respId.ToString("X3") & " OK")

        Else
            AppendResult("[UDS] 0x" & respId.ToString("X3") & " → " & hex)
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub OnFrameDecoded(ByVal canId As UInteger, ByVal data As Byte())
        ' 필요 시 특정 ID 프레임 파싱 추가 가능
    End Sub

    ' NORMAL 모드 Job 이름 상수 (모터 반복 전송용)
    Private Const JOB_MOTOR As String = "NML_MOTOR"

    ' =========================================================
    '  모터 제어
    '  - PE: UDS IOControl 1회 전송 (AddJobOnce)
    '  - NORMAL: 0x4A5 500ms 주기 반복 전송 (AddJob) ← ThreadTask3 방식
    ' =========================================================

    ''' <summary>NORMAL 모드: 기존 모터 Job 제거 후 새 모터 Job 등록 (500ms 반복)</summary>
    Private Sub NormalMotorJob(ByVal data As Byte())
        _can.RemoveJob(JOB_MOTOR)
        _can.AddJob(JOB_MOTOR, &H4A5, 500, data(0), data(1), data(2), data(3), data(4), data(5), data(6), data(7))
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnRlFwd_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRlFwd.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RL FWD")
        If _mode = "PE" Then
            _can.AddJobOnce("RL FWD", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H63, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        Else
            NormalMotorJob(New Byte() {&H0, &H0, &H8, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0})
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnRlBwd_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRlBwd.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RL BWD")
        If _mode = "PE" Then
            _can.AddJobOnce("RL BWD", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H64, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        Else
            NormalMotorJob(New Byte() {&H0, &H0, &H2, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0})
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnRrFwd_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRrFwd.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RR FWD")
        If _mode = "PE" Then
            _can.AddJobOnce("RR FWD", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H43, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        Else
            NormalMotorJob(New Byte() {&H0, &H0, &H80, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0})
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnRrBwd_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRrBwd.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RR BWD")
        If _mode = "PE" Then
            _can.AddJobOnce("RR BWD", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H44, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        Else
            NormalMotorJob(New Byte() {&H0, &H0, &H20, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0})
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnStop_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnStop.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("전체 STOP")

        ' 모든 진행 중 타이머 중지
        tmrVent.Stop()
        _ventSide = ""
        StopEduCheck()

        If _mode = "PE" Then
            ' RL STOP
            _can.AddJobOnce("RL STOP1", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H63, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            _can.AddJobOnce("RL STOP2", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H64, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            ' RR STOP
            _can.AddJobOnce("RR STOP1", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H43, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            _can.AddJobOnce("RR STOP2", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H44, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        Else
            ' 반복 중인 모든 Job 제거 (모터, EDU, 벤트 등)
            _can.RemoveJob(JOB_MOTOR)
            _can.RemoveJob("LH_EDU_1")
            _can.RemoveJob("RH_EDU_1")
            _can.RemoveJob("NML_LH_STOP")
            _can.RemoveJob("NML_RH_STOP")
            ' LH STOP + RH STOP (원본: 2회 보내고 중단)
            _can.AddJob("NML_LH_STOP", &H4A5, 500, &H0, &H0, &H4, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            _can.AddJob("NML_RH_STOP", &H4A5, 500, &H0, &H0, &H40, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            ' 1.2초 후 STOP Job도 제거 (원본: CanCount>=2 → CanSTep=0)
            tmrStopDelay.Start()
        End If
    End Sub

    ' =========================================================
    '  벤트
    ' =========================================================

    Private Sub btnRlVent_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRlVent.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RL VENT ON")
        If _mode = "PE" Then
            _can.AddJob32("RL_VENT_ON", &H49B, 500,
                          &HFF, &HFF, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H5,
                          &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H10,
                          &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                          &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        Else
            ' NORMAL 벤트 시퀀스 시작
            StartVentSequence("LH")
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnRrVent_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRrVent.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RR VENT ON")
        If _mode = "PE" Then
            _can.AddJob32("RR_VENT_ON", &H49B, 500,
                          &HFF, &HFF, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                          &H0, &H5, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H10,
                          &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                          &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        Else
            ' NORMAL 벤트 시퀀스 시작
            StartVentSequence("RH")
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnVentOff_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnVentOff.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("VENT OFF")
        If _mode = "PE" Then
            _can.AddJobOnce32("VENT_OFF", &H49B,
                              &HFF, &HFF, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                              &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                              &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                              &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        Else
            ' NORMAL 벤트 중지
            tmrVent.Stop()
            _ventSide = ""
            ' 모터 Job도 제거
            _can.RemoveJob(JOB_MOTOR)
            ' STOP 메시지 전송 (반복 2회 후 중단)
            _can.AddJob("NML_LH_STOP", &H4A5, 500, &H0, &H0, &H4, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            _can.AddJob("NML_RH_STOP", &H4A5, 500, &H0, &H0, &H40, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            ' 1.2초 후 STOP Job도 제거 (원본: CanCount>=2 → CanSTep=0)
            tmrStopDelay.Start()
        End If
    End Sub

    ' ===== NORMAL 벤트 시퀀스 (Timer) =====

    Private Sub StartVentSequence(ByVal side As String)
        tmrVent.Stop()
        _ventSide = side
        _ventStep = 0
        tmrVent.Interval = 500
        tmrVent.Start()
    End Sub

    Private Sub tmrVent_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmrVent.Tick
        If _can Is Nothing OrElse String.IsNullOrEmpty(_ventSide) Then
            tmrVent.Stop()
            Return
        End If

        Select Case _ventStep
            Case 0
                ' STOP
                If _ventSide = "LH" Then
                    _can.AddJobOnce("V_STOP", &H4A5, &H0, &H0, &H4, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                Else
                    _can.AddJobOnce("V_STOP", &H4A5, &H0, &H0, &H40, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                End If
                _ventStep = 1

            Case 1
                ' 3E0 초기화
                _can.AddJobOnce("V_3E0_INIT", &H3E0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                _ventStep = 2

            Case 2
                ' 3E0 활성화
                _can.AddJobOnce("V_3E0_ACT", &H3E0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H50, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                _ventStep = 3

            Case 3
                ' 4A2
                If _ventSide = "LH" Then
                    _can.AddJobOnce("V_4A2", &H4A2, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H50, &H0, &H0)
                Else
                    _can.AddJobOnce("V_4A2", &H4A2, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H5, &H0, &H0)
                End If
                _ventStep = 4

            Case 4
                ' 418
                _can.AddJobOnce("V_418", &H418, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H10, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                _ventStep = 5

            Case 5
                ' 3E0 반복 (→ step4로 돌아감)
                _can.AddJobOnce("V_3E0_RPT", &H3E0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H50, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                _ventStep = 4

        End Select
    End Sub

    ' NORMAL 학습 체크: 2개 메시지 교대 반복 (원본 ThreadTask3 방식)
    Private _eduCheckSide As String = ""
    Private _eduCheckStep As Integer = 0
    Private _eduCheckCount As Integer = 0   ' 트라이 횟수
    Private Const EDU_CHECK_MAX_TRY As Integer = 5

    Private Sub StartEduCheck(ByVal side As String)
        tmrEduCheck.Stop()
        _eduCheckSide = side
        _eduCheckStep = 0
        _eduCheckCount = 0
        tmrEduCheck.Interval = 500
        tmrEduCheck.Start()
    End Sub

    Private Sub StopEduCheck()
        tmrEduCheck.Stop()
        _eduCheckSide = ""
        _eduCheckCount = 0
    End Sub

    Private Sub tmrEduCheck_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmrEduCheck.Tick
        If _can Is Nothing OrElse String.IsNullOrEmpty(_eduCheckSide) Then
            tmrEduCheck.Stop()
            Return
        End If

        Dim did1 As Byte = If(_eduCheckSide = "LH", CByte(&HA6), CByte(&HA7))

        If _eduCheckStep = 0 Then
            ' 31 01 12 A6/A7 F0 (학습 체크 요청)
            _can.AddJobOnce("EDU_CHK_A", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, did1, &HF0, &H0, &H0)
            _eduCheckStep = 1
        Else
            ' 31 03 12 A6/A7 (학습 결과 조회)
            _can.AddJobOnce("EDU_CHK_B", &H731, &H4, &H31, &H3, &H12, did1, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            _eduCheckStep = 0
            _eduCheckCount += 1
            ' 5회 트라이 후 응답 없으면 NG
            If _eduCheckCount >= EDU_CHECK_MAX_TRY Then
                Dim side = _eduCheckSide
                StopEduCheck()
                AppendResult("[학습체크] " & side & " NG (응답 없음)")
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>타이머: Module1의 전압/전류 값을 라벨에 표시</summary>

    ''' <summary>전압 ON/OFF 토글 (0V ↔ 기존 TargetVolt)</summary>
    Private Sub btnVoltToggle_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnVoltToggle.Click
        If Module1.TargetVolt > 0 Then
            ' 현재 ON → 0V로 (전원 차단)
            Module1.TargetVolt = 0
        Else
            ' 현재 OFF → 원래 전압으로 복원
            Module1.TargetVolt = _savedVolt
        End If
        UpdateVoltToggleButton()
    End Sub

    Private Sub UpdateVoltToggleButton()
        If Module1.TargetVolt > 0 Then
            btnVoltToggle.Text = "ON " & Module1.TargetVolt.ToString("F1") & "V"
            btnVoltToggle.BackColor = System.Drawing.Color.LightGreen
        Else
            btnVoltToggle.Text = "OFF 0V"
            btnVoltToggle.BackColor = System.Drawing.Color.LightCoral
        End If
    End Sub

    ' =========================================================
    '  LH+RH EDU 자동 시퀀스 (리미트 세팅 + 학습체크)
    '  동시 모드: LH+RH 동시 전송 → 전류 정지 감지 → 학습체크
    ' =========================================================

    Private _lhRhStep As Integer = -1         ' -1 = 비활성
    Private _lhRhTime As New Stopwatch()
    Private _lhRhCalcCount As Integer = 0     ' 정지 감지 카운터
    Private _lhRhCheckResult As String = ""   ' 학습체크 UDS 응답 ("OK"/"NG"/"")
    Private _lhRhCheckCount As Integer = 0    ' 학습체크 재시도 횟수
    Private _lhRhLastLogSec As Integer = -1   ' 마지막 전류 로그 시간(초)

    Private Sub btnLhRhEdu_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnLhRhEdu.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return

        ' 기존 체크 중이면 정지
        StopEduCheck()

        AppendResult("========================================")
        AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] === 리미트 세팅 시작 ===")

        ' LH EDU 연속전송 (500ms 주기)
        AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] LH EDU 연속전송 시작 (500ms)")
        _can.AddJob("LHRH_EDU_LH", &H731, 500, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA6, &H42, &H0, &H0)

        _lhRhStep = 1
        _lhRhCalcCount = 0
        _lhRhLastLogSec = -1
        _lhRhTime.Restart()
        tmrLhRhEdu.Start()
    End Sub

    Private Sub tmrLhRhEdu_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmrLhRhEdu.Tick
        If _can Is Nothing Then
            StopLhRhEdu()
            Return
        End If

        Dim amp As Double = Module1.ValueAmp1
        Dim sec As Integer = CInt(Math.Floor(_lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds))

        Select Case _lhRhStep

            Case 1
                ' LH 시작 대기 (전류 > 2.5A)
                If sec <> _lhRhLastLogSec Then
                    _lhRhLastLogSec = sec
                    AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] LH 시작 대기... Amp={amp:F2}A ({sec}초)")
                End If
                If amp > 2.5 Then
                    AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] ★ LH 시작 감지 (Amp={amp:F2}A)")
                    ' RH EDU 연속전송 추가 (500ms 주기)
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] RH EDU 연속전송 시작 (500ms)")
                    _can.AddJob("LHRH_EDU_RH", &H731, 500, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA7, &H42, &H0, &H0)
                    _lhRhTime.Restart()
                    _lhRhLastLogSec = -1
                    _lhRhStep = 2
                End If
                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 30 Then
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] LH 시작 타임아웃 (30초)")
                    _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_LH")
                    StopLhRhEdu()
                End If

            Case 2
                ' RH 추가 시작 대기 (전류 > 5A = 둘 다 동작)
                If sec <> _lhRhLastLogSec Then
                    _lhRhLastLogSec = sec
                    AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] RH 시작 대기... Amp={amp:F2}A ({sec}초)")
                End If
                If amp > 5 Then
                    _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_LH")
                    _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_RH")
                    AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] ★ LH+RH 모두 시작 (Amp={amp:F2}A) → EDU 전송 중단")
                    _lhRhCalcCount = 0
                    _lhRhTime.Restart()
                    _lhRhLastLogSec = -1
                    _lhRhStep = 3
                End If
                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 30 Then
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] RH 시작 타임아웃 (30초)")
                    _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_LH")
                    _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_RH")
                    StopLhRhEdu()
                End If

            Case 3
                ' 모터 정지 대기 (전류 < 0.3A = LH+RH 둘 다 완료)
                If sec <> _lhRhLastLogSec Then
                    _lhRhLastLogSec = sec
                    AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] 동작 중... Amp={amp:F2}A ({sec}초)")
                End If
                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 2 Then
                    If amp < 0.3 Then
                        _lhRhCalcCount += 1
                    Else
                        _lhRhCalcCount = 0
                    End If
                    If _lhRhCalcCount >= 5 Then
                        _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_LH")
                        _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_RH")
                        AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] ★ 모터 정지 (LH+RH 학습 완료, Amp={amp:F2}A, {sec}초)")
                        _lhRhTime.Restart()
                        _lhRhLastLogSec = -1
                        _lhRhStep = 10
                    End If
                End If
                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 60 Then
                    _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_LH")
                    _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_RH")
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] 정지 타임아웃 (60초)")
                    StopLhRhEdu()
                End If

            ' ─── LH 학습체크 (31 01 → 31 03 교대) ───
            Case 10
                ' 1초 대기 후 시작
                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 1 Then
                    _lhRhCheckResult = ""
                    _lhRhCheckCount = 0
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] === LH 학습체크 시작 ===")
                    _lhRhStep = 11
                End If

            Case 11
                ' LH 학습체크 요청 (31 01 12 A6 F0)
                _lhRhCheckCount += 1
                AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] LH 학습체크 요청 (시도 {_lhRhCheckCount}/5)")
                _can.AddJobOnce("LHRH_CHK_LH_A", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA6, &HF0, &H0, &H0)
                _lhRhTime.Restart()
                _lhRhStep = 12

            Case 12
                ' 500ms 대기 후 학습결과 조회
                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalMilliseconds >= 500 Then
                    _lhRhCheckResult = ""
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] LH 학습결과 조회 (31 03 12 A6)")
                    _can.AddJobOnce("LHRH_CHK_LH_B", &H731, &H4, &H31, &H3, &H12, &HA6, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    _lhRhTime.Restart()
                    _lhRhStep = 13
                End If

            Case 13
                ' LH 응답 대기
                If _lhRhCheckResult = "OK" Then
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] ★ LH 학습체크 OK")
                    _lhRhTime.Restart()
                    _lhRhStep = 20
                ElseIf _lhRhCheckResult = "NG" Then
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] ★ LH 학습체크 NG")
                    _lhRhTime.Restart()
                    _lhRhStep = 20
                ElseIf _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 2 Then
                    AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] LH 응답 없음 ({_lhRhCheckCount}/5)")
                    If _lhRhCheckCount >= 5 Then
                        AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] ★ LH 학습체크 NG (응답 없음)")
                        _lhRhTime.Restart()
                        _lhRhStep = 20
                    Else
                        _lhRhStep = 11
                    End If
                End If

            ' ─── RH 학습체크 ───
            Case 20
                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 0.5 Then
                    _lhRhCheckResult = ""
                    _lhRhCheckCount = 0
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] === RH 학습체크 시작 ===")
                    _lhRhStep = 21
                End If

            Case 21
                ' RH 학습체크 요청 (31 01 12 A7 F0)
                _lhRhCheckCount += 1
                AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] RH 학습체크 요청 (시도 {_lhRhCheckCount}/5)")
                _can.AddJobOnce("LHRH_CHK_RH_A", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA7, &HF0, &H0, &H0)
                _lhRhTime.Restart()
                _lhRhStep = 22

            Case 22
                ' 500ms 대기 후 학습결과 조회
                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalMilliseconds >= 500 Then
                    _lhRhCheckResult = ""
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] RH 학습결과 조회 (31 03 12 A7)")
                    _can.AddJobOnce("LHRH_CHK_RH_B", &H731, &H4, &H31, &H3, &H12, &HA7, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    _lhRhTime.Restart()
                    _lhRhStep = 23
                End If

            Case 23
                ' RH 응답 대기
                If _lhRhCheckResult = "OK" Then
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] ★ RH 학습체크 OK")
                    _lhRhStep = 99
                ElseIf _lhRhCheckResult = "NG" Then
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] ★ RH 학습체크 NG")
                    _lhRhStep = 99
                ElseIf _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 2 Then
                    AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] RH 응답 없음 ({_lhRhCheckCount}/5)")
                    If _lhRhCheckCount >= 5 Then
                        AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] ★ RH 학습체크 NG (응답 없음)")
                        _lhRhStep = 99
                    Else
                        _lhRhStep = 21
                    End If
                End If

            Case 99
                AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] === 시퀀스 완료 ===")
                AppendResult("========================================")
                StopLhRhEdu()

        End Select
    End Sub

    Private Sub StopLhRhEdu()
        tmrLhRhEdu.Stop()
        _lhRhStep = -1
        _lhRhTime.Stop()
        If _can IsNot Nothing Then
            _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_LH")
            _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_RH")
        End If
    End Sub

End Class

﻿Imports System.Linq
Imports Peak.Can.Basic

Public Class FrmCanFd

    Private _can As CanBusService
    Private _isConnected As Boolean

    ' NORMAL 벤트 시퀀스 상태
    Private _ventSide As String = ""    ' "LH", "RH", ""
    Private _ventStep As Integer = 0

    ' ===== 폼 이벤트 =====

    Private Sub FrmCanFd_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load
        Me.Text = "CAN 테스트 - [" & _mode & "]"

        ' 모드별 패널 표시/숨기기
        If _mode = "PE" Then
            grpUds.Visible = True
            grpNormal.Visible = False
        Else
            grpUds.Visible = False
            grpNormal.Visible = True
        End If

        ' 파워서플라이: 원래 전압 저장 & 타이머 시작
        _savedVolt = Module1.TargetVolt
        UpdateVoltToggleButton()
        tmrSupply.Start()

        SetButtonsEnabled(False)
    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmCanFd_FormClosing(sender As Object, e As Windows.Forms.FormClosingEventArgs) Handles MyBase.FormClosing
        tmrSupply.Stop()
        DoCanClose()
    End Sub

    ' ===== 버튼 활성화 제어 =====

    Private Sub SetButtonsEnabled(ByVal enabled As Boolean)
        grpMotor.Enabled = enabled
        grpVent.Enabled = enabled
        grpUds.Enabled = enabled
        grpNormal.Enabled = enabled
        btnCanOpen.Enabled = Not enabled
        btnCanClose.Enabled = enabled
    End Sub

    ' ===== 로그 =====

    Private Sub AppendLog(ByVal msg As String)
        If txtLog.InvokeRequired Then
            txtLog.BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() AppendLog(msg)))
            Return
        End If
        ' 로그 길이 제한
        If txtLog.TextLength > 50000 Then
            txtLog.Text = txtLog.Text.Substring(txtLog.TextLength - 30000)
        End If
        txtLog.AppendText(msg & vbCrLf)
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>좌측 하단 결과 표시 (UDS 응답 전용)</summary>
    Private Sub AppendResult(ByVal msg As String)
        If txtResult.InvokeRequired Then
            txtResult.BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() AppendResult(msg)))
            Return
        End If
        If txtResult.TextLength > 10000 Then
            txtResult.Text = txtResult.Text.Substring(txtResult.TextLength - 5000)
        End If
        txtResult.AppendText(msg & vbCrLf)
    End Sub

    Private Sub UpdateStatus(ByVal msg As String)
        If StatusStrip1.InvokeRequired Then
            StatusStrip1.BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() UpdateStatus(msg)))
            Return
        End If
        lblStatus.Text = msg
    End Sub

    ' ===== CAN Open / Close =====

    Private Sub btnCanOpen_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnCanOpen.Click
        Try
            Dim isFd As Boolean = (_mode = "PE")
            _can = New CanBusService(PCANBasic.PCAN_USBBUS1, isFd)

            ' 이벤트 핸들러 연결
            AddHandler _can.Log, Sub(s) AppendLog(s)
            AddHandler _can.Error, Sub(errSt) AppendLog("[오류] " & errSt.ToString())
            AddHandler _can.UdsCompleted, AddressOf OnUdsCompleted
            AddHandler _can.FrameDecoded, AddressOf OnFrameDecoded

            _can.LogAllRawTxFrames = True
            _can.LogAllRawRxFrames = True

            Dim st As TPCANStatus
            If isFd Then
                st = _can.Init()  ' FD 기본 bitrate
            Else
                st = _can.Init("") ' 500K 표준 (Init 내부에서 _isFd=False면 500K)
            End If

            If st <> TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_OK Then
                AppendLog("CAN 초기화 실패: " & st.ToString())
                _can.Dispose()
                _can = Nothing
                Return
            End If

            _can.StartPolling()
            _isConnected = True
            SetButtonsEnabled(True)
            UpdateStatus("연결됨 [" & _mode & "]")
            AppendLog("=== CAN " & _mode & " 연결 완료 ===")

            '' NORMAL 모드: NM 게이트웨이 Alive 주기 전송 (ECU 슬립 방지) - 테스트용 비활성화
            'If _mode = "NORMAL" Then
            '    _can.AddJob("NM_ALIVE", &H570, 200, &H70, &H1, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            '    AppendLog("NM Alive 자동 전송 시작 (0x570, 200ms)")
            'End If

        Catch ex As Exception
            AppendLog("[예외] " & ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnCanClose_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnCanClose.Click
        DoCanClose()
    End Sub

    Private Sub tmrStopDelay_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmrStopDelay.Tick
        tmrStopDelay.Stop()
        If _can IsNot Nothing Then
            _can.RemoveJob("NML_LH_STOP")
            _can.RemoveJob("NML_RH_STOP")
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub DoCanClose()
        tmrVent.Stop()
        tmrEduCheck.Stop()
        tmrLhRhEdu.Stop()
        tmrStopDelay.Stop()
        _ventSide = ""
        _eduCheckSide = ""
        If _can IsNot Nothing Then
            Try
                _can.Dispose()
            Catch
            End Try
            _can = Nothing
        End If
        _isConnected = False
        SetButtonsEnabled(False)
        UpdateStatus("연결 해제")
        AppendLog("=== CAN 연결 해제 ===")
    End Sub

    ' ===== UDS 응답 처리 =====

    Private Sub OnUdsCompleted(ByVal respId As UInteger, ByVal data As Byte())
        If data Is Nothing OrElse data.Length = 0 Then Return

        Dim hex As String = String.Join(" ", data.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2")))

        If data(0) = &H62 AndAlso data.Length >= 4 Then
            ' RDBI 긍정 응답
            Dim did As String = data(1).ToString("X2") & data(2).ToString("X2")
            Dim payload = data.Skip(3).ToArray()
            Dim ascii As Boolean = payload.All(Function(b) b >= &H20 AndAlso b <= &H7E)
            Dim val As String = If(ascii, System.Text.Encoding.ASCII.GetString(payload),
                                  String.Join(" ", payload.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2"))))
            AppendResult("[RDBI] 0x" & respId.ToString("X3") & " DID=" & did & " → " & val)

        ElseIf data(0) = &H71 Then
            ' Routine Control 긍정 응답
            If data.Length >= 4 AndAlso data(2) = &H12 AndAlso
               (data(3) = &HA6 OrElse data(3) = &HA7) Then
                Dim side As String = If(data(3) = &HA6, "LH", "RH")

                If data(1) = &H1 Then
                    ' EDU 수락 응답 (71 01 12 A6/A7) - 로그만 남김
                    AppendResult("[EDU] " & side & " 리미트 세팅 명령 수락")

                ElseIf data(1) = &H3 AndAlso data.Length >= 5 Then
                    ' 학습체크 결과 응답 (71 03 12 A6/A7 XX)
                    If data(4) = &H2 Then
                        ' LH+RH EDU 시퀀스 활성 시 결과 저장
                        If _lhRhStep >= 0 Then _lhRhCheckResult = "OK"
                        StopEduCheck()
                        AppendResult("[학습체크] " & side & " 완료 (OK)")
                    ElseIf data(4) = &H1 Then
                        If _lhRhStep >= 0 Then _lhRhCheckResult = "NG"
                        StopEduCheck()
                        AppendResult("[학습체크] " & side & " NG")
                    End If
                End If
            Else
                AppendResult("[Routine] 0x" & respId.ToString("X3") & " OK → " & hex)
            End If

        ElseIf data(0) = &H7F AndAlso data.Length >= 3 Then
            ' NRC
            AppendResult("[NRC] 0x" & respId.ToString("X3") & " SID=0x" & data(1).ToString("X2") & " NRC=0x" & data(2).ToString("X2"))

        ElseIf data(0) = &H54 Then
            ' ClearDTC 긍정 응답
            AppendResult("[ClearDTC] 0x" & respId.ToString("X3") & " OK")

        Else
            AppendResult("[UDS] 0x" & respId.ToString("X3") & " → " & hex)
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub OnFrameDecoded(ByVal canId As UInteger, ByVal data As Byte())
        ' 필요 시 특정 ID 프레임 파싱 추가 가능
    End Sub

    ' NORMAL 모드 Job 이름 상수 (모터 반복 전송용)
    Private Const JOB_MOTOR As String = "NML_MOTOR"

    ' =========================================================
    '  모터 제어
    '  - PE: UDS IOControl 1회 전송 (AddJobOnce)
    '  - NORMAL: 0x4A5 500ms 주기 반복 전송 (AddJob) ← ThreadTask3 방식
    ' =========================================================

    ''' <summary>NORMAL 모드: 기존 모터 Job 제거 후 새 모터 Job 등록 (500ms 반복)</summary>
    Private Sub NormalMotorJob(ByVal data As Byte())
        _can.RemoveJob(JOB_MOTOR)
        _can.AddJob(JOB_MOTOR, &H4A5, 500, data(0), data(1), data(2), data(3), data(4), data(5), data(6), data(7))
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnRlFwd_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRlFwd.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RL FWD")
        If _mode = "PE" Then
            _can.AddJobOnce("RL FWD", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H63, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        Else
            NormalMotorJob(New Byte() {&H0, &H0, &H8, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0})
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnRlBwd_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRlBwd.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RL BWD")
        If _mode = "PE" Then
            _can.AddJobOnce("RL BWD", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H64, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        Else
            NormalMotorJob(New Byte() {&H0, &H0, &H2, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0})
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnRrFwd_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRrFwd.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RR FWD")
        If _mode = "PE" Then
            _can.AddJobOnce("RR FWD", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H43, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        Else
            NormalMotorJob(New Byte() {&H0, &H0, &H80, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0})
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnRrBwd_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRrBwd.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RR BWD")
        If _mode = "PE" Then
            _can.AddJobOnce("RR BWD", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H44, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        Else
            NormalMotorJob(New Byte() {&H0, &H0, &H20, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0})
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnStop_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnStop.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("전체 STOP")

        ' 모든 진행 중 타이머 중지
        tmrVent.Stop()
        _ventSide = ""
        StopEduCheck()

        If _mode = "PE" Then
            ' RL STOP
            _can.AddJobOnce("RL STOP1", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H63, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            _can.AddJobOnce("RL STOP2", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H64, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            ' RR STOP
            _can.AddJobOnce("RR STOP1", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H43, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            _can.AddJobOnce("RR STOP2", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H44, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        Else
            ' 반복 중인 모든 Job 제거 (모터, EDU, 벤트 등)
            _can.RemoveJob(JOB_MOTOR)
            _can.RemoveJob("LH_EDU_1")
            _can.RemoveJob("RH_EDU_1")
            _can.RemoveJob("NML_LH_STOP")
            _can.RemoveJob("NML_RH_STOP")
            ' LH STOP + RH STOP (원본: 2회 보내고 중단)
            _can.AddJob("NML_LH_STOP", &H4A5, 500, &H0, &H0, &H4, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            _can.AddJob("NML_RH_STOP", &H4A5, 500, &H0, &H0, &H40, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            ' 1.2초 후 STOP Job도 제거 (원본: CanCount>=2 → CanSTep=0)
            tmrStopDelay.Start()
        End If
    End Sub

    ' =========================================================
    '  벤트
    ' =========================================================

    Private Sub btnRlVent_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRlVent.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RL VENT ON")
        If _mode = "PE" Then
            _can.AddJob32("RL_VENT_ON", &H49B, 500,
                          &HFF, &HFF, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H5,
                          &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H10,
                          &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                          &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        Else
            ' NORMAL 벤트 시퀀스 시작
            StartVentSequence("LH")
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnRrVent_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRrVent.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RR VENT ON")
        If _mode = "PE" Then
            _can.AddJob32("RR_VENT_ON", &H49B, 500,
                          &HFF, &HFF, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                          &H0, &H5, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H10,
                          &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                          &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        Else
            ' NORMAL 벤트 시퀀스 시작
            StartVentSequence("RH")
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnVentOff_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnVentOff.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("VENT OFF")
        If _mode = "PE" Then
            _can.AddJobOnce32("VENT_OFF", &H49B,
                              &HFF, &HFF, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                              &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                              &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                              &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        Else
            ' NORMAL 벤트 중지
            tmrVent.Stop()
            _ventSide = ""
            ' 모터 Job도 제거
            _can.RemoveJob(JOB_MOTOR)
            ' STOP 메시지 전송 (반복 2회 후 중단)
            _can.AddJob("NML_LH_STOP", &H4A5, 500, &H0, &H0, &H4, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            _can.AddJob("NML_RH_STOP", &H4A5, 500, &H0, &H0, &H40, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            ' 1.2초 후 STOP Job도 제거 (원본: CanCount>=2 → CanSTep=0)
            tmrStopDelay.Start()
        End If
    End Sub

    ' ===== NORMAL 벤트 시퀀스 (Timer) =====

    Private Sub StartVentSequence(ByVal side As String)
        tmrVent.Stop()
        _ventSide = side
        _ventStep = 0
        tmrVent.Interval = 500
        tmrVent.Start()
    End Sub

    Private Sub tmrVent_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmrVent.Tick
        If _can Is Nothing OrElse String.IsNullOrEmpty(_ventSide) Then
            tmrVent.Stop()
            Return
        End If

        Select Case _ventStep
            Case 0
                ' STOP
                If _ventSide = "LH" Then
                    _can.AddJobOnce("V_STOP", &H4A5, &H0, &H0, &H4, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                Else
                    _can.AddJobOnce("V_STOP", &H4A5, &H0, &H0, &H40, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                End If
                _ventStep = 1

            Case 1
                ' 3E0 초기화
                _can.AddJobOnce("V_3E0_INIT", &H3E0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                _ventStep = 2

            Case 2
                ' 3E0 활성화
                _can.AddJobOnce("V_3E0_ACT", &H3E0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H50, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                _ventStep = 3

            Case 3
                ' 4A2
                If _ventSide = "LH" Then
                    _can.AddJobOnce("V_4A2", &H4A2, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H50, &H0, &H0)
                Else
                    _can.AddJobOnce("V_4A2", &H4A2, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H5, &H0, &H0)
                End If
                _ventStep = 4

            Case 4
                ' 418
                _can.AddJobOnce("V_418", &H418, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H10, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                _ventStep = 5

            Case 5
                ' 3E0 반복 (→ step4로 돌아감)
                _can.AddJobOnce("V_3E0_RPT", &H3E0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H50, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                _ventStep = 4

        End Select
    End Sub

    ' =========================================================
    '  UDS / 진단 (PE 전용)
    ' =========================================================

    Private Sub btnSession_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnSession.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("Session Start (Extended)")
        _can.AddJobOnce("Session", &H731, &H2, &H10, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnTp_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnTp.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("Tester Present 시작 (2초 주기)")
        _can.AddJob("TP", &H731, 2000, &H2, &H3E, &H80, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnSwVer_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnSwVer.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("Request SW Version (DID F1B1)")
        _can.AddJobOnce("SW_VER", &H731, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &HB1, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

        _can.RemoveJob("LH_EDU")

    End Sub

        _can.RemoveJob("RH_EDU")
        StartEduCheck("RH")
    End Sub

    ' NORMAL 학습 체크: 2개 메시지 교대 반복 (원본 ThreadTask3 방식)
    Private _eduCheckSide As String = ""
    Private _eduCheckStep As Integer = 0
    Private _eduCheckCount As Integer = 0   ' 트라이 횟수
    Private Const EDU_CHECK_MAX_TRY As Integer = 5

    Private Sub StartEduCheck(ByVal side As String)
        tmrEduCheck.Stop()
        _eduCheckSide = side
        _eduCheckStep = 0
        _eduCheckCount = 0
        tmrEduCheck.Interval = 500
        tmrEduCheck.Start()
    End Sub

    Private Sub StopEduCheck()
        tmrEduCheck.Stop()
        _eduCheckSide = ""
        _eduCheckCount = 0
    End Sub

    Private Sub tmrEduCheck_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmrEduCheck.Tick
        If _can Is Nothing OrElse String.IsNullOrEmpty(_eduCheckSide) Then
            tmrEduCheck.Stop()
            Return
        End If

        Dim did1 As Byte = If(_eduCheckSide = "LH", CByte(&HA6), CByte(&HA7))

        If _eduCheckStep = 0 Then
            ' 31 01 12 A6/A7 F0 (학습 체크 요청)
            _can.AddJobOnce("EDU_CHK_A", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, did1, &HF0, &H0, &H0)
            _eduCheckStep = 1
        Else
            ' 31 03 12 A6/A7 (학습 결과 조회)
            _can.AddJobOnce("EDU_CHK_B", &H731, &H4, &H31, &H3, &H12, did1, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            _eduCheckStep = 0
            _eduCheckCount += 1
            ' 5회 트라이 후 응답 없으면 NG
            If _eduCheckCount >= EDU_CHECK_MAX_TRY Then
                Dim side = _eduCheckSide
                StopEduCheck()
                AppendResult("[학습체크] " & side & " NG (응답 없음)")
            End If
        End If
    End Sub
