﻿Imports System.Linq
Imports Peak.Can.Basic

Public Class FrmCanFd

    Private _can As CanBusService
    Private _isConnected As Boolean

    ' NORMAL 벤트 시퀀스 상태
    Private _ventSide As String = ""    ' "LH", "RH", ""
    Private _ventStep As Integer = 0

    ' ===== 폼 이벤트 =====

    Private Sub FrmCanFd_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load
        Me.Text = "CAN 테스트 - [NORMAL]"

        ' NORMAL 전용: grpUds 숨기기
        grpUds.Visible = False
        grpNormal.Visible = True

        ' 파워서플라이: 원래 전압 저장 & 타이머 시작
        _savedVolt = Module1.TargetVolt
        UpdateVoltToggleButton()
        tmrSupply.Start()

        SetButtonsEnabled(False)
    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmCanFd_FormClosing(sender As Object, e As Windows.Forms.FormClosingEventArgs) Handles MyBase.FormClosing
        tmrSupply.Stop()
        DoCanClose()
    End Sub

    ' ===== 버튼 활성화 제어 =====

    Private Sub SetButtonsEnabled(ByVal enabled As Boolean)
        grpMotor.Enabled = enabled
        grpVent.Enabled = enabled
        grpUds.Enabled = enabled
        grpNormal.Enabled = enabled
        btnCanOpen.Enabled = Not enabled
        btnCanClose.Enabled = enabled
    End Sub

    ' ===== 로그 =====

    Private Sub AppendLog(ByVal msg As String)
        If txtLog.InvokeRequired Then
            txtLog.BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() AppendLog(msg)))
            Return
        End If
        ' 로그 길이 제한
        If txtLog.TextLength > 50000 Then
            txtLog.Text = txtLog.Text.Substring(txtLog.TextLength - 30000)
        End If
        txtLog.AppendText(msg & vbCrLf)
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>좌측 하단 결과 표시 (UDS 응답 전용)</summary>
    Private Sub AppendResult(ByVal msg As String)
        If txtResult.InvokeRequired Then
            txtResult.BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() AppendResult(msg)))
            Return
        End If
        If txtResult.TextLength > 10000 Then
            txtResult.Text = txtResult.Text.Substring(txtResult.TextLength - 5000)
        End If
        txtResult.AppendText(msg & vbCrLf)
    End Sub

    Private Sub UpdateStatus(ByVal msg As String)
        If StatusStrip1.InvokeRequired Then
            StatusStrip1.BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() UpdateStatus(msg)))
            Return
        End If
        lblStatus.Text = msg
    End Sub

    ' ===== CAN Open / Close =====

    Private Sub btnCanOpen_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnCanOpen.Click
        Try
            _can = New CanBusService(PCANBasic.PCAN_USBBUS1, False) ' 항상 CAN 2.0

            ' 이벤트 핸들러 연결
            AddHandler _can.Log, Sub(s) AppendLog(s)
            AddHandler _can.Error, Sub(errSt) AppendLog("[오류] " & errSt.ToString())
            AddHandler _can.UdsCompleted, AddressOf OnUdsCompleted
            AddHandler _can.FrameDecoded, AddressOf OnFrameDecoded

            _can.LogAllRawTxFrames = True
            _can.LogAllRawRxFrames = True

            Dim st As TPCANStatus = _can.Init("") ' 500K 표준

            If st <> TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_OK Then
                AppendLog("CAN 초기화 실패: " & st.ToString())
                _can.Dispose()
                _can = Nothing
                Return
            End If

            _can.StartPolling()
            _isConnected = True
            SetButtonsEnabled(True)
            UpdateStatus("연결됨 [NORMAL]")
            AppendLog("=== CAN NORMAL 연결 완료 ===")

            '' NORMAL 모드: NM 게이트웨이 Alive 주기 전송 (ECU 슬립 방지) - 테스트용 비활성화
            'If _mode = "NORMAL" Then
            '    _can.AddJob("NM_ALIVE", &H570, 200, &H70, &H1, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            '    AppendLog("NM Alive 자동 전송 시작 (0x570, 200ms)")
            'End If

        Catch ex As Exception
            AppendLog("[예외] " & ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnCanClose_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnCanClose.Click
        DoCanClose()
    End Sub

    Private Sub tmrStopDelay_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmrStopDelay.Tick
        tmrStopDelay.Stop()
        If _can IsNot Nothing Then
            _can.RemoveJob("NML_LH_STOP")
            _can.RemoveJob("NML_RH_STOP")
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub DoCanClose()
        tmrVent.Stop()
        tmrEduCheck.Stop()
        tmrLhRhEdu.Stop()
        tmrStopDelay.Stop()
        _ventSide = ""
        _eduCheckSide = ""
        If _can IsNot Nothing Then
            Try
                _can.Dispose()
            Catch
            End Try
            _can = Nothing
        End If
        _isConnected = False
        SetButtonsEnabled(False)
        UpdateStatus("연결 해제")
        AppendLog("=== CAN 연결 해제 ===")
    End Sub

    ' ===== UDS 응답 처리 =====

    Private Sub OnUdsCompleted(ByVal respId As UInteger, ByVal data As Byte())
        If data Is Nothing OrElse data.Length = 0 Then Return

        Dim hex As String = String.Join(" ", data.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2")))

        If data(0) = &H62 AndAlso data.Length >= 4 Then
            ' RDBI 긍정 응답
            Dim did As String = data(1).ToString("X2") & data(2).ToString("X2")
            Dim payload = data.Skip(3).ToArray()
            Dim ascii As Boolean = payload.All(Function(b) b >= &H20 AndAlso b <= &H7E)
            Dim val As String = If(ascii, System.Text.Encoding.ASCII.GetString(payload),
                                  String.Join(" ", payload.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2"))))
            AppendResult("[RDBI] 0x" & respId.ToString("X3") & " DID=" & did & " → " & val)

        ElseIf data(0) = &H71 Then
            ' Routine Control 긍정 응답
            If data.Length >= 4 AndAlso data(2) = &H12 AndAlso
               (data(3) = &HA6 OrElse data(3) = &HA7) Then
                Dim side As String = If(data(3) = &HA6, "LH", "RH")

                If data(1) = &H1 Then
                    ' EDU 수락 응답 (71 01 12 A6/A7) - 로그만 남김
                    AppendResult("[EDU] " & side & " 리미트 세팅 명령 수락")

                ElseIf data(1) = &H3 AndAlso data.Length >= 5 Then
                    ' 학습체크 결과 응답 (71 03 12 A6/A7 XX)
                    If data(4) = &H2 Then
                        ' LH+RH EDU 시퀀스 활성 시 결과 저장
                        If _lhRhStep >= 0 Then _lhRhCheckResult = "OK"
                        StopEduCheck()
                        AppendResult("[학습체크] " & side & " 완료 (OK)")
                    ElseIf data(4) = &H1 Then
                        If _lhRhStep >= 0 Then _lhRhCheckResult = "NG"
                        StopEduCheck()
                        AppendResult("[학습체크] " & side & " NG")
                    End If
                End If
            Else
                AppendResult("[Routine] 0x" & respId.ToString("X3") & " OK → " & hex)
            End If

        ElseIf data(0) = &H7F AndAlso data.Length >= 3 Then
            ' NRC
            AppendResult("[NRC] 0x" & respId.ToString("X3") & " SID=0x" & data(1).ToString("X2") & " NRC=0x" & data(2).ToString("X2"))

        ElseIf data(0) = &H54 Then
            ' ClearDTC 긍정 응답
            AppendResult("[ClearDTC] 0x" & respId.ToString("X3") & " OK")

        Else
            AppendResult("[UDS] 0x" & respId.ToString("X3") & " → " & hex)
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub OnFrameDecoded(ByVal canId As UInteger, ByVal data As Byte())
        ' 필요 시 특정 ID 프레임 파싱 추가 가능
    End Sub

    ' NORMAL 모드 Job 이름 상수 (모터 반복 전송용)
    Private Const JOB_MOTOR As String = "NML_MOTOR"

    ' =========================================================
    '  모터 제어
    '  - PE: UDS IOControl 1회 전송 (AddJobOnce)
    '  - NORMAL: 0x4A5 500ms 주기 반복 전송 (AddJob) ← ThreadTask3 방식
    ' =========================================================

    ''' <summary>NORMAL 모드: 기존 모터 Job 제거 후 새 모터 Job 등록 (500ms 반복)</summary>
    Private Sub NormalMotorJob(ByVal data As Byte())
        _can.RemoveJob(JOB_MOTOR)
        _can.AddJob(JOB_MOTOR, &H4A5, 500, data(0), data(1), data(2), data(3), data(4), data(5), data(6), data(7))
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnRlFwd_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRlFwd.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RL FWD")
        NormalMotorJob(New Byte() {&H0, &H0, &H8, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0})
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnRlBwd_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRlBwd.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RL BWD")
        NormalMotorJob(New Byte() {&H0, &H0, &H2, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0})
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnRrFwd_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRrFwd.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RR FWD")
        NormalMotorJob(New Byte() {&H0, &H0, &H80, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0})
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnRrBwd_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRrBwd.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RR BWD")
        NormalMotorJob(New Byte() {&H0, &H0, &H20, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0})
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnStop_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnStop.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("전체 STOP")

        ' 모든 진행 중 타이머 중지
        tmrVent.Stop()
        _ventSide = ""
        StopEduCheck()

        If _mode = "PE" Then
            ' RL STOP
            _can.AddJobOnce("RL STOP1", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H63, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            _can.AddJobOnce("RL STOP2", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H64, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            ' RR STOP
            _can.AddJobOnce("RR STOP1", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H43, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            _can.AddJobOnce("RR STOP2", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H44, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        Else
            ' 반복 중인 모든 Job 제거 (모터, EDU, 벤트 등)
            _can.RemoveJob(JOB_MOTOR)
            _can.RemoveJob("LH_EDU_1")
            _can.RemoveJob("RH_EDU_1")
            _can.RemoveJob("NML_LH_STOP")
            _can.RemoveJob("NML_RH_STOP")
            ' LH STOP + RH STOP (원본: 2회 보내고 중단)
            _can.AddJob("NML_LH_STOP", &H4A5, 500, &H0, &H0, &H4, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            _can.AddJob("NML_RH_STOP", &H4A5, 500, &H0, &H0, &H40, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            ' 1.2초 후 STOP Job도 제거 (원본: CanCount>=2 → CanSTep=0)
            tmrStopDelay.Start()
        End If
    End Sub

    ' =========================================================
    '  벤트
    ' =========================================================

    Private Sub btnRlVent_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRlVent.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RL VENT ON")
        If _mode = "PE" Then
            _can.AddJob32("RL_VENT_ON", &H49B, 500,
                          &HFF, &HFF, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H5,
                          &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H10,
                          &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                          &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        Else
            ' NORMAL 벤트 시퀀스 시작
            StartVentSequence("LH")
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnRrVent_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRrVent.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RR VENT ON")
        If _mode = "PE" Then
            _can.AddJob32("RR_VENT_ON", &H49B, 500,
                          &HFF, &HFF, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                          &H0, &H5, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H10,
                          &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                          &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        Else
            ' NORMAL 벤트 시퀀스 시작
            StartVentSequence("RH")
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnVentOff_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnVentOff.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("VENT OFF")
        If _mode = "PE" Then
            _can.AddJobOnce32("VENT_OFF", &H49B,
                              &HFF, &HFF, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                              &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                              &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                              &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        Else
            ' NORMAL 벤트 중지
            tmrVent.Stop()
            _ventSide = ""
            ' 모터 Job도 제거
            _can.RemoveJob(JOB_MOTOR)
            ' STOP 메시지 전송 (반복 2회 후 중단)
            _can.AddJob("NML_LH_STOP", &H4A5, 500, &H0, &H0, &H4, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            _can.AddJob("NML_RH_STOP", &H4A5, 500, &H0, &H0, &H40, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            ' 1.2초 후 STOP Job도 제거 (원본: CanCount>=2 → CanSTep=0)
            tmrStopDelay.Start()
        End If
    End Sub

    ' ===== NORMAL 벤트 시퀀스 (Timer) =====

    Private Sub StartVentSequence(ByVal side As String)
        tmrVent.Stop()
        _ventSide = side
        _ventStep = 0
        tmrVent.Interval = 500
        tmrVent.Start()
    End Sub

    Private Sub tmrVent_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmrVent.Tick
        If _can Is Nothing OrElse String.IsNullOrEmpty(_ventSide) Then
            tmrVent.Stop()
            Return
        End If

        Select Case _ventStep
            Case 0
                ' STOP
                If _ventSide = "LH" Then
                    _can.AddJobOnce("V_STOP", &H4A5, &H0, &H0, &H4, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                Else
                    _can.AddJobOnce("V_STOP", &H4A5, &H0, &H0, &H40, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                End If
                _ventStep = 1

            Case 1
                ' 3E0 초기화
                _can.AddJobOnce("V_3E0_INIT", &H3E0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                _ventStep = 2

            Case 2
                ' 3E0 활성화
                _can.AddJobOnce("V_3E0_ACT", &H3E0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H50, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                _ventStep = 3

            Case 3
                ' 4A2
                If _ventSide = "LH" Then
                    _can.AddJobOnce("V_4A2", &H4A2, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H50, &H0, &H0)
                Else
                    _can.AddJobOnce("V_4A2", &H4A2, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H5, &H0, &H0)
                End If
                _ventStep = 4

            Case 4
                ' 418
                _can.AddJobOnce("V_418", &H418, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H10, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                _ventStep = 5

            Case 5
                ' 3E0 반복 (→ step4로 돌아감)
                _can.AddJobOnce("V_3E0_RPT", &H3E0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H50, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                _ventStep = 4

        End Select
    End Sub

    ' NORMAL 학습 체크: 2개 메시지 교대 반복 (원본 ThreadTask3 방식)
    Private _eduCheckSide As String = ""
    Private _eduCheckStep As Integer = 0
    Private _eduCheckCount As Integer = 0   ' 트라이 횟수
    Private Const EDU_CHECK_MAX_TRY As Integer = 5

    Private Sub StartEduCheck(ByVal side As String)
        tmrEduCheck.Stop()
        _eduCheckSide = side
        _eduCheckStep = 0
        _eduCheckCount = 0
        tmrEduCheck.Interval = 500
        tmrEduCheck.Start()
    End Sub

    Private Sub StopEduCheck()
        tmrEduCheck.Stop()
        _eduCheckSide = ""
        _eduCheckCount = 0
    End Sub

    Private Sub tmrEduCheck_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmrEduCheck.Tick
        If _can Is Nothing OrElse String.IsNullOrEmpty(_eduCheckSide) Then
            tmrEduCheck.Stop()
            Return
        End If

        Dim did1 As Byte = If(_eduCheckSide = "LH", CByte(&HA6), CByte(&HA7))

        If _eduCheckStep = 0 Then
            ' 31 01 12 A6/A7 F0 (학습 체크 요청)
            _can.AddJobOnce("EDU_CHK_A", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, did1, &HF0, &H0, &H0)
            _eduCheckStep = 1
        Else
            ' 31 03 12 A6/A7 (학습 결과 조회)
            _can.AddJobOnce("EDU_CHK_B", &H731, &H4, &H31, &H3, &H12, did1, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            _eduCheckStep = 0
            _eduCheckCount += 1
            ' 5회 트라이 후 응답 없으면 NG
            If _eduCheckCount >= EDU_CHECK_MAX_TRY Then
                Dim side = _eduCheckSide
                StopEduCheck()
                AppendResult("[학습체크] " & side & " NG (응답 없음)")
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>타이머: Module1의 전압/전류 값을 라벨에 표시</summary>

    Private Sub btnVoltToggle_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnVoltToggle.Click
        If Module1.TargetVolt > 0 Then
            ' 현재 ON → 0V로 (전원 차단)
            Module1.TargetVolt = 0
        Else

            Module1.TargetVolt = _savedVolt
        End If
        UpdateVoltToggleButton()
    End Sub

    Private Sub UpdateVoltToggleButton()
        If Module1.TargetVolt > 0 Then
            btnVoltToggle.Text = "ON " & Module1.TargetVolt.ToString("F1") & "V"
            btnVoltToggle.BackColor = System.Drawing.Color.LightGreen
        Else
            btnVoltToggle.Text = "OFF 0V"
            btnVoltToggle.BackColor = System.Drawing.Color.LightCoral
        End If
    End Sub

    ' =========================================================
    '  LH+RH EDU 자동 시퀀스 (리미트 세팅 + 학습체크)
    '  동시 모드: LH+RH 동시 전송 → 전류 정지 감지 → 학습체크
    ' =========================================================

    Private _lhRhStep As Integer = -1         ' -1 = 비활성
    Private _lhRhTime As New Stopwatch()
    Private _lhRhCalcCount As Integer = 0     ' 정지 감지 카운터
    Private _lhRhCheckResult As String = ""   ' 학습체크 UDS 응답 ("OK"/"NG"/"")
    Private _lhRhCheckCount As Integer = 0    ' 학습체크 재시도 횟수
    Private _lhRhLastLogSec As Integer = -1   ' 마지막 전류 로그 시간(초)

    Private Sub btnLhRhEdu_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnLhRhEdu.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return

        ' 기존 체크 중이면 정지
        StopEduCheck()

        AppendResult("========================================")
        AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] === 리미트 세팅 시작 ===")

        ' LH EDU 연속전송 (500ms 주기)
        AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] LH EDU 연속전송 시작 (500ms)")
        _can.AddJob("LHRH_EDU_LH", &H731, 500, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA6, &H42, &H0, &H0)

        _lhRhStep = 1
        _lhRhCalcCount = 0
        _lhRhLastLogSec = -1
        _lhRhTime.Restart()
        tmrLhRhEdu.Start()
    End Sub

    Private Sub tmrLhRhEdu_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmrLhRhEdu.Tick
        If _can Is Nothing Then
            StopLhRhEdu()
            Return
        End If

        Dim amp As Double = Module1.ValueAmp1
        Dim sec As Integer = CInt(Math.Floor(_lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds))

        Select Case _lhRhStep

            Case 1
                ' LH 시작 대기 (전류 > 2.5A)
                If sec <> _lhRhLastLogSec Then
                    _lhRhLastLogSec = sec
                    AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] LH 시작 대기... Amp={amp:F2}A ({sec}초)")
                End If
                If amp > 2.5 Then
                    AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] ★ LH 시작 감지 (Amp={amp:F2}A)")
                    ' RH EDU 연속전송 추가 (500ms 주기)
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] RH EDU 연속전송 시작 (500ms)")
                    _can.AddJob("LHRH_EDU_RH", &H731, 500, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA7, &H42, &H0, &H0)
                    _lhRhTime.Restart()
                    _lhRhLastLogSec = -1
                    _lhRhStep = 2
                End If
                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 30 Then
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] LH 시작 타임아웃 (30초)")
                    _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_LH")
                    StopLhRhEdu()
                End If

            Case 2
                ' RH 추가 시작 대기 (전류 > 5A = 둘 다 동작)
                If sec <> _lhRhLastLogSec Then
                    _lhRhLastLogSec = sec
                    AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] RH 시작 대기... Amp={amp:F2}A ({sec}초)")
                End If
                If amp > 5 Then
                    _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_LH")
                    _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_RH")
                    AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] ★ LH+RH 모두 시작 (Amp={amp:F2}A) → EDU 전송 중단")
                    _lhRhCalcCount = 0
                    _lhRhTime.Restart()
                    _lhRhLastLogSec = -1
                    _lhRhStep = 3
                End If
                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 30 Then
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] RH 시작 타임아웃 (30초)")
                    _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_LH")
                    _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_RH")
                    StopLhRhEdu()
                End If

            Case 3
                ' 모터 정지 대기 (전류 < 0.3A = LH+RH 둘 다 완료)
                If sec <> _lhRhLastLogSec Then
                    _lhRhLastLogSec = sec
                    AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] 동작 중... Amp={amp:F2}A ({sec}초)")
                End If
                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 2 Then
                    If amp < 0.3 Then
                        _lhRhCalcCount += 1
                    Else
                        _lhRhCalcCount = 0
                    End If
                    If _lhRhCalcCount >= 5 Then
                        _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_LH")
                        _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_RH")
                        AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] ★ 모터 정지 (LH+RH 학습 완료, Amp={amp:F2}A, {sec}초)")
                        _lhRhTime.Restart()
                        _lhRhLastLogSec = -1
                        _lhRhStep = 10
                    End If
                End If
                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 60 Then
                    _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_LH")
                    _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_RH")
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] 정지 타임아웃 (60초)")
                    StopLhRhEdu()
                End If

            ' ─── LH 학습체크 (31 01 → 31 03 교대) ───
            Case 10
                ' 1초 대기 후 시작
                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 1 Then
                    _lhRhCheckResult = ""
                    _lhRhCheckCount = 0
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] === LH 학습체크 시작 ===")
                    _lhRhStep = 11
                End If

            Case 11
                ' LH 학습체크 요청 (31 01 12 A6 F0)
                _lhRhCheckCount += 1
                AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] LH 학습체크 요청 (시도 {_lhRhCheckCount}/5)")
                _can.AddJobOnce("LHRH_CHK_LH_A", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA6, &HF0, &H0, &H0)
                _lhRhTime.Restart()
                _lhRhStep = 12

            Case 12
                ' 500ms 대기 후 학습결과 조회
                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalMilliseconds >= 500 Then
                    _lhRhCheckResult = ""
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] LH 학습결과 조회 (31 03 12 A6)")
                    _can.AddJobOnce("LHRH_CHK_LH_B", &H731, &H4, &H31, &H3, &H12, &HA6, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    _lhRhTime.Restart()
                    _lhRhStep = 13
                End If

            Case 13
                ' LH 응답 대기
                If _lhRhCheckResult = "OK" Then
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] ★ LH 학습체크 OK")
                    _lhRhTime.Restart()
                    _lhRhStep = 20
                ElseIf _lhRhCheckResult = "NG" Then
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] ★ LH 학습체크 NG")
                    _lhRhTime.Restart()
                    _lhRhStep = 20
                ElseIf _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 2 Then
                    AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] LH 응답 없음 ({_lhRhCheckCount}/5)")
                    If _lhRhCheckCount >= 5 Then
                        AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] ★ LH 학습체크 NG (응답 없음)")
                        _lhRhTime.Restart()
                        _lhRhStep = 20
                    Else
                        _lhRhStep = 11
                    End If
                End If

            ' ─── RH 학습체크 ───
            Case 20
                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 0.5 Then
                    _lhRhCheckResult = ""
                    _lhRhCheckCount = 0
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] === RH 학습체크 시작 ===")
                    _lhRhStep = 21
                End If

            Case 21
                ' RH 학습체크 요청 (31 01 12 A7 F0)
                _lhRhCheckCount += 1
                AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] RH 학습체크 요청 (시도 {_lhRhCheckCount}/5)")
                _can.AddJobOnce("LHRH_CHK_RH_A", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA7, &HF0, &H0, &H0)
                _lhRhTime.Restart()
                _lhRhStep = 22

            Case 22
                ' 500ms 대기 후 학습결과 조회
                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalMilliseconds >= 500 Then
                    _lhRhCheckResult = ""
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] RH 학습결과 조회 (31 03 12 A7)")
                    _can.AddJobOnce("LHRH_CHK_RH_B", &H731, &H4, &H31, &H3, &H12, &HA7, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    _lhRhTime.Restart()
                    _lhRhStep = 23
                End If

            Case 23
                ' RH 응답 대기
                If _lhRhCheckResult = "OK" Then
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] ★ RH 학습체크 OK")
                    _lhRhStep = 99
                ElseIf _lhRhCheckResult = "NG" Then
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] ★ RH 학습체크 NG")
                    _lhRhStep = 99
                ElseIf _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 2 Then
                    AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] RH 응답 없음 ({_lhRhCheckCount}/5)")
                    If _lhRhCheckCount >= 5 Then
                        AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] ★ RH 학습체크 NG (응답 없음)")
                        _lhRhStep = 99
                    Else
                        _lhRhStep = 21
                    End If
                End If

            Case 99
                AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] === 시퀀스 완료 ===")
                AppendResult("========================================")
                StopLhRhEdu()

        End Select
    End Sub

    Private Sub StopLhRhEdu()
        tmrLhRhEdu.Stop()
        _lhRhStep = -1
        _lhRhTime.Stop()
        If _can IsNot Nothing Then
            _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_LH")
            _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_RH")
        End If
    End Sub

End Class

﻿Imports System.Linq
Imports Peak.Can.Basic

Public Class FrmCanFd

    Private _can As CanBusService
    Private _isConnected As Boolean

    ' NORMAL 벤트 시퀀스 상태
    Private _ventSide As String = ""    ' "LH", "RH", ""
    Private _ventStep As Integer = 0

    ' ===== 폼 이벤트 =====

    Private Sub FrmCanFd_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load
        Me.Text = "CAN 테스트 - [NORMAL]"

        ' NORMAL 전용: grpUds 숨기기
        grpUds.Visible = False
        grpNormal.Visible = True

        ' 파워서플라이: 원래 전압 저장 & 타이머 시작
        _savedVolt = Module1.TargetVolt
        UpdateVoltToggleButton()
        tmrSupply.Start()

        SetButtonsEnabled(False)
    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmCanFd_FormClosing(sender As Object, e As Windows.Forms.FormClosingEventArgs) Handles MyBase.FormClosing
        tmrSupply.Stop()
        DoCanClose()
    End Sub

    ' ===== 버튼 활성화 제어 =====

    Private Sub SetButtonsEnabled(ByVal enabled As Boolean)
        grpMotor.Enabled = enabled
        grpVent.Enabled = enabled
        grpUds.Enabled = enabled
        grpNormal.Enabled = enabled
        btnCanOpen.Enabled = Not enabled
        btnCanClose.Enabled = enabled
    End Sub

    ' ===== 로그 =====

    Private Sub AppendLog(ByVal msg As String)
        If txtLog.InvokeRequired Then
            txtLog.BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() AppendLog(msg)))
            Return
        End If
        ' 로그 길이 제한
        If txtLog.TextLength > 50000 Then
            txtLog.Text = txtLog.Text.Substring(txtLog.TextLength - 30000)
        End If
        txtLog.AppendText(msg & vbCrLf)
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>좌측 하단 결과 표시 (UDS 응답 전용)</summary>
    Private Sub AppendResult(ByVal msg As String)
        If txtResult.InvokeRequired Then
            txtResult.BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() AppendResult(msg)))
            Return
        End If
        If txtResult.TextLength > 10000 Then
            txtResult.Text = txtResult.Text.Substring(txtResult.TextLength - 5000)
        End If
        txtResult.AppendText(msg & vbCrLf)
    End Sub

    Private Sub UpdateStatus(ByVal msg As String)
        If StatusStrip1.InvokeRequired Then
            StatusStrip1.BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() UpdateStatus(msg)))
            Return
        End If
        lblStatus.Text = msg
    End Sub

    ' ===== CAN Open / Close =====

    Private Sub btnCanOpen_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnCanOpen.Click
        Try
            _can = New CanBusService(PCANBasic.PCAN_USBBUS1, False) ' 항상 CAN 2.0

            ' 이벤트 핸들러 연결
            AddHandler _can.Log, Sub(s) AppendLog(s)
            AddHandler _can.Error, Sub(errSt) AppendLog("[오류] " & errSt.ToString())
            AddHandler _can.UdsCompleted, AddressOf OnUdsCompleted
            AddHandler _can.FrameDecoded, AddressOf OnFrameDecoded

            _can.LogAllRawTxFrames = True
            _can.LogAllRawRxFrames = True

            Dim st As TPCANStatus = _can.Init("") ' 500K 표준

            If st <> TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_OK Then
                AppendLog("CAN 초기화 실패: " & st.ToString())
                _can.Dispose()
                _can = Nothing
                Return
            End If

            _can.StartPolling()
            _isConnected = True
            SetButtonsEnabled(True)
            UpdateStatus("연결됨 [NORMAL]")
            AppendLog("=== CAN NORMAL 연결 완료 ===")

            '' NORMAL 모드: NM 게이트웨이 Alive 주기 전송 (ECU 슬립 방지) - 테스트용 비활성화
            'If _mode = "NORMAL" Then
            '    _can.AddJob("NM_ALIVE", &H570, 200, &H70, &H1, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            '    AppendLog("NM Alive 자동 전송 시작 (0x570, 200ms)")
            'End If

        Catch ex As Exception
            AppendLog("[예외] " & ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnCanClose_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnCanClose.Click
        DoCanClose()
    End Sub

    Private Sub tmrStopDelay_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmrStopDelay.Tick
        tmrStopDelay.Stop()
        If _can IsNot Nothing Then
            _can.RemoveJob("NML_LH_STOP")
            _can.RemoveJob("NML_RH_STOP")
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub DoCanClose()
        tmrVent.Stop()
        tmrEduCheck.Stop()
        tmrLhRhEdu.Stop()
        tmrStopDelay.Stop()
        _ventSide = ""
        _eduCheckSide = ""
        If _can IsNot Nothing Then
            Try
                _can.Dispose()
            Catch
            End Try
            _can = Nothing
        End If
        _isConnected = False
        SetButtonsEnabled(False)
        UpdateStatus("연결 해제")
        AppendLog("=== CAN 연결 해제 ===")
    End Sub

    ' ===== UDS 응답 처리 =====

    Private Sub OnUdsCompleted(ByVal respId As UInteger, ByVal data As Byte())
        If data Is Nothing OrElse data.Length = 0 Then Return

        Dim hex As String = String.Join(" ", data.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2")))

        If data(0) = &H62 AndAlso data.Length >= 4 Then
            ' RDBI 긍정 응답
            Dim did As String = data(1).ToString("X2") & data(2).ToString("X2")
            Dim payload = data.Skip(3).ToArray()
            Dim ascii As Boolean = payload.All(Function(b) b >= &H20 AndAlso b <= &H7E)
            Dim val As String = If(ascii, System.Text.Encoding.ASCII.GetString(payload),
                                  String.Join(" ", payload.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2"))))
            AppendResult("[RDBI] 0x" & respId.ToString("X3") & " DID=" & did & " → " & val)

        ElseIf data(0) = &H71 Then
            ' Routine Control 긍정 응답
            If data.Length >= 4 AndAlso data(2) = &H12 AndAlso
               (data(3) = &HA6 OrElse data(3) = &HA7) Then
                Dim side As String = If(data(3) = &HA6, "LH", "RH")

                If data(1) = &H1 Then
                    ' EDU 수락 응답 (71 01 12 A6/A7) - 로그만 남김
                    AppendResult("[EDU] " & side & " 리미트 세팅 명령 수락")

                ElseIf data(1) = &H3 AndAlso data.Length >= 5 Then
                    ' 학습체크 결과 응답 (71 03 12 A6/A7 XX)
                    If data(4) = &H2 Then
                        ' LH+RH EDU 시퀀스 활성 시 결과 저장
                        If _lhRhStep >= 0 Then _lhRhCheckResult = "OK"
                        StopEduCheck()
                        AppendResult("[학습체크] " & side & " 완료 (OK)")
                    ElseIf data(4) = &H1 Then
                        If _lhRhStep >= 0 Then _lhRhCheckResult = "NG"
                        StopEduCheck()
                        AppendResult("[학습체크] " & side & " NG")
                    End If
                End If
            Else
                AppendResult("[Routine] 0x" & respId.ToString("X3") & " OK → " & hex)
            End If

        ElseIf data(0) = &H7F AndAlso data.Length >= 3 Then
            ' NRC
            AppendResult("[NRC] 0x" & respId.ToString("X3") & " SID=0x" & data(1).ToString("X2") & " NRC=0x" & data(2).ToString("X2"))

        ElseIf data(0) = &H54 Then
            ' ClearDTC 긍정 응답
            AppendResult("[ClearDTC] 0x" & respId.ToString("X3") & " OK")

        Else
            AppendResult("[UDS] 0x" & respId.ToString("X3") & " → " & hex)
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub OnFrameDecoded(ByVal canId As UInteger, ByVal data As Byte())
        ' 필요 시 특정 ID 프레임 파싱 추가 가능
    End Sub

    ' NORMAL 모드 Job 이름 상수 (모터 반복 전송용)
    Private Const JOB_MOTOR As String = "NML_MOTOR"

    ' =========================================================
    '  모터 제어
    '  - PE: UDS IOControl 1회 전송 (AddJobOnce)
    '  - NORMAL: 0x4A5 500ms 주기 반복 전송 (AddJob) ← ThreadTask3 방식
    ' =========================================================

    ''' <summary>NORMAL 모드: 기존 모터 Job 제거 후 새 모터 Job 등록 (500ms 반복)</summary>
    Private Sub NormalMotorJob(ByVal data As Byte())
        _can.RemoveJob(JOB_MOTOR)
        _can.AddJob(JOB_MOTOR, &H4A5, 500, data(0), data(1), data(2), data(3), data(4), data(5), data(6), data(7))
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnRlFwd_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRlFwd.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RL FWD")
        NormalMotorJob(New Byte() {&H0, &H0, &H8, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0})
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnRlBwd_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRlBwd.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RL BWD")
        NormalMotorJob(New Byte() {&H0, &H0, &H2, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0})
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnRrFwd_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRrFwd.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RR FWD")
        NormalMotorJob(New Byte() {&H0, &H0, &H80, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0})
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnRrBwd_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRrBwd.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RR BWD")
        NormalMotorJob(New Byte() {&H0, &H0, &H20, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0})
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnStop_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnStop.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("전체 STOP")

        ' 모든 진행 중 타이머 중지
        tmrVent.Stop()
        _ventSide = ""
        StopEduCheck()

        ' 반복 중인 모든 Job 제거 (모터, EDU, 벤트 등)
        _can.RemoveJob(JOB_MOTOR)
        _can.RemoveJob("LH_EDU_1")
        _can.RemoveJob("RH_EDU_1")
        _can.RemoveJob("NML_LH_STOP")
        _can.RemoveJob("NML_RH_STOP")
        ' LH STOP + RH STOP (원본: 2회 보내고 중단)
        _can.AddJob("NML_LH_STOP", &H4A5, 500, &H0, &H0, &H4, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        _can.AddJob("NML_RH_STOP", &H4A5, 500, &H0, &H0, &H40, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        ' 1.2초 후 STOP Job도 제거 (원본: CanCount>=2 → CanSTep=0)
        tmrStopDelay.Start()
    End Sub

    ' ===== NORMAL 벤트 시퀀스 (Timer) =====

    Private Sub StartVentSequence(ByVal side As String)
        tmrVent.Stop()
        _ventSide = side
        _ventStep = 0
        tmrVent.Interval = 500
        tmrVent.Start()
    End Sub

    Private Sub tmrVent_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmrVent.Tick
        If _can Is Nothing OrElse String.IsNullOrEmpty(_ventSide) Then
            tmrVent.Stop()
            Return
        End If

        Select Case _ventStep
            Case 0
                ' STOP
                If _ventSide = "LH" Then
                    _can.AddJobOnce("V_STOP", &H4A5, &H0, &H0, &H4, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                Else
                    _can.AddJobOnce("V_STOP", &H4A5, &H0, &H0, &H40, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                End If
                _ventStep = 1

            Case 1
                ' 3E0 초기화
                _can.AddJobOnce("V_3E0_INIT", &H3E0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                _ventStep = 2

            Case 2
                ' 3E0 활성화
                _can.AddJobOnce("V_3E0_ACT", &H3E0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H50, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                _ventStep = 3

            Case 3
                ' 4A2
                If _ventSide = "LH" Then
                    _can.AddJobOnce("V_4A2", &H4A2, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H50, &H0, &H0)
                Else
                    _can.AddJobOnce("V_4A2", &H4A2, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H5, &H0, &H0)
                End If
                _ventStep = 4

            Case 4
                ' 418
                _can.AddJobOnce("V_418", &H418, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H10, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                _ventStep = 5

            Case 5
                ' 3E0 반복 (→ step4로 돌아감)
                _can.AddJobOnce("V_3E0_RPT", &H3E0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H50, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                _ventStep = 4

        End Select
    End Sub

    ' NORMAL 학습 체크: 2개 메시지 교대 반복 (원본 ThreadTask3 방식)
    Private _eduCheckSide As String = ""
    Private _eduCheckStep As Integer = 0
    Private _eduCheckCount As Integer = 0   ' 트라이 횟수
    Private Const EDU_CHECK_MAX_TRY As Integer = 5

    Private Sub StartEduCheck(ByVal side As String)
        tmrEduCheck.Stop()
        _eduCheckSide = side
        _eduCheckStep = 0
        _eduCheckCount = 0
        tmrEduCheck.Interval = 500
        tmrEduCheck.Start()
    End Sub

    Private Sub StopEduCheck()
        tmrEduCheck.Stop()
        _eduCheckSide = ""
        _eduCheckCount = 0
    End Sub

    Private Sub tmrEduCheck_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmrEduCheck.Tick
        If _can Is Nothing OrElse String.IsNullOrEmpty(_eduCheckSide) Then
            tmrEduCheck.Stop()
            Return
        End If

        Dim did1 As Byte = If(_eduCheckSide = "LH", CByte(&HA6), CByte(&HA7))

        If _eduCheckStep = 0 Then
            ' 31 01 12 A6/A7 F0 (학습 체크 요청)
            _can.AddJobOnce("EDU_CHK_A", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, did1, &HF0, &H0, &H0)
            _eduCheckStep = 1
        Else
            ' 31 03 12 A6/A7 (학습 결과 조회)
            _can.AddJobOnce("EDU_CHK_B", &H731, &H4, &H31, &H3, &H12, did1, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            _eduCheckStep = 0
            _eduCheckCount += 1
            ' 5회 트라이 후 응답 없으면 NG
            If _eduCheckCount >= EDU_CHECK_MAX_TRY Then
                Dim side = _eduCheckSide
                StopEduCheck()
                AppendResult("[학습체크] " & side & " NG (응답 없음)")
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

        End If

    ' =========================================================
    '  LH+RH EDU 자동 시퀀스 (리미트 세팅 + 학습체크)
    '  동시 모드: LH+RH 동시 전송 → 전류 정지 감지 → 학습체크
    ' =========================================================

    Private _lhRhStep As Integer = -1         ' -1 = 비활성
    Private _lhRhTime As New Stopwatch()
    Private _lhRhCalcCount As Integer = 0     ' 정지 감지 카운터
    Private _lhRhCheckResult As String = ""   ' 학습체크 UDS 응답 ("OK"/"NG"/"")
    Private _lhRhCheckCount As Integer = 0    ' 학습체크 재시도 횟수
    Private _lhRhLastLogSec As Integer = -1   ' 마지막 전류 로그 시간(초)

    Private Sub btnLhRhEdu_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnLhRhEdu.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return

        ' 기존 체크 중이면 정지
        StopEduCheck()

        AppendResult("========================================")
        AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] === 리미트 세팅 시작 ===")

        ' LH EDU 연속전송 (500ms 주기)
        AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] LH EDU 연속전송 시작 (500ms)")
        _can.AddJob("LHRH_EDU_LH", &H731, 500, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA6, &H42, &H0, &H0)

        _lhRhStep = 1
        _lhRhCalcCount = 0
        _lhRhLastLogSec = -1
        _lhRhTime.Restart()
        tmrLhRhEdu.Start()
    End Sub

    Private Sub tmrLhRhEdu_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmrLhRhEdu.Tick
        If _can Is Nothing Then
            StopLhRhEdu()
            Return
        End If

        Dim amp As Double = Module1.ValueAmp1
        Dim sec As Integer = CInt(Math.Floor(_lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds))

        Select Case _lhRhStep

            Case 1
                ' LH 시작 대기 (전류 > 2.5A)
                If sec <> _lhRhLastLogSec Then
                    _lhRhLastLogSec = sec
                    AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] LH 시작 대기... Amp={amp:F2}A ({sec}초)")
                End If
                If amp > 2.5 Then
                    AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] ★ LH 시작 감지 (Amp={amp:F2}A)")
                    ' RH EDU 연속전송 추가 (500ms 주기)
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] RH EDU 연속전송 시작 (500ms)")
                    _can.AddJob("LHRH_EDU_RH", &H731, 500, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA7, &H42, &H0, &H0)
                    _lhRhTime.Restart()
                    _lhRhLastLogSec = -1
                    _lhRhStep = 2
                End If
                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 30 Then
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] LH 시작 타임아웃 (30초)")
                    _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_LH")
                    StopLhRhEdu()
                End If

            Case 2
                ' RH 추가 시작 대기 (전류 > 5A = 둘 다 동작)
                If sec <> _lhRhLastLogSec Then
                    _lhRhLastLogSec = sec
                    AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] RH 시작 대기... Amp={amp:F2}A ({sec}초)")
                End If
                If amp > 5 Then
                    _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_LH")
                    _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_RH")
                    AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] ★ LH+RH 모두 시작 (Amp={amp:F2}A) → EDU 전송 중단")
                    _lhRhCalcCount = 0
                    _lhRhTime.Restart()
                    _lhRhLastLogSec = -1
                    _lhRhStep = 3
                End If
                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 30 Then
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] RH 시작 타임아웃 (30초)")
                    _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_LH")
                    _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_RH")
                    StopLhRhEdu()
                End If

            Case 3
                ' 모터 정지 대기 (전류 < 0.3A = LH+RH 둘 다 완료)
                If sec <> _lhRhLastLogSec Then
                    _lhRhLastLogSec = sec
                    AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] 동작 중... Amp={amp:F2}A ({sec}초)")
                End If
                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 2 Then
                    If amp < 0.3 Then
                        _lhRhCalcCount += 1
                    Else
                        _lhRhCalcCount = 0
                    End If
                    If _lhRhCalcCount >= 5 Then
                        _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_LH")
                        _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_RH")
                        AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] ★ 모터 정지 (LH+RH 학습 완료, Amp={amp:F2}A, {sec}초)")
                        _lhRhTime.Restart()
                        _lhRhLastLogSec = -1
                        _lhRhStep = 10
                    End If
                End If
                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 60 Then
                    _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_LH")
                    _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_RH")
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] 정지 타임아웃 (60초)")
                    StopLhRhEdu()
                End If

            ' ─── LH 학습체크 (31 01 → 31 03 교대) ───
            Case 10
                ' 1초 대기 후 시작
                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 1 Then
                    _lhRhCheckResult = ""
                    _lhRhCheckCount = 0
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] === LH 학습체크 시작 ===")
                    _lhRhStep = 11
                End If

            Case 11
                ' LH 학습체크 요청 (31 01 12 A6 F0)
                _lhRhCheckCount += 1
                AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] LH 학습체크 요청 (시도 {_lhRhCheckCount}/5)")
                _can.AddJobOnce("LHRH_CHK_LH_A", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA6, &HF0, &H0, &H0)
                _lhRhTime.Restart()
                _lhRhStep = 12

            Case 12
                ' 500ms 대기 후 학습결과 조회
                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalMilliseconds >= 500 Then
                    _lhRhCheckResult = ""
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] LH 학습결과 조회 (31 03 12 A6)")
                    _can.AddJobOnce("LHRH_CHK_LH_B", &H731, &H4, &H31, &H3, &H12, &HA6, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    _lhRhTime.Restart()
                    _lhRhStep = 13
                End If

            Case 13
                ' LH 응답 대기
                If _lhRhCheckResult = "OK" Then
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] ★ LH 학습체크 OK")
                    _lhRhTime.Restart()
                    _lhRhStep = 20
                ElseIf _lhRhCheckResult = "NG" Then
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] ★ LH 학습체크 NG")
                    _lhRhTime.Restart()
                    _lhRhStep = 20
                ElseIf _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 2 Then
                    AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] LH 응답 없음 ({_lhRhCheckCount}/5)")
                    If _lhRhCheckCount >= 5 Then
                        AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] ★ LH 학습체크 NG (응답 없음)")
                        _lhRhTime.Restart()
                        _lhRhStep = 20
                    Else
                        _lhRhStep = 11
                    End If
                End If

            ' ─── RH 학습체크 ───
            Case 20
                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 0.5 Then
                    _lhRhCheckResult = ""
                    _lhRhCheckCount = 0
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] === RH 학습체크 시작 ===")
                    _lhRhStep = 21
                End If

            Case 21
                ' RH 학습체크 요청 (31 01 12 A7 F0)
                _lhRhCheckCount += 1
                AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] RH 학습체크 요청 (시도 {_lhRhCheckCount}/5)")
                _can.AddJobOnce("LHRH_CHK_RH_A", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA7, &HF0, &H0, &H0)
                _lhRhTime.Restart()
                _lhRhStep = 22

            Case 22
                ' 500ms 대기 후 학습결과 조회
                If _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalMilliseconds >= 500 Then
                    _lhRhCheckResult = ""
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] RH 학습결과 조회 (31 03 12 A7)")
                    _can.AddJobOnce("LHRH_CHK_RH_B", &H731, &H4, &H31, &H3, &H12, &HA7, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    _lhRhTime.Restart()
                    _lhRhStep = 23
                End If

            Case 23
                ' RH 응답 대기
                If _lhRhCheckResult = "OK" Then
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] ★ RH 학습체크 OK")
                    _lhRhStep = 99
                ElseIf _lhRhCheckResult = "NG" Then
                    AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] ★ RH 학습체크 NG")
                    _lhRhStep = 99
                ElseIf _lhRhTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 2 Then
                    AppendResult($"[LH+RH EDU] RH 응답 없음 ({_lhRhCheckCount}/5)")
                    If _lhRhCheckCount >= 5 Then
                        AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] ★ RH 학습체크 NG (응답 없음)")
                        _lhRhStep = 99
                    Else
                        _lhRhStep = 21
                    End If
                End If

            Case 99
                AppendResult("[LH+RH EDU] === 시퀀스 완료 ===")
                AppendResult("========================================")
                StopLhRhEdu()

        End Select
    End Sub

    Private Sub StopLhRhEdu()
        tmrLhRhEdu.Stop()
        _lhRhStep = -1
        _lhRhTime.Stop()
        If _can IsNot Nothing Then
            _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_LH")
            _can.RemoveJob("LHRH_EDU_RH")
        End If
    End Sub

End Class

    Private Function StrPtr(ByVal x As String) As Integer

    Private Function VarPtr(ByVal obj As Object) As Integer
        ' Obtain a pinned handle to the object
        Dim handle As GCHandle = GCHandle.Alloc(obj, GCHandleType.Pinned)
        Dim pointer As Integer = handle.AddrOfPinnedObject.ToInt32

        ' Free the allocated handle. At this point the GC can move the object in memory, this is 
        ' why this function does not exist in .NET. If you were to use this pointer as a destination 
        ' for memcopy for example, you could overwrite unintended memory, which would crash the 
        ' application or cause unexpected behavior. For this function to work you would need to
        ' maintain the handle until after you are finished using it.
        handle.Free()

        Return pointer
    End Function
    Sub SerialOpen()

        Try
            If Serial_Supply1.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Supply1.Close()
                Serial_Supply1.PortName = PortNumberAmp1
                Serial_Supply1.Parity = Ports.Parity.None
                Serial_Supply1.Handshake = Ports.Handshake.XOnXOff
                Serial_Supply1.BaudRate = 9600
                Serial_Supply1.StopBits = Ports.StopBits.One
                Serial_Supply1.DataBits = 8
                Serial_Supply1.Open()
            Else
                Serial_Supply1.PortName = PortNumberAmp1
                Serial_Supply1.Parity = Ports.Parity.None
                Serial_Supply1.Handshake = Ports.Handshake.XOnXOff
                Serial_Supply1.BaudRate = 9600
                Serial_Supply1.StopBits = Ports.StopBits.One
                Serial_Supply1.DataBits = 8
                Serial_Supply1.Open()
            End If
            Serial_Supply1.WriteLine("*ADR 1")
            RequestStep1 = 0
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Supply1  Fail " & PortNumberAmp1)
        End Try

        Try
            SerialScanner1.PortName = PortNumberScanner1
            If SerialScanner1.IsOpen() = True Then
                SerialScanner1.Close()
                SerialScanner1.DataBits = 8
                SerialScanner1.Open()
            Else
                SerialScanner1.BaudRate = 9600
                SerialScanner1.DataBits = 8
                SerialScanner1.Open()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Scanner1 Fail " & PortNumberScanner1)
        End Try

        Try
            SerialPrinter1.PortName = PortNumberPrinter1
            If SerialPrinter1.IsOpen() = True Then
                SerialPrinter1.Close()
                SerialPrinter1.DataBits = 8
                SerialPrinter1.Open()
            Else
                SerialPrinter1.BaudRate = 9600
                SerialPrinter1.DataBits = 8
                SerialPrinter1.Open()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

        Try
            SerialPrinter2.PortName = PortNumberPrinter2
            If SerialPrinter2.IsOpen() = True Then
                SerialPrinter2.Close()
                SerialPrinter2.DataBits = 8
                SerialPrinter2.Open()
            Else
                SerialPrinter2.BaudRate = 9600
                SerialPrinter2.DataBits = 8
                SerialPrinter2.Open()

    End Sub
    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

        Dim Incoming1 As String = ""
        Dim Incoming2 As String = ""
        Dim RecvString1 As String = ""
        Dim RecvString2 As String = ""

        Do
            Try
                If Serial_Supply1.IsOpen = True Then
                    If Serial_Supply1.BytesToRead > 0 Then
                        Incoming1 = Serial_Supply1.ReadChar
                        If Incoming1 = 13 Then
                            If RequestStep1 = 1 Then
                                ValueVolt1 = CDbl(RecvString1)
                                RequestStep1 = 2
                            ElseIf RequestStep1 = 3 Then
                                ValueAmp1 = CDbl(RecvString1)
                                RequestStep1 = 4
                            End If
                            RecvString1 = ""
                            Serial_Supply1.DiscardInBuffer()
                        Else
                            RecvString1 = RecvString1 & Chr(Incoming1)
                        End If
                    End If
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
                RecvString1 = ""
                RequestStep1 = 0
            End Try

            Application.DoEvents()

        Loop

    End Sub
    Private Sub CanWrite(str As String)

        SerialCAN.Write(str)
        tmpLogCount = tmpLogCount + 1
        'T 535 8 1D 02 00 00 00 00 FF FF
        tmpLog(tmpLogCount) = "->" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss") & " " &
                                Mid(str, 2, 3) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 6, 2) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 8, 2) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 10, 2) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 12, 2) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 14, 2) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 16, 2) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 18, 2) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 20, 2)

    End Sub
    Private Sub ThreadTask3()

        Do

            If SerialCAN.IsOpen = True Then

                If CanSTep = 2000 Then 'RL CCS CLEAR LH
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 712 8 04 14 FF FF FF 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 2001 Then
                    '클리어 완료 신호 대기
                ElseIf CanSTep = 2020 Then 'RR CCS CLEAR RH
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 707 8 04 14 FF FF FF 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 2021 Then
                    '클리어 완료 신호 대기
                ElseIf CanSTep = 10 Then ' LH FWD
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 08 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 20 Then 'LH BWD
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 02 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 30 Then 'LH STOP
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 04 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanCount = CanCount + 1
                    If CanCount >= 2 Then CanSTep = 0
                ElseIf CanSTep = 40 Then 'LH EDU
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A6 42 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 41 Then
                    If OPTION_LHRH = "LH" Then
                        CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A6 F0 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    ElseIf OPTION_LHRH = "RH" Then
                        CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A7 F0 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    End If
                    CanSTep = 42
                ElseIf CanSTep = 42 Then
                    If OPTION_LHRH = "LH" Then
                        CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 04 31 03 12 A6 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    ElseIf OPTION_LHRH = "RH" Then
                        CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 04 31 03 12 A7 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    End If
                    CanSTep = 43
                ElseIf CanSTep = 110 Then ' RH FWD
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 80 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 120 Then 'RH BWD
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 20 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 130 Then 'RH STOP
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 40 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanCount = CanCount + 1
                    If CanCount >= 2 Then CanSTep = 0
                ElseIf CanSTep = 140 Then 'RH EDU
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A7 42 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 0 Then
                ElseIf CanSTep = 200 Then 'LH VENT
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 04 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 201
                ElseIf CanSTep = 201 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 3E0 8 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 202
                ElseIf CanSTep = 202 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 3E0 8 00 00 00 00 50 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 203
                ElseIf CanSTep = 203 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A2 8 00 00 00 00 00 50 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 204
                ElseIf CanSTep = 204 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 418 8 00 00 00 00 10 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 205
                ElseIf CanSTep = 205 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 3E0 8 00 00 00 00 50 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 204
                ElseIf CanSTep = 300 Then 'RH VENT
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 40 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))

    Private Sub Dec2Bin(ByVal Port_0 As Integer, ByVal Port_1 As Integer)

        Dim iten As Integer
        Dim sbin As String
        Dim tmp As String
        Dim i As Integer

        iten = CInt(Port_0)
        sbin = ""
        Do Until iten = 0
            sbin = CStr((iten Mod 2)) & sbin
            iten = iten \ 2
        Loop

        tmp = ""
        For i = 1 To 8 - Len(sbin)
            tmp = tmp & "0"
        Next

        D_Value(0) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 8, 1))
        D_Value(1) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 7, 1))
        D_Value(2) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 6, 1))
        D_Value(3) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 5, 1))
        D_Value(4) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 4, 1))
        D_Value(5) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 3, 1))
        D_Value(6) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 2, 1))
        D_Value(7) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 1, 1))

        iten = CInt(Port_1)
        sbin = ""
        Do Until iten = 0
            sbin = CStr((iten Mod 2)) & sbin
            iten = iten \ 2

        Loop

        tmp = ""
        For i = 1 To 8 - Len(sbin)
            tmp = tmp & "0"
        Next

        D_Value(8) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 8, 1))
        D_Value(9) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 7, 1))
        D_Value(10) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 6, 1))
        D_Value(11) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 5, 1))
        D_Value(12) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 4, 1))
        D_Value(13) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 3, 1))
        D_Value(14) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 2, 1))
        D_Value(15) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 1, 1))

        For i = 0 To 15
            If D_Value(i) = 1 Then
                D_Value(i) = 0
            Else
                D_Value(i) = 1
            End If
        Next

    End Sub
    Private Sub RequestSupply(ByVal SupplyPort As System.IO.Ports.SerialPort, ByVal strMsg As String)

        Try
            If SupplyPort.IsOpen = True Then
                SupplyPort.WriteLine(strMsg)
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try

    End Sub
    Private Sub TmrIO_Tick(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles TmrIO.Tick

        Dim err1 As ErrorCode = ErrorCode.Success
        Dim err2 As ErrorCode = ErrorCode.Success
        Dim tmp1 As Byte
        Dim tmp2 As Byte

        err1 = InstantDiCtrl1.Read(0, tmp1)
        err2 = InstantDiCtrl1.Read(1, tmp2)

        Dec2Bin(CInt(tmp1), CInt(tmp2))

        For i As Integer = 0 To 15
            If D_Value(i) = 0 Then
                IO_IN_LABEL(i).BackColor = Color.White
            Else
                IO_IN_LABEL(i).BackColor = Color.Black
            End If
        Next i

        lbRequestStep1.Text = RequestStep1
        lbRequestCount1.Text = RequestCount1
        RequestCount1 = RequestCount1 + 0.1
        If RequestCount1 >= 2 Then
            RequestStep1 = 0
            RequestCount1 = 0
        End If
        If RequestStep1 = 0 Then
            If SupplyFastMode Then
                ' Fast 모드: CURR만 측정 (VOLT 건너뜀)
                RequestSupply(Serial_Supply1, "MEAS:CURR?")
                RequestStep1 = 3
            Else
                ' Normal 모드: VOLT + CURR 순차 측정
                RequestSupply(Serial_Supply1, "MEAS:VOLT?")
                RequestStep1 = 1
            End If
        ElseIf RequestStep1 = 1 Then
            'if data Recv VOLT
        ElseIf RequestStep1 = 2 Then
            RequestSupply(Serial_Supply1, "MEAS:CURR?")
            RequestStep1 = 3
        ElseIf RequestStep1 = 4 Then
            RequestSupply(Serial_Supply1, "SOURS:VOLT " & CStr(TargetVolt))
            RequestStep1 = 0
        End If


        LbSupply1Volt.Text = ValueVolt1
        LbSupply1Amp.Text = ValueAmp1

    End Sub
    Sub Do_On(ByVal Num As Integer)

        Dim P1 As Integer
        Dim P2 As Integer

        Out_(Num) = 1

        If Out_(0) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 1
        If Out_(1) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 2
        If Out_(2) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 4
        If Out_(3) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 8
        If Out_(4) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 16
        If Out_(5) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 32
        If Out_(6) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 64
        If Out_(7) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 128

        If Out_(8) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 1
        If Out_(9) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 2
        If Out_(10) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 4
        If Out_(11) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 8
        If Out_(12) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 16
        If Out_(13) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 32
        If Out_(14) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 64
        If Out_(15) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 128

        Dim err As ErrorCode = ErrorCode.Success
        err = InstantDoCtrl1.Write(0, CByte(P1))
        err = InstantDoCtrl1.Write(1, CByte(P2))

        IO_OUT_LABEL(Num).BackColor = Color.Black

    End Sub
    Sub Do_Off(ByVal Num As Integer)

        Dim P1 As Integer
        Dim P2 As Integer

        Out_(Num) = 0

        If Out_(0) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 1
        If Out_(1) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 2
        If Out_(2) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 4
        If Out_(3) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 8
        If Out_(4) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 16
        If Out_(5) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 32
        If Out_(6) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 64
        If Out_(7) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 128

        If Out_(8) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 1
        If Out_(9) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 2
        If Out_(10) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 4
        If Out_(11) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 8
        If Out_(12) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 16
        If Out_(13) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 32
        If Out_(14) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 64
        If Out_(15) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 128

        Dim err As ErrorCode = ErrorCode.Success
        err = InstantDoCtrl1.Write(0, CByte(P1))
        err = InstantDoCtrl1.Write(1, CByte(P2))

        IO_OUT_LABEL(Num).BackColor = Color.White

    End Sub

    Private Function DecideNG() As Boolean

        Dim tmp As Boolean = False

        If srclbDecSlideFwdNoise.Text <> "NG" And srclbDecSlideFwdAmp.Text <> "NG" And srclbDecSlideFwdSpeed.Text <> "NG" And
           srclbDecSlideBwdNoise.Text <> "NG" And srclbDecSlideBwdAmp.Text <> "NG" And srclbDecSlideBwdSpeed.Text <> "NG" And
           srclbDecSlideFwdLength.Text <> "NG" And srclbDecSlideBwdLength.Text <> "NG" And
           srclbDecVentNoise.Text <> "NG" And srclbDecVentAmp.Text <> "NG" And srclbDecEcuEDURH.Text <> "NG" And
           FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecVentNoise.Text <> "NG" And FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecVentAmp.Text <> "NG" And FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULH.Text <> "NG" And
           srcSWDecRPSU.Text <> "NG" And
           FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideFwdNoise.Text <> "NG" And FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideFwdAmp.Text <> "NG" And FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideFwdSpeed.Text <> "NG" And
           FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideBwdNoise.Text <> "NG" And FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideBwdAmp.Text <> "NG" And FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideBwdSpeed.Text <> "NG" And
           srclbDecSlideFwdLength.Text <> "NG" And srclbDecSlideBwdLength.Text <> "NG" Then


            tmp = True

        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub FrmMain_Load(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Me.Load

        CheckForIllegalCrossThreadCalls = False

        ' PLC ActiveX 컨트롤 코드에서 생성
        ActPlc = New AxACTETHERLib.AxActQNUDECPUTCP()
        CType(ActPlc, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).BeginInit()
        Me.Controls.Add(ActPlc)
        CType(ActPlc, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).EndInit()
        ActPlc.Visible = False

        LhScanCompleted = False
        RhScanCompleted = False

        Thread3Delay = 500
        FlagLog = False
        wStep = 0

        ' SQLite 로컬 DB 초기화
        InitLocalDB()

        ' NORMAL 타겟 컬럼 생성 (없으면)
        EnsureNormalColumns()

        LoadPortData()
        LoadBarcodeData()
        LoadBasicData()
        LoadBasic2()
        InitControl()
        InitControlLH()
        InitTest()
        InitTestLH()
        SerialOpen()

        TmrWork.Interval = 100
        TmrWork.Start()

        Control2Arry()

        Try
            InstantDoCtrl1.SelectedDevice = New DeviceInformation(1)
            InstantDiCtrl1.SelectedDevice = New DeviceInformation(1)
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try

        TmrIO.Interval = 100
        TmrIO.Start()

        DaqStart()

        For i As Integer = 0 To 15
            Do_Off(i)
        Next

        Trd1 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask1)
        Trd1.IsBackground = True
        Trd1.Start()

        Trd2 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTaskTest)
        Trd2.IsBackground = True
        Trd2.Start()


        ActPlc.ActTimeOut = 500
        AddressOfPLc = PlcIpAddress
        FlagPlcConnection = False

        InitSrcDMap()

        Tmr_Connect.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Connect.Start()
        CanSTep = 0
        For i As Integer = 1 To 9
            WritePlc("D", "405" & CStr(i), "0")
        Next
        wStep = 0

    End Sub

    Private Sub SerialScanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles SerialScanner1.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim ScanData As String

        Incoming = SerialScanner1.ReadLine()
        ScanData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)

        SerialScanner1.DiscardInBuffer()
        srcScannerInput.Text = ScanData

        'If wStep = 1 Then
        If ScanData.Contains("21100-") = True Then 'LH
            'If ScanData.Contains("21100") = True Or ScanData.Contains("23000") = True Then 'LH
            If Len(ScanData) >= 23 Then
                CanSTep = 0
                InitControlLH()
                For i As Integer = 0 To 15
                    Do_Off(i)
                Next
                For i As Integer = 1 To 9
                    WritePlc("D", "405" & CStr(i), "0")
                Next
                LoadBasicData()
                LoadBasic2()
                InitTestLH()
                SearchLineSerial(ScanData)
                tmpLogCount = 0
                If TmpSerial <> "" And TmpPartNo <> "" Then
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcLbPartNo.Text = TmpPartNo
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcLbSerial.Text = TmpSerial
                    LoadPartLH(TmpPartNo)
                    wStep = 4
                Else
                    wStep = 2.1
                End If
            End If

        ElseIf ScanData.Contains("22100-") = True Then 'RH
            'ElseIf ScanData.Contains("22100") = True Or ScanData.Contains("24000") = True Then 'RH
            If Len(ScanData) >= 23 Then
                CanSTep = 0
                InitControl()
                For i As Integer = 0 To 15
                    Do_Off(i)
                Next
                For i As Integer = 1 To 9
                    WritePlc("D", "405" & CStr(i), "0")
                Next
                LoadBasicData()
                LoadBasic2()
                InitTest()
                SearchLineSerial(ScanData)
                tmpLogCount = 0
                If TmpSerial <> "" And TmpPartNo <> "" Then
                    srcLbPartNo.Text = TmpPartNo
                    srcLbSerial.Text = TmpSerial
                    LoadPartRH(TmpPartNo)
                    wStep = 4
                Else
                    wStep = 2.1
                End If
            End If

        End If

        'End If

    End Sub
    Private Sub SearchLineSerial(ByVal str As String)

        TmpPartNo = ""
        TmpSerial = ""
        TmpLHRH = ""

        ConnectionOpen()
        Dim Rs1 As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs1.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs1.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs1.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs1.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_MainLH WHERE LineSerialCush = '" & str & "' OR LineSerialRecl = '" & str & "' OR LineSerialBack = '" & str & "'", SqlConnect)
        If Rs1.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            TmpPartNo = Trim(Rs1.Fields("PartNO").Value)
            TmpSerial = Trim(Rs1.Fields("LineSerial").Value)
            TmpLHRH = "LH"
        End If
        Rs1.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs1.Close()
        ConnectionClose()
        ConnectionOpen()
        Dim Rs2 As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs2.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs2.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs2.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs2.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_MainRH WHERE LineSerialCush = '" & str & "' OR LineSerialRecl = '" & str & "' OR LineSerialBack = '" & str & "'", SqlConnect)
        If Rs2.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            TmpPartNo = Trim(Rs2.Fields("PartNO").Value)
            TmpSerial = Trim(Rs2.Fields("LineSerial").Value)
            TmpLHRH = "RH"
        End If
        Rs2.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs2.Close()
        ConnectionClose()

    End Sub
    Private Sub LoadPartLH(ByVal strPart As String)

        ConnectionOpen()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Partassy WHERE PartNo = '" & strPart & "'", SqlConnect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")
            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcLbPartName.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("PartName").Value)
            LhScanCompleted = True
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        ConnectionClose()

    End Sub
    Private Sub LoadPartRH(ByVal strPart As String)

        ConnectionOpen()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Partassy WHERE PartNo = '" & strPart & "'", SqlConnect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")
            srcLbPartName.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("PartName").Value)
            ' Type 필드로 모드 결정: STD→NORMAL(CAN 2.0), ICE→PE(CAN FD)
            Try
                CommType = Trim(CStr(Rs.Fields("Type").Value)).ToUpper()
            Catch
                CommType = "ICE"
            End Try
            RhScanCompleted = True
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        ConnectionClose()

    End Sub
    Private Function LoadToolData(ByVal strSErial As String) As String

        ConnectionOpen()

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE Serial_No = '" & strSErial & "'", SqlConnect)

        If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            Try
                tmp = Trim(Rs.Fields("OP20_2_TOOL_VALUE").Value)
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try
        Else
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        ConnectionClose()

        Return tmp

    End Function
    Private Function ConvertStr(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        If str = "NA" Then
            tmp = ""
        Else
            tmp = str
        End If
        Return tmp

    End Function

    Sub BarcodePrintLH_rs232()

        Dim StartCode As String
        Dim EndCode As String
        Dim aCode As String
        Dim vCode As String
        Dim pCode As String
        Dim sCode As String
        Dim eCode As String
        Dim tCode As String
        Dim mCode As String
        Dim cCode As String

        Dim RS As String = "_1e"
        Dim GS As String = "_1d"
        Dim EOT As String = "_04"

        Dim tmpSerial As String = FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcLbSerial.Text

        StartCode = "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS
        vCode = "V" & "SN1C" & GS
        pCode = "P" & FrmMainLH.srcLbPartNo.Text.Replace("-", "") & GS
        ' CommType별 sCode 분기
        Select Case CommType
            Case "ICE" : sCode = "S" & "GN01" & GS
            Case "HEV" : sCode = "S" & "GR01" & GS
            Case Else : sCode = "S" & "CN00" & GS
        End Select
        eCode = "E" & "" & GS
        tCode = "T" & Mid(tmpSerial, 3, 6) & "DA1SAS1GN7PF" & Mid(tmpSerial, 9, 4) & GS
        aCode = "A" & GS
        mCode = "M" & GS
        cCode = "C" & GS
        EndCode = RS & EOT

        TmpEndSerial = StartCode & vCode & pCode & sCode & eCode & tCode & mCode & cCode & EndCode

        SerialPrinter1.Write("^XA")
        SerialPrinter1.Write("^FO" & BarcodeBX & "," & BarcodeBY & "^BY5^BXN," & BarcodeBH & ",200,,,,^FH^FD" & TmpEndSerial & "^FS")
        SerialPrinter1.Write("^FO" & BarcodeS1X & "," & BarcodeS1Y & "^A0N," & BarcodeS1H & "," & BarcodeS1W & "^FD" & FrmMainLH.srcLbPartNo.Text & "^FS")
        SerialPrinter1.Write("^FO" & BarcodeS2X & "," & BarcodeS2Y & "^A0N," & BarcodeS2H & "," & BarcodeS2W & "^FD" & tmpSerial & "^FS")
        SerialPrinter1.Write("^FO" & BarcodeS3X & "," & BarcodeS3Y & "^A0N," & BarcodeS3H & "," & BarcodeS3W & "^FD" & FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcLbPartName.Text & "^FS")
        SerialPrinter1.Write("^XZ")

    End Sub
    Sub BarcodePrintRH_rs232()

        Dim StartCode As String
        Dim EndCode As String
        Dim aCode As String
        Dim vCode As String
        Dim pCode As String
        Dim sCode As String
        Dim eCode As String
        Dim tCode As String
        Dim mCode As String
        Dim cCode As String

        Dim RS As String = "_1e"
        Dim GS As String = "_1d"
        Dim EOT As String = "_04"

        Dim tmpSerial As String = srcLbSerial.Text

        StartCode = "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS
        vCode = "V" & "SN1C" & GS

        'pCode = "P" & Mid(tmpSerial, 13, 5) & Mid(tmpSerial, 19, 5) & GS
        pCode = "P" & srcLbPartNo.Text.Replace("-", "") & GS
        ' CommType별 sCode 분기
        Select Case CommType
            Case "ICE" : sCode = "S" & "GN01" & GS
            Case "HEV" : sCode = "S" & "GR01" & GS
            Case Else : sCode = "S" & "CN00" & GS
        End Select
        eCode = "E" & "" & GS
        tCode = "T" & Mid(tmpSerial, 3, 6) & "DA1SAS1GN7PF" & Mid(tmpSerial, 9, 4) & GS
        aCode = "A" & GS
        mCode = "M" & GS
        cCode = "C" & GS
        EndCode = RS & EOT

        TmpEndSerial = StartCode & vCode & pCode & sCode & eCode & tCode & mCode & cCode & EndCode

        SerialPrinter2.Write("^XA")
        SerialPrinter2.Write("^FO" & BarcodeBX & "," & BarcodeBY & "^BY5^BXN," & BarcodeBH & ",200,,,,^FH^FD" & TmpEndSerial & "^FS")
        SerialPrinter2.Write("^FO" & BarcodeS1X & "," & BarcodeS1Y & "^A0N," & BarcodeS1H & "," & BarcodeS1W & "^FD" & srcLbPartNo.Text & "^FS")
        SerialPrinter2.Write("^FO" & BarcodeS2X & "," & BarcodeS2Y & "^A0N," & BarcodeS2H & "," & BarcodeS2W & "^FD" & tmpSerial & "^FS")
        SerialPrinter2.Write("^FO" & BarcodeS3X & "," & BarcodeS3Y & "^A0N," & BarcodeS3H & "," & BarcodeS3W & "^FD" & srcLbPartName.Text & "^FS")
        SerialPrinter2.Write("^XZ")

    End Sub
    Sub BarcodePrintLH_ethernet()

        Dim StartCode As String
        Dim EndCode As String
        Dim aCode As String
        Dim vCode As String
        Dim pCode As String
        Dim sCode As String
        Dim eCode As String
        Dim tCode As String
        Dim mCode As String
        Dim cCode As String

        Dim RS As String = "_1e"
        Dim GS As String = "_1d"
        Dim EOT As String = "_04"

        Dim tmpSerial As String = FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcLbSerial.Text

        StartCode = "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS
        vCode = "V" & "SN1C" & GS
        pCode = "P" & Mid(tmpSerial, 13, 5) & Mid(tmpSerial, 19, 5) & GS
        ' CommType별 sCode 분기
        Select Case CommType
            Case "ICE" : sCode = "S" & "GN01" & GS
            Case "HEV" : sCode = "S" & "GR01" & GS
            Case Else : sCode = "S" & "CN00" & GS
        End Select
        eCode = "E" & "" & GS
        tCode = "T" & Mid(tmpSerial, 3, 6) & "DA1SAS1GN7PF" & Mid(tmpSerial, 9, 4) & GS
        aCode = "A" & GS
        mCode = "M" & GS
        cCode = "C" & GS
        EndCode = RS & EOT

        TmpEndSerial = StartCode & vCode & pCode & sCode & eCode & tCode & mCode & cCode & EndCode

        ' -----------------------------
        '  ZPL 문자열 구성
        ' -----------------------------
        Dim sb As New StringBuilder()

        sb.Append("^XA")
        sb.Append($"^FO{BarcodeBX},{BarcodeBY}^BY5^BXN,{BarcodeBH},200,,,,^FH^FD{TmpEndSerial}^FS")
        sb.Append($"^FO{BarcodeS1X},{BarcodeS1Y}^A0N,{BarcodeS1H},{BarcodeS1W}^FD{Mid(tmpSerial, 13, 5)}-{Mid(tmpSerial, 19, 8)}^FS")
        sb.Append($"^FO{BarcodeS2X},{BarcodeS2Y}^A0N,{BarcodeS2H},{BarcodeS2W}^FD{tmpSerial}^FS")
        sb.Append($"^FO{BarcodeS3X},{BarcodeS3Y}^A0N,{BarcodeS3H},{BarcodeS3W}^FD{FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcLbPartName.Text}^FS")
        sb.Append("^XZ")

        Dim zpl As String = sb.ToString()

        ' -----------------------------
        '  이더넷(ZT411)으로 전송
        ' -----------------------------
        SendToZebraEthernetLH(zpl)

    End Sub

    Private Sub SendToZebraEthernetRH(ByVal zpl As String)
        'ZT411 IP/포트 (프린터 설정에 맞게 변경)
        Const printerIp As String = "192.168.0.15"   ' ← ZT411 IP
        Const printerPort As Integer = 9100          ' RAW 포트(기본 9100)

        Dim client As TcpClient = Nothing
        Dim ns As NetworkStream = Nothing

        Try
            client = New TcpClient()
            client.Connect(printerIp, printerPort)

            ns = client.GetStream()
            Dim data As Byte() = Encoding.ASCII.GetBytes(zpl)

            ns.Write(data, 0, data.Length)
            ns.Flush()
        Catch ex As Exception
            ' 여기서 로그 함수 쓰면 됨
            ' AppendLog("Zebra 이더넷 전송 오류: " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            If ns IsNot Nothing Then
                ns.Close()
            End If
            If client IsNot Nothing Then
                client.Close()
            End If
        End Try

    End Sub

        ' ZT411 IP/포트 (프린터 설정에 맞게 변경)
