    ' =========================================================
    '  NORMAL 자동검사 시퀀스 (tmrNormalTest)
    ' =========================================================

    Private nStep As Integer = 0
    Private nStepCount As Integer = 0
    Private nStepTime As New Stopwatch()
    Private FlagNmlVerDone As Boolean = False
    Private FlagNmlDone As Boolean = False
    Private _savedTargetVolt As Double = 0
    Private testSw As New Stopwatch()         ' TmrWork + tmrNormalTest 공용
    Private stats As New TestStats()          ' TmrWork + tmrNormalTest 공용
    Private _nmlEduCheckResult As String = ""
    Private _nmlEduCheckCount As Integer = 0
    Private _nmlVerRetry As Integer = 0            ' 버전 체크 재시도 횟수

    ' NORMAL 모터 제어 (0x4A5 500ms 주기)
    Private Const NML_MOTOR_JOB As String = "NML_MOTOR"

    ' NORMAL 벤트 시퀀스 상태
    Private _nmlVentSide As String = ""    ' "LH", "RH", ""
    Private _nmlVentStep As Integer = 0

    Private Sub NmlMotorStart(ByVal data As Byte())
        _can.RemoveJob(NML_MOTOR_JOB)
        _can.AddJob(NML_MOTOR_JOB, &H4A5, 500, data(0), data(1), data(2), data(3), data(4), data(5), data(6), data(7))
    End Sub

    Private Sub NmlMotorStop()
        _can.RemoveJob(NML_MOTOR_JOB)
        ' LH STOP + RH STOP
        _can.AddJobOnce("NML_LH_STP", &H4A5, &H0, &H0, &H4, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        _can.AddJobOnce("NML_RH_STP", &H4A5, &H0, &H0, &H40, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    Private Sub tmrNormalTest_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmrNormalTest.Tick

        Try

            ' ─── nStep 1-9: CAN 연결 + ECU 버전 체크 (SW→HW 2패스) ───
            If nStep = 1 Then
                CanStart()
                _versionPhase = "SW"
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 2

            ElseIf nStep = 2 Then
                If FlagCanStart = True Then
                    ' RPSU 버전 요청 (SW: F1B1, HW: F1B0)
                    If _versionPhase = "SW" Then
                        strVersion = ""
                        _can.AddJobOnce("RPSU_SW", &H731, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &HB1, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    Else
                        strHwVersion = ""
                        _can.AddJobOnce("RPSU_HW", &H731, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &H93, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    End If
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 3
                ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 5 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] CAN 연결 실패")
                    nStep = 0
                    tmrNormalTest.Stop()
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 3 Then
                ' RPSU 응답 대기
                If _versionPhase = "SW" Then
                    If strVersion <> "" Then
                        srcSWValRPSU.Text = strVersion
                        srcSWValRPSU2.Text = strVersion
                        If strVersion.Contains(TargetRPSUSwNml) Then
                            srcSWDecRPSU.Text = "OK"
                            srcSWDecRPSU.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        Else
                            srcSWDecRPSU.Text = "NG"
                            srcSWDecRPSU.BackColor = Color.Red
                        End If
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 4
                    ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 3 Then
                        strVersion = ""
                        _can.AddJobOnce("RPSU_SW2", &H731, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &HB1, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                    End If
                Else ' HW
                    If strHwVersion <> "" Then
                        srcHWValRPSU.Text = strHwVersion
                        srcHWValRPSU2.Text = strHwVersion
                        If strHwVersion.Contains(TargetRPSUHwNml) Then
                            srcHWDecRPSU.Text = "OK"
                            srcHWDecRPSU.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        Else
                            srcHWDecRPSU.Text = "NG"
                            srcHWDecRPSU.BackColor = Color.Red
                        End If
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 4
                    ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 3 Then
                        strHwVersion = ""
                        _can.AddJobOnce("RPSU_HW2", &H731, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &H93, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 4 Then
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 0.5 Then
                    ' RRCCS 버전 요청
                    _nmlVerRetry = 0
                    If _versionPhase = "SW" Then
                        _nmlSwVersion = ""
                        _nmlSwRespId = 0
                        _can.AddJobOnce("RRCCS_SW", &H707, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &HB1, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    Else
                        _nmlHwVersion = ""
                        _nmlHwRespId = 0
                        _can.AddJobOnce("RRCCS_HW", &H707, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &H93, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    End If
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 5
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 5 Then
                ' RRCCS 응답 대기
                If _versionPhase = "SW" Then
                    If _nmlSwRespId = &H70F Then
                        srcSWValRRCCS.Text = _nmlSwVersion
                        srcSWValRRCCS2.Text = _nmlSwVersion
                        If _nmlSwVersion.Contains(TargetRRCCSSwNml) Then
                            srcSWDecRRCCS.Text = "OK"
                            srcSWDecRRCCS.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        Else
                            srcSWDecRRCCS.Text = "NG"
                            srcSWDecRRCCS.BackColor = Color.Red
                        End If
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 6
                    ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 3 Then
                        _nmlVerRetry += 1
                        If _nmlVerRetry <= 2 Then
                            AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] RRCCS SW 응답 없음 → 재전송 ({_nmlVerRetry}/2)")
                            _nmlSwVersion = ""
                            _nmlSwRespId = 0
                            _can.AddJobOnce("RRCCS_SW", &H707, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &HB1, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                            nStepTime.Restart()
                        Else
                            srcSWDecRRCCS.Text = "NG"
                            srcSWDecRRCCS.BackColor = Color.Red
                            nStepTime.Restart()
                            nStep = 6
                        End If
                    End If
                Else ' HW
                    If _nmlHwRespId = &H70F Then
                        srcHWValRRCCS.Text = _nmlHwVersion
                        srcHWValRRCCS2.Text = _nmlHwVersion
                        If _nmlHwVersion.Contains(TargetRRCCSHwNml) Then
                            srcHWDecRRCCS.Text = "OK"
                            srcHWDecRRCCS.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        Else
                            srcHWDecRRCCS.Text = "NG"
                            srcHWDecRRCCS.BackColor = Color.Red
                        End If
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 6
                    ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 3 Then
                        _nmlVerRetry += 1
                        If _nmlVerRetry <= 2 Then
                            AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] RRCCS HW 응답 없음 → 재전송 ({_nmlVerRetry}/2)")
                            _nmlHwVersion = ""
                            _nmlHwRespId = 0
                            _can.AddJobOnce("RRCCS_HW", &H707, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &H93, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                            nStepTime.Restart()
                        Else
                            srcHWDecRRCCS.Text = "NG"
                            srcHWDecRRCCS.BackColor = Color.Red
                            nStepTime.Restart()
                            nStep = 6
                        End If
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 6 Then
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 0.5 Then
                    ' RLCCS 버전 요청
                    _nmlVerRetry = 0
                    If _versionPhase = "SW" Then
                        _nmlSwVersion = ""
                        _nmlSwRespId = 0
                        _can.AddJobOnce("RLCCS_SW", &H712, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &HB1, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    Else
                        _nmlHwVersion = ""
                        _nmlHwRespId = 0
                        _can.AddJobOnce("RLCCS_HW", &H712, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &H93, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    End If
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 7
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 7 Then
                ' RLCCS 응답 대기
                If _versionPhase = "SW" Then
                    If _nmlSwRespId = &H71A Then
                        FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcSWValRLCCS.Text = _nmlSwVersion
                        FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcSWValRLCCS2.Text = _nmlSwVersion
                        If _nmlSwVersion.Contains(TargetRLCCSSwNml) Then
                            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcSWDecRLCCS.Text = "OK"
                            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcSWDecRLCCS.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        Else
                            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcSWDecRLCCS.Text = "NG"
                            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcSWDecRLCCS.BackColor = Color.Red
                        End If
                        nStep = 9
                    ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 3 Then
                        _nmlVerRetry += 1
                        If _nmlVerRetry <= 2 Then
                            AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] RLCCS SW 응답 없음 → 재전송 ({_nmlVerRetry}/2)")
                            _nmlSwVersion = ""
                            _nmlSwRespId = 0
                            _can.AddJobOnce("RLCCS_SW", &H712, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &HB1, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                            nStepTime.Restart()
                        Else
                            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcSWDecRLCCS.Text = "NG"
                            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcSWDecRLCCS.BackColor = Color.Red
                            nStep = 9
                        End If
                    End If
                Else ' HW
                    If _nmlHwRespId = &H71A Then
                        FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcHWValRLCCS.Text = _nmlHwVersion
                        FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcHWValRLCCS2.Text = _nmlHwVersion
                        If _nmlHwVersion.Contains(TargetRLCCSHwNml) Then
                            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcHWDecRLCCS.Text = "OK"
                            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcHWDecRLCCS.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        Else
                            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcHWDecRLCCS.Text = "NG"
                            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcHWDecRLCCS.BackColor = Color.Red
                        End If
                        nStep = 9
                    ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 3 Then
                        _nmlVerRetry += 1
                        If _nmlVerRetry <= 2 Then
                            AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] RLCCS HW 응답 없음 → 재전송 ({_nmlVerRetry}/2)")
                            _nmlHwVersion = ""
                            _nmlHwRespId = 0
                            _can.AddJobOnce("RLCCS_HW", &H712, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &H93, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                            nStepTime.Restart()
                        Else
                            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcHWDecRLCCS.Text = "NG"
                            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcHWDecRLCCS.BackColor = Color.Red
                            nStep = 9
                        End If
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 9 Then
                ' SW 완료 → HW 패스 시작, HW 완료 → 버전 체크 종료
                If _versionPhase = "SW" Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] SW 버전 체크 완료, HW 체크 시작")
                    _versionPhase = "HW"
                    nStep = 2
                Else
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] 버전 체크 완료 (SW+HW)")
                    FlagNmlVerDone = True
                    nStep = 0
                    tmrNormalTest.Stop()
                End If

                ' ─── nStep 10-19: 버니싱 ───
            ElseIf nStep = 10 Then
                If NumBurnishing = 0 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] 버니싱 건너뜀 (NumBurnishing=0)")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 19
                Else
                    AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] 버니싱 FWD ({BurnishingCount + 1}/{NumBurnishing})")
                    ' LH+RH FWD (0x4A5, {0,0,0x88,0,0,0,0,0})
                    NmlMotorStart(New Byte() {&H0, &H0, &H88, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0})
                    CalcCount1 = 0
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 11
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 11 Then
                ' FWD 모터 시작 대기
                If ValueAmp1 > 1 Then
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 12
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 12 Then
                ' FWD 끝 정지 감지 (CalcCount>=5)
                TotalTime1 = nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                If TotalTime1 > 2 Then
                    If ValueAmp1 < 0.32 Then
                        CalcCount1 += 1
                    Else
                        CalcCount1 = 0
                    End If
                    If CalcCount1 >= 5 Then
                        NmlMotorStop()
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 13
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 13 Then
                ' 1초 대기
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 1 Then nStep = 14

            ElseIf nStep = 14 Then
                ' LH+RH BWD (0x4A5, {0,0,0x22,0,0,0,0,0})
                AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] 버니싱 BWD ({BurnishingCount + 1}/{NumBurnishing})")
                NmlMotorStart(New Byte() {&H0, &H0, &H22, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0})
                CalcCount1 = 0
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 15

            ElseIf nStep = 15 Then
                ' BWD 모터 시작 대기
                If ValueAmp1 > 1 Then
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 16
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 16 Then
                ' BWD 끝 정지 감지 (CalcCount>=5)
                TotalTime1 = nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                If TotalTime1 > 2 Then
                    If ValueAmp1 < 0.32 Then
                        CalcCount1 += 1
                    Else
                        CalcCount1 = 0
                    End If
                    If CalcCount1 >= 5 Then
                        NmlMotorStop()
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 17
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 17 Then
                ' 1초 대기 후 카운트 증가
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 1 Then
                    BurnishingCount += 1
                    AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] 버니싱 완료 ({BurnishingCount}/{NumBurnishing})")
                    If BurnishingCount < NumBurnishing Then
                        nStep = 10
                    Else
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 19
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 19 Then
                ' 리미트 세팅 전 1초 대기
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 1 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] 리미트 세팅 전 1초 대기 완료")
                    nStep = 20
                End If

                ' ─── nStep 20-24: 리미트 세팅 (LH 전류감지 → RH 전류감지 → 완료) ───
            ElseIf nStep = 20 Then
                AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] 1차 리미트 세팅 시작 (LH EDU 연속전송)")
                _can.AddJob("NML_EDU_LH", &H731, 500, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA6, &H42, &H0, &H0)
                CalcCount1 = 0
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 21

            ElseIf nStep = 21 Then
                ' LH 시작 대기 (전류 > 2.5A)
                If ValueAmp1 > 2.5 Then
                    AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] LH 시작 감지 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A, {nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds:F1}초)")
                    ' RH EDU 연속전송 추가
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] RH EDU 연속전송 시작")
                    _can.AddJob("NML_EDU_RH", &H731, 500, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA7, &H42, &H0, &H0)
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 22
                End If
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 30 Then
                    AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] LH 시작 타임아웃 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A)")
                    _can.RemoveJob("NML_EDU_LH")
                    srclbDecEcuEDURH.Text = "NG"
                    srclbDecEcuEDURH.BackColor = Color.Red
                    nStep = 99
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 22 Then
                ' RH 추가 시작 대기 (전류 > 5A = 둘 다 동작)
                If ValueAmp1 > 5 Then
                    _can.RemoveJob("NML_EDU_LH")
                    _can.RemoveJob("NML_EDU_RH")
                    AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] LH+RH 모두 시작 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A, {nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds:F1}초) → EDU 전송 중단")
                    CalcCount1 = 0
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 23
                End If
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 30 Then
                    AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] RH 시작 타임아웃 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A)")
                    _can.RemoveJob("NML_EDU_LH")
                    _can.RemoveJob("NML_EDU_RH")
                    srclbDecEcuEDURH.Text = "NG"
                    srclbDecEcuEDURH.BackColor = Color.Red
                    nStep = 99
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 23 Then
                ' 모터 정지 대기 (전류 < 0.3A = LH+RH 둘 다 완료)
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 2 Then
                    If ValueAmp1 < 0.3 Then
                        CalcCount1 += 1
                    Else
                        CalcCount1 = 0
                    End If
                    If CalcCount1 >= 5 Then
                        _can.RemoveJob("NML_EDU_LH")
                        _can.RemoveJob("NML_EDU_RH")
                        AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] 1차 리미트 세팅 완료 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A, {nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds:F1}초)")
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 25
                    End If
                End If
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 60 Then
                    _can.RemoveJob("NML_EDU_LH")
                    _can.RemoveJob("NML_EDU_RH")
                    AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] 리미트 세팅 타임아웃 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A)")
                    srclbDecEcuEDURH.Text = "NG"
                    srclbDecEcuEDURH.BackColor = Color.Red
                    nStep = 99
                End If

                ' ─── nStep 25-29: 리미트세팅확인 LH (학습체크) ───
            ElseIf nStep = 25 Then
                ' 1초 대기 후 학습체크 시작
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 1 Then
                    _nmlEduCheckResult = ""
                    _nmlEduCheckCount = 0
                    nStep = 26
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 26 Then
                ' LH 학습체크 요청 (31 01 12 A6 F0)
                AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] LH 학습체크 요청 (시도 {_nmlEduCheckCount + 1}/5)")
                _can.AddJobOnce("EDU_CHK_LH_A", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA6, &HF0, &H0, &H0)
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 27

            ElseIf nStep = 27 Then
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 0.5 Then
                    ' LH 학습결과 조회 (31 03 12 A6)
                    _nmlEduCheckResult = ""
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] LH 학습결과 조회 (31 03 12 A6)")
                    _can.AddJobOnce("EDU_CHK_LH_B", &H731, &H4, &H31, &H3, &H12, &HA6, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 28
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 28 Then
                If _nmlEduCheckResult = "OK" Then
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULH.Text = "OK"
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULH.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] LH 학습체크 OK")
                    nStep = 30
                ElseIf _nmlEduCheckResult = "NG" Then
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULH.Text = "NG"
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULH.BackColor = Color.Red
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] LH 학습체크 NG (ECU 응답 NG)")
                    nStep = 30
                ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 2 Then
                    _nmlEduCheckCount += 1
                    AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] LH 학습체크 응답 없음 ({_nmlEduCheckCount}/5)")
                    If _nmlEduCheckCount > 5 Then
                        FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULH.Text = "NG"
                        FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULH.BackColor = Color.Red
                        AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] LH 학습체크 NG (5회 응답 없음)")
                        nStep = 30
                    Else
                        nStep = 26  ' 재시도
                    End If
                End If

                ' ─── nStep 30-39: 리미트세팅확인 RH (동일 패턴, DID A7) ───
            ElseIf nStep = 30 Then
                _nmlEduCheckResult = ""
                _nmlEduCheckCount = 0
                nStep = 31

            ElseIf nStep = 31 Then
                ' RH 학습체크 요청 (31 01 12 A7 F0)
                AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] RH 학습체크 요청 (시도 {_nmlEduCheckCount + 1}/5)")
                _can.AddJobOnce("EDU_CHK_RH_A", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA7, &HF0, &H0, &H0)
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 32

            ElseIf nStep = 32 Then
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 0.5 Then
                    _nmlEduCheckResult = ""
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] RH 학습결과 조회 (31 03 12 A7)")
                    _can.AddJobOnce("EDU_CHK_RH_B", &H731, &H4, &H31, &H3, &H12, &HA7, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 33
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 33 Then
                If _nmlEduCheckResult = "OK" Then
                    srclbDecEcuEDURH.Text = "OK"
                    srclbDecEcuEDURH.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] RH 학습체크 OK")
                    nStep = 40
                ElseIf _nmlEduCheckResult = "NG" Then
                    srclbDecEcuEDURH.Text = "NG"
                    srclbDecEcuEDURH.BackColor = Color.Red
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] RH 학습체크 NG (ECU 응답 NG)")
                    nStep = 40
                ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 2 Then
                    _nmlEduCheckCount += 1
                    AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] RH 학습체크 응답 없음 ({_nmlEduCheckCount}/5)")
                    If _nmlEduCheckCount > 5 Then
                        srclbDecEcuEDURH.Text = "NG"
                        srclbDecEcuEDURH.BackColor = Color.Red
                        AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] RH 학습체크 NG (5회 응답 없음)")
                        nStep = 40
                    Else
                        nStep = 31  ' 재시도
                    End If
                End If

                ' ─── nStep 40-49: ECU 전원차단 5초 ───
            ElseIf nStep = 40 Then
                _savedTargetVolt = TargetVolt
                TargetVolt = 0
                AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] ECU 전원 차단")
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 41

            ElseIf nStep = 41 Then
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 5 Then
                    TargetVolt = _savedTargetVolt
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] ECU 전원 복원")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 42
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 42 Then
                ' 전압 안정 대기
                If ValueVolt1 > _savedTargetVolt * 0.9 Then
                    If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 2 Then
                        nStep = 50
                    End If
                Else
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                End If

                ' ─── nStep 50: CAN 끊고 재연결 ───
            ElseIf nStep = 50 Then
                AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] CAN 재연결")
                CanStop()
                Thread.Sleep(500)
                CanStart()
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 51

                ' ─── nStep 51-69: 레스트모드 슬라이드 검사 (소음/전류/거리/속도 측정) ───

                ' ── LH Relax (FWD) ──
            ElseIf nStep = 51 Then
                If FlagCanStart = False Then
                    If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 5 Then
                        AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] CAN 재연결 실패")
                        nStep = 99
                    End If
                Else
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] LH Relax (FWD) 시작")
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideFwdStartPos.Text = srcLaser2.Text
                    _can.AddJobOnce("LH_RELAX_1", &H2A5, &H18, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    _can.AddJobOnce("LH_RELAX_2", &H2A5, &H18, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    ErrCount1 = 0
                    TmpAmpMAx1 = 0
                    TmpNoiseMax1 = 0
                    stats.Reset()
                    CalcCount1 = 0
                    StopStep = 0
                    LaserBefore = 0
                    LaserNow = 0
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 52
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 52 Then
                ' LH Relax 모터 시작 대기
                If ValueAmp1 > 1 Then
                    testSw.Restart()
                    nStep = 53
                End If
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 10 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] LH Relax 타임아웃")
                    nStep = 55
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 53 Then
                ' LH FWD 데이터 수집 (소음/전류/레이저)
                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                stats.Push(TotalTime1, ValueAmp1, ValueNoise)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphSlideAmp, 0, TotalTime1, ValueAmp1)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphSlideNoise, 0, TotalTime1, ValueNoise)
                FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideFwdTicTime.Text = TotalTime1.ToString("0.0#")

                If TotalTime1 > 2 Then
                    If StopStep = 0 Then
                        LaserBefore = CDbl(srcLaser2.Text)
                        StopStep = 1
                    ElseIf StopStep = 1 Then
                        LaserNow = CDbl(srcLaser2.Text)
                        StopStep = 0
                    End If
                    If ValueAmp1 < 0.32 Then
                        CalcCount1 += 1
                    Else
                        CalcCount1 = 0
                    End If
                    If CalcCount1 >= 3 Then
                        nStep = 54
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 54 Then
                ' LH FWD 판정
                stats.GetMaxInRange(1.0, TotalTime1 - 1.0, TmpAmpMAx1, TmpNoiseMax1)

                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphSlideAmp,
                      yLines:=New Double() {},
                      xLines:=New Double() {1, TotalTime1 - 2},
                      yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                      lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)
                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphSlideNoise,
                      yLines:=New Double() {},
                      xLines:=New Double() {1, TotalTime1 - 2},
                      yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                      lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)

                Dim lhFwdStart As Double = CDbl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideFwdStartPos.Text)
                Dim lhFwdEnd As Double = CDbl(srcLaser2.Text)
                Dim lhFwdLen As Double = lhFwdEnd - lhFwdStart + LhFwdLenTol
                Dim lhFwdTime As Double = CDbl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideFwdTicTime.Text)
                Dim lhFwdSpeed As Double = lhFwdLen / Math.Max(0.001, lhFwdTime)

                FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideFwdEndPos.Text = lhFwdEnd.ToString("#0.0#")

                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideFwdLength,
                              FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideFwdLength,
                              BasicSlideFwdMovingLengthMin, BasicSlideFwdMovingLengthMax,
                              lhFwdLen, "#0.0#")
                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideFwdAmp,
                              FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideFwdAmp,
                              BasicSlideFwdAmpMin, BasicSlideFwdAmpMax,
                              TmpAmpMAx1, "0.0")
                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideFwdNoise,
                              FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideFwdNoise,
                              BasicSlideFwdNoiseMin, BasicSlideFwdNoiseMax,
                              TmpNoiseMax1, "0.0")
                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideFwdSpeed,
                              FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideFwdSpeed,
                              BasicSlideFwdSpeedMin, BasicSlideFwdSpeedMax,
                              lhFwdSpeed, "#0.0#")

                AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] LH Relax 완료 (Len={lhFwdLen:F1} Amp={TmpAmpMAx1:F2} Noise={TmpNoiseMax1:F1} Spd={lhFwdSpeed:F2})")
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 55

                ' ── LH Return (BWD) ──
            ElseIf nStep = 55 Then
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 1 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] LH Return (BWD) 시작")
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdStartPos.Text = srcLaser2.Text
                    _can.AddJobOnce("LH_RETURN_1", &H2A5, &H10, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    _can.AddJobOnce("LH_RETURN_2", &H2A5, &H10, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    ErrCount1 = 0
                    TmpAmpMAx1 = 0
                    TmpNoiseMax1 = 0
                    stats.Reset()
                    CalcCount1 = 0
                    StopStep = 0
                    LaserBefore = 0
                    LaserNow = 0
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 56
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 56 Then
                ' LH Return 모터 시작 대기
                If ValueAmp1 > 1 Then
                    testSw.Restart()
                    nStep = 57
                End If
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 10 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] LH Return 타임아웃")
                    nStep = 59
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 57 Then
                ' LH BWD 데이터 수집
                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                stats.Push(TotalTime1, ValueAmp1, ValueNoise)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphSlideAmp, 1, TotalTime1, ValueAmp1)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphSlideNoise, 1, TotalTime1, ValueNoise)
                FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdTicTime.Text = TotalTime1.ToString("0.0#")

                If TotalTime1 > 2 Then
                    If StopStep = 0 Then
                        LaserBefore = CDbl(srcLaser2.Text)
                        StopStep = 1
                    ElseIf StopStep = 1 Then
                        LaserNow = CDbl(srcLaser2.Text)
                        StopStep = 0
                    End If
                    If ValueAmp1 < 0.32 Then
                        CalcCount1 += 1
                    Else
                        CalcCount1 = 0
                    End If
                    If CalcCount1 >= 3 Then
                        nStep = 58
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 58 Then
                ' LH BWD 판정
                stats.GetMaxInRange(1.0, TotalTime1 - 1.0, TmpAmpMAx1, TmpNoiseMax1)

                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphSlideAmp,
                      yLines:=New Double() {},
                      xLines:=New Double() {1, TotalTime1 - 2},
                      yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                      lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)
                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphSlideNoise,
                      yLines:=New Double() {},
                      xLines:=New Double() {1, TotalTime1 - 2},
                      yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                      lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)

                Dim lhBwdStart As Double = CDbl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdStartPos.Text)
                Dim lhBwdEnd As Double = CDbl(srcLaser2.Text)
                Dim lhBwdLen As Double = Math.Abs(lhBwdEnd - lhBwdStart) + LhBwdLenTol
                Dim lhBwdTime As Double = CDbl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdTicTime.Text)
                Dim lhBwdSpeed As Double = lhBwdLen / Math.Max(0.001, lhBwdTime)

                FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdEndPos.Text = lhBwdEnd.ToString("#0.0#")

                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdLength,
                              FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideBwdLength,
                              BasicSlideBwdMovingLengthMin, BasicSlideBwdMovingLengthMax,
                              lhBwdLen, "#0.0#")
                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdAmp,
                              FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideBwdAmp,
                              BasicSlideBwdAmpMin, BasicSlideBwdAmpMax,
                              TmpAmpMAx1, "0.0")
                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdNoise,
                              FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideBwdNoise,
                              BasicSlideBwdNoiseMin, BasicSlideBwdNoiseMax,
                              TmpNoiseMax1, "0.0")
                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdSpeed,
                              FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideBwdSpeed,
                              BasicSlideBwdSpeedMin, BasicSlideBwdSpeedMax,
                              lhBwdSpeed, "0.0")

                AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] LH Return 완료 (Len={lhBwdLen:F1} Amp={TmpAmpMAx1:F2} Noise={TmpNoiseMax1:F1} Spd={lhBwdSpeed:F2})")
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 59

                ' ── RH Relax (FWD) ──
            ElseIf nStep = 59 Then
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 1 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] RH Relax (FWD) 시작")
                    srclbValSlideFwdStartPos.Text = srcLaser1.Text
                    _can.AddJobOnce("RH_RELAX_1", &H2A5, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    _can.AddJobOnce("RH_RELAX_2", &H2A5, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    ErrCount1 = 0
                    TmpAmpMAx1 = 0
                    TmpNoiseMax1 = 0
                    stats.Reset()
                    CalcCount1 = 0
                    StopStep = 0
                    LaserBefore = 0
                    LaserNow = 0
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 60
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 60 Then
                ' RH Relax 모터 시작 대기
                If ValueAmp1 > 1 Then
                    testSw.Restart()
                    nStep = 61
                End If
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 10 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] RH Relax 타임아웃")
                    nStep = 63
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 61 Then
                ' RH FWD 데이터 수집
                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                stats.Push(TotalTime1, ValueAmp1, ValueNoise)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(srcGraphSlideAmp, 0, TotalTime1, ValueAmp1)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(srcGraphSlideNoise, 0, TotalTime1, ValueNoise)
                srclbValSlideFwdTicTime.Text = TotalTime1.ToString("0.0#")

                If TotalTime1 > 2 Then
                    If StopStep = 0 Then
                        LaserBefore = CDbl(srcLaser1.Text)
                        StopStep = 1
                    ElseIf StopStep = 1 Then
                        LaserNow = CDbl(srcLaser1.Text)
                        StopStep = 0
                    End If
                    If ValueAmp1 < 0.32 Then
                        CalcCount1 += 1
                    Else
                        CalcCount1 = 0
                    End If
                    If CalcCount1 >= 3 Then
                        nStep = 62
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 62 Then
                ' RH FWD 판정
                stats.GetMaxInRange(1.0, TotalTime1 - 1.0, TmpAmpMAx1, TmpNoiseMax1)

                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(srcGraphSlideAmp,
                      yLines:=New Double() {},
                      xLines:=New Double() {1, TotalTime1 - 2},
                      yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                      lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)
                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(srcGraphSlideNoise,
                      yLines:=New Double() {},
                      xLines:=New Double() {1, TotalTime1 - 2},
                      yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                      lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)

                Dim rhFwdStart As Double = CDbl(srclbValSlideFwdStartPos.Text)
                Dim rhFwdEnd As Double = CDbl(srcLaser1.Text)
                Dim rhFwdLen As Double = rhFwdEnd - rhFwdStart + RhFwdLenTol
                Dim rhFwdTime As Double = CDbl(srclbValSlideFwdTicTime.Text)
                Dim rhFwdSpeed As Double = rhFwdLen / Math.Max(0.001, rhFwdTime)

                srclbValSlideFwdEndPos.Text = rhFwdEnd.ToString("#0.0#")

                DecideControl(srclbValSlideFwdLength,
                              srclbDecSlideFwdLength,
                              BasicSlideFwdMovingLengthMin, BasicSlideFwdMovingLengthMax,
                              rhFwdLen, "#0.0#")
                DecideControl(srclbValSlideFwdAmp,
                              srclbDecSlideFwdAmp,
                              BasicSlideFwdAmpMin, BasicSlideFwdAmpMax,
                              TmpAmpMAx1, "0.0")
                DecideControl(srclbValSlideFwdNoise,
                              srclbDecSlideFwdNoise,
                              BasicSlideFwdNoiseMin, BasicSlideFwdNoiseMax,
                              TmpNoiseMax1, "0.0")
                DecideControl(srclbValSlideFwdSpeed,
                              srclbDecSlideFwdSpeed,
                              BasicSlideFwdSpeedMin, BasicSlideFwdSpeedMax,
                              rhFwdSpeed, "#0.0#")

                AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] RH Relax 완료 (Len={rhFwdLen:F1} Amp={TmpAmpMAx1:F2} Noise={TmpNoiseMax1:F1} Spd={rhFwdSpeed:F2})")
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 63

                ' ── RH Return (BWD) ──
            ElseIf nStep = 63 Then
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 1 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] RH Return (BWD) 시작")
                    srclbValSlideBwdStartPos.Text = srcLaser1.Text
                    _can.AddJobOnce("RH_RETURN_1", &H2A5, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H2, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    _can.AddJobOnce("RH_RETURN_2", &H2A5, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H2, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    ErrCount1 = 0
                    TmpAmpMAx1 = 0
                    TmpNoiseMax1 = 0
                    stats.Reset()
                    CalcCount1 = 0
                    StopStep = 0
                    LaserBefore = 0
                    LaserNow = 0
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 64
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 64 Then
                ' RH Return 모터 시작 대기
                If ValueAmp1 > 1 Then
                    testSw.Restart()
                    nStep = 65
                End If
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 10 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] RH Return 타임아웃")
                    nStep = 70
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 65 Then
                ' RH BWD 데이터 수집
                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                stats.Push(TotalTime1, ValueAmp1, ValueNoise)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(srcGraphSlideAmp, 1, TotalTime1, ValueAmp1)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(srcGraphSlideNoise, 1, TotalTime1, ValueNoise)
                srclbValSlideBwdTicTime.Text = TotalTime1.ToString("0.0#")

                If TotalTime1 > 2 Then
                    If StopStep = 0 Then
                        LaserBefore = CDbl(srcLaser1.Text)
                        StopStep = 1
                    ElseIf StopStep = 1 Then
                        LaserNow = CDbl(srcLaser1.Text)
                        StopStep = 0
                    End If
                    If ValueAmp1 < 0.32 Then
                        CalcCount1 += 1
                    Else
                        CalcCount1 = 0
                    End If
                    If CalcCount1 >= 3 Then
                        nStep = 66
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 66 Then
                ' RH BWD 판정
                stats.GetMaxInRange(1.0, TotalTime1 - 1.0, TmpAmpMAx1, TmpNoiseMax1)

                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(srcGraphSlideAmp,
                      yLines:=New Double() {},
                      xLines:=New Double() {1, TotalTime1 - 2},
                      yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                      lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)
                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(srcGraphSlideNoise,
                      yLines:=New Double() {},
                      xLines:=New Double() {1, TotalTime1 - 2},
                      yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                      lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)

                Dim rhBwdStart As Double = CDbl(srclbValSlideBwdStartPos.Text)
                Dim rhBwdEnd As Double = CDbl(srcLaser1.Text)
                Dim rhBwdLen As Double = Math.Abs(rhBwdEnd - rhBwdStart) + RhBwdLenTol
                Dim rhBwdTime As Double = CDbl(srclbValSlideBwdTicTime.Text)
                Dim rhBwdSpeed As Double = rhBwdLen / Math.Max(0.001, rhBwdTime)

                srclbValSlideBwdEndPos.Text = rhBwdEnd.ToString("#0.0#")

                DecideControl(srclbValSlideBwdLength,
                              srclbDecSlideBwdLength,
                              BasicSlideBwdMovingLengthMin, BasicSlideBwdMovingLengthMax,
                              rhBwdLen, "#0.0#")
                DecideControl(srclbValSlideBwdAmp,
                              srclbDecSlideBwdAmp,
                              BasicSlideBwdAmpMin, BasicSlideBwdAmpMax,
                              TmpAmpMAx1, "0.0")
                DecideControl(srclbValSlideBwdNoise,
                              srclbDecSlideBwdNoise,
                              BasicSlideBwdNoiseMin, BasicSlideBwdNoiseMax,
                              TmpNoiseMax1, "0.0")
                DecideControl(srclbValSlideBwdSpeed,
                              srclbDecSlideBwdSpeed,
                              BasicSlideBwdSpeedMin, BasicSlideBwdSpeedMax,
                              rhBwdSpeed, "0.0")

                AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] RH Return 완료 (Len={rhBwdLen:F1} Amp={TmpAmpMAx1:F2} Noise={TmpNoiseMax1:F1} Spd={rhBwdSpeed:F2})")
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 70

                ' ─── nStep 70-77: 2차 학습체크 (리미트 세팅 없이 체크만) ───
            ElseIf nStep = 70 Then
                ' 1초 대기 후 LH 학습체크 시작
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 1 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] 2차 LH 학습체크 시작")
                    _nmlEduCheckResult = ""
                    _nmlEduCheckCount = 0
                    _can.AddJobOnce("EDU2_CHK_LH_A", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA6, &HF0, &H0, &H0)
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 71
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 71 Then
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 0.5 Then
                    _nmlEduCheckResult = ""
                    _can.AddJobOnce("EDU2_CHK_LH_B", &H731, &H4, &H31, &H3, &H12, &HA6, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 72
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 72 Then
                If _nmlEduCheckResult = "OK" Then
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULHFINAL.Text = "OK"
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULHFINAL.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] 2차 LH 학습체크 OK")
                    nStep = 74
                ElseIf _nmlEduCheckResult = "NG" Then
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULHFINAL.Text = "NG"
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULHFINAL.BackColor = Color.Red
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] 2차 LH 학습체크 NG")
                    nStep = 74
                ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 2 Then
                    _nmlEduCheckCount += 1
                    If _nmlEduCheckCount > 5 Then
                        FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULHFINAL.Text = "NG"
                        FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULHFINAL.BackColor = Color.Red
                        nStep = 74
                    Else
                        nStep = 70
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 74 Then
                ' RH 학습체크 시작
                _nmlEduCheckResult = ""
                _nmlEduCheckCount = 0
                _can.AddJobOnce("EDU2_CHK_RH_A", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA7, &HF0, &H0, &H0)
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 75

            ElseIf nStep = 75 Then
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 0.5 Then
                    _nmlEduCheckResult = ""
                    _can.AddJobOnce("EDU2_CHK_RH_B", &H731, &H4, &H31, &H3, &H12, &HA7, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 76
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 76 Then
                If _nmlEduCheckResult = "OK" Then
                    srclbDecEcuEDURHFINAL.Text = "OK"
                    srclbDecEcuEDURHFINAL.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] 2차 RH 학습체크 OK")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 90
                ElseIf _nmlEduCheckResult = "NG" Then
                    srclbDecEcuEDURHFINAL.Text = "NG"
                    srclbDecEcuEDURHFINAL.BackColor = Color.Red
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] 2차 RH 학습체크 NG")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 90
                ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 2 Then
                    _nmlEduCheckCount += 1
                    If _nmlEduCheckCount > 5 Then
                        srclbDecEcuEDURHFINAL.Text = "NG"
                        srclbDecEcuEDURHFINAL.BackColor = Color.Red
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 90
                    Else
                        nStep = 74
                    End If
                End If

                ' ─── nStep 90-91: RPSU DTC 클리어 (0x731) ───
            ElseIf nStep = 90 Then
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 0.5 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] RPSU DTC Clear (0x731)")
                    _nmlDtcClearResult = ""
                    _can.AddJobOnce("RPSU_CLR", &H731, &H4, &H14, &HFF, &HFF, &HFF, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 91
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 91 Then
                If _nmlDtcClearResult = "OK" Then
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbrpsudtcclear.Text = "OK"
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbrpsudtcclear.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] RPSU DTC Clear OK")
                    nStep = 99
                ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 3 Then
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbrpsudtcclear.Text = "NG"
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbrpsudtcclear.BackColor = Color.Red
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] RPSU DTC Clear NG (타임아웃)")
                    nStep = 99
                End If

                ' ─── nStep 99: 완료 ───
            ElseIf nStep = 99 Then
                AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] 전체 시퀀스 완료")
                FlagNmlDone = True
                nStep = 0
                tmrNormalTest.Stop()

            End If

        Catch ex As Exception
            AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL 예외] " & ex.Message)
        End Try

    End Sub

    ' NORMAL SW 버전 응답용 변수
    Private _nmlSwVersion As String = ""
    Private _nmlSwRespId As UInteger = 0
    Private _nmlHwVersion As String = ""
    Private _nmlHwRespId As UInteger = 0
    Private strHwVersion As String = ""
    Private _versionPhase As String = "SW"  ' "SW" → "HW" 2패스

    ' NORMAL DTC 클리어 응답용 변수
    Private _nmlDtcClearResult As String = ""

End Class

    Private Function StrPtr(ByVal x As String) As Integer
        Return VarPtr(x)
    End Function
    Private Function VarPtr(ByVal obj As Object) As Integer
        ' Obtain a pinned handle to the object
        Dim handle As GCHandle = GCHandle.Alloc(obj, GCHandleType.Pinned)
        Dim pointer As Integer = handle.AddrOfPinnedObject.ToInt32

        ' Free the allocated handle. At this point the GC can move the object in memory, this is 
        ' why this function does not exist in .NET. If you were to use this pointer as a destination 
        ' for memcopy for example, you could overwrite unintended memory, which would crash the 
        ' application or cause unexpected behavior. For this function to work you would need to
        ' maintain the handle until after you are finished using it.
        handle.Free()

        Return pointer
    End Function
    Sub SerialOpen()

        Try
            If Serial_Supply1.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Supply1.Close()
                Serial_Supply1.PortName = PortNumberAmp1
                Serial_Supply1.Parity = Ports.Parity.None
                Serial_Supply1.Handshake = Ports.Handshake.XOnXOff
                Serial_Supply1.BaudRate = 9600
                Serial_Supply1.StopBits = Ports.StopBits.One
                Serial_Supply1.DataBits = 8
                Serial_Supply1.Open()
            Else
                Serial_Supply1.PortName = PortNumberAmp1
                Serial_Supply1.Parity = Ports.Parity.None
                Serial_Supply1.Handshake = Ports.Handshake.XOnXOff
                Serial_Supply1.BaudRate = 9600
                Serial_Supply1.StopBits = Ports.StopBits.One
                Serial_Supply1.DataBits = 8
                Serial_Supply1.Open()
            End If
            Serial_Supply1.WriteLine("*ADR 1")
            RequestStep1 = 0
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Supply1  Fail " & PortNumberAmp1)
        End Try

        Try
            SerialScanner1.PortName = PortNumberScanner1
            If SerialScanner1.IsOpen() = True Then
                SerialScanner1.Close()
                SerialScanner1.DataBits = 8
                SerialScanner1.Open()
            Else
                SerialScanner1.BaudRate = 9600
                SerialScanner1.DataBits = 8
                SerialScanner1.Open()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Scanner1 Fail " & PortNumberScanner1)
        End Try

        Try
            SerialPrinter1.PortName = PortNumberPrinter1
            If SerialPrinter1.IsOpen() = True Then
                SerialPrinter1.Close()
                SerialPrinter1.DataBits = 8
                SerialPrinter1.Open()
            Else
                SerialPrinter1.BaudRate = 9600
                SerialPrinter1.DataBits = 8
                SerialPrinter1.Open()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Printer1 Fail " & PortNumberPrinter1)
        End Try

        Try
            SerialPrinter2.PortName = PortNumberPrinter2
            If SerialPrinter2.IsOpen() = True Then
                SerialPrinter2.Close()
                SerialPrinter2.DataBits = 8
                SerialPrinter2.Open()
            Else
                SerialPrinter2.BaudRate = 9600
                SerialPrinter2.DataBits = 8
                SerialPrinter2.Open()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Printer2 Fail " & PortNumberPrinter2)
        End Try

        'Try
        '    SerialCAN.PortName = PortNumberCAN
        '    If SerialCAN.IsOpen() = True Then
        '        SerialCAN.Close()
        '        SerialCAN.DataBits = 8
        '        SerialCAN.Open()
        '    Else
        '        SerialCAN.BaudRate = 115200
        '        SerialCAN.DataBits = 8
        '        SerialCAN.Open()
        '    End If
        'Catch ex As Exception
        '    MsgBox("Serial Open CAN Fail " & PortNumberCAN)
        'End Try

        'Try
        '    SerialLinRH.PortName = PortNumberLinRH
        '    If SerialLinRH.IsOpen() = True Then
        '        SerialLinRH.Close()
        '        SerialLinRH.DataBits = 8
        '        SerialLinRH.Open()
        '    Else
        '        SerialLinRH.BaudRate = 38400
        '        SerialLinRH.DataBits = 8
        '        SerialLinRH.Open()
        '    End If
        'Catch ex As Exception
        '    MsgBox("Serial Open Lin RH Fail " & PortNumberLinRH)
        'End Try

    End Sub
    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

        Dim Incoming1 As String = ""
        Dim Incoming2 As String = ""
        Dim RecvString1 As String = ""
        Dim RecvString2 As String = ""

        Do
            Try
                If Serial_Supply1.IsOpen = True Then
                    If Serial_Supply1.BytesToRead > 0 Then
                        Incoming1 = Serial_Supply1.ReadChar
                        If Incoming1 = 13 Then
                            If RequestStep1 = 1 Then
                                ValueVolt1 = CDbl(RecvString1)
                                RequestStep1 = 2
                            ElseIf RequestStep1 = 3 Then
                                ValueAmp1 = CDbl(RecvString1)
                                RequestStep1 = 4
                            End If
                            RecvString1 = ""
                            Serial_Supply1.DiscardInBuffer()
                        Else
                            RecvString1 = RecvString1 & Chr(Incoming1)
                        End If
                    End If
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
                RecvString1 = ""
                RequestStep1 = 0
            End Try

            Application.DoEvents()

        Loop

    End Sub
    Private Sub CanWrite(str As String)

        SerialCAN.Write(str)
        tmpLogCount = tmpLogCount + 1
        'T 535 8 1D 02 00 00 00 00 FF FF
        tmpLog(tmpLogCount) = "->" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss") & " " &
                                Mid(str, 2, 3) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 6, 2) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 8, 2) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 10, 2) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 12, 2) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 14, 2) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 16, 2) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 18, 2) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 20, 2)

    End Sub
    Private Sub ThreadTask3()

        Do

            If SerialCAN.IsOpen = True Then

                If CanSTep = 2000 Then 'RL CCS CLEAR LH
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 712 8 04 14 FF FF FF 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 2001 Then
                    '클리어 완료 신호 대기
                ElseIf CanSTep = 2020 Then 'RR CCS CLEAR RH
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 707 8 04 14 FF FF FF 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 2021 Then
                    '클리어 완료 신호 대기
                ElseIf CanSTep = 10 Then ' LH FWD
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 08 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 20 Then 'LH BWD
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 02 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 30 Then 'LH STOP
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 04 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanCount = CanCount + 1
                    If CanCount >= 2 Then CanSTep = 0
                ElseIf CanSTep = 40 Then 'LH EDU
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A6 42 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 41 Then
                    If OPTION_LHRH = "LH" Then
                        CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A6 F0 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    ElseIf OPTION_LHRH = "RH" Then
                        CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A7 F0 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    End If
                    CanSTep = 42
                ElseIf CanSTep = 42 Then
                    If OPTION_LHRH = "LH" Then
                        CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 04 31 03 12 A6 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    ElseIf OPTION_LHRH = "RH" Then
                        CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 04 31 03 12 A7 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    End If
                    CanSTep = 43
                ElseIf CanSTep = 110 Then ' RH FWD
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 80 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 120 Then 'RH BWD
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 20 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 130 Then 'RH STOP
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 40 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanCount = CanCount + 1
                    If CanCount >= 2 Then CanSTep = 0
                ElseIf CanSTep = 140 Then 'RH EDU
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A7 42 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 0 Then
                ElseIf CanSTep = 200 Then 'LH VENT
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 04 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 201
                ElseIf CanSTep = 201 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 3E0 8 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 202
                ElseIf CanSTep = 202 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 3E0 8 00 00 00 00 50 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 203
                ElseIf CanSTep = 203 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A2 8 00 00 00 00 00 50 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 204
                ElseIf CanSTep = 204 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 418 8 00 00 00 00 10 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 205
                ElseIf CanSTep = 205 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 3E0 8 00 00 00 00 50 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 204
                ElseIf CanSTep = 300 Then 'RH VENT
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 40 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 301
                ElseIf CanSTep = 301 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 3E0 8 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 302
                ElseIf CanSTep = 302 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 3E0 8 00 00 00 00 50 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 303
                ElseIf CanSTep = 303 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A2 8 00 00 00 00 00 05 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 304
                ElseIf CanSTep = 304 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 418 8 00 00 00 00 10 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 305
                ElseIf CanSTep = 305 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 3E0 8 00 00 00 00 50 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 304
                ElseIf CanSTep = 500 Then  'LH 학습 체크
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A6 F0 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 501
                ElseIf CanSTep = 501 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 04 31 03 12 A6 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 500
                ElseIf CanSTep = 600 Then 'RH 학습 체크
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A7 F0 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 601
                ElseIf CanSTep = 601 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 04 31 03 12 A7 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 600
                ElseIf CanSTep = 1000 Then 'LH RH 동시 학습
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A6 42 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 1001
                ElseIf CanSTep = 1001 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A7 42 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 1000
                End If

            End If

            Thread.Sleep(Thread3Delay)
            Application.DoEvents()

        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Sub Dec2Bin(ByVal Port_0 As Integer, ByVal Port_1 As Integer)

        Dim iten As Integer
        Dim sbin As String
        Dim tmp As String
        Dim i As Integer

        iten = CInt(Port_0)
        sbin = ""
        Do Until iten = 0
            sbin = CStr((iten Mod 2)) & sbin
            iten = iten \ 2
        Loop

        tmp = ""
        For i = 1 To 8 - Len(sbin)
            tmp = tmp & "0"
        Next

        D_Value(0) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 8, 1))
        D_Value(1) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 7, 1))
        D_Value(2) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 6, 1))
        D_Value(3) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 5, 1))
        D_Value(4) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 4, 1))
        D_Value(5) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 3, 1))
        D_Value(6) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 2, 1))
        D_Value(7) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 1, 1))

        iten = CInt(Port_1)
        sbin = ""
        Do Until iten = 0
            sbin = CStr((iten Mod 2)) & sbin
            iten = iten \ 2

        Loop

        tmp = ""
        For i = 1 To 8 - Len(sbin)
            tmp = tmp & "0"
        Next

        D_Value(8) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 8, 1))
        D_Value(9) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 7, 1))
        D_Value(10) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 6, 1))
        D_Value(11) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 5, 1))
        D_Value(12) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 4, 1))
        D_Value(13) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 3, 1))
        D_Value(14) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 2, 1))
        D_Value(15) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 1, 1))

        For i = 0 To 15
            If D_Value(i) = 1 Then
                D_Value(i) = 0
            Else
                D_Value(i) = 1
            End If
        Next

    End Sub
    Private Sub RequestSupply(ByVal SupplyPort As System.IO.Ports.SerialPort, ByVal strMsg As String)

        Try
            If SupplyPort.IsOpen = True Then
                SupplyPort.WriteLine(strMsg)
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try

    End Sub
    Private Sub TmrIO_Tick(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles TmrIO.Tick

        Dim err1 As ErrorCode = ErrorCode.Success
        Dim err2 As ErrorCode = ErrorCode.Success
        Dim tmp1 As Byte
        Dim tmp2 As Byte

        err1 = InstantDiCtrl1.Read(0, tmp1)
        err2 = InstantDiCtrl1.Read(1, tmp2)

        Dec2Bin(CInt(tmp1), CInt(tmp2))

        For i As Integer = 0 To 15
            If D_Value(i) = 0 Then
                IO_IN_LABEL(i).BackColor = Color.White
            Else
                IO_IN_LABEL(i).BackColor = Color.Black
            End If
        Next i

        lbRequestStep1.Text = RequestStep1
        lbRequestCount1.Text = RequestCount1
        RequestCount1 = RequestCount1 + 0.1
        If RequestCount1 >= 2 Then
            RequestStep1 = 0
            RequestCount1 = 0
        End If
        If RequestStep1 = 0 Then
            If SupplyFastMode Then
                ' Fast 모드: CURR만 측정 (VOLT 건너뜀)
                RequestSupply(Serial_Supply1, "MEAS:CURR?")
                RequestStep1 = 3
            Else
                ' Normal 모드: VOLT + CURR 순차 측정
                RequestSupply(Serial_Supply1, "MEAS:VOLT?")
                RequestStep1 = 1
            End If
        ElseIf RequestStep1 = 1 Then
            'if data Recv VOLT
        ElseIf RequestStep1 = 2 Then
            RequestSupply(Serial_Supply1, "MEAS:CURR?")
            RequestStep1 = 3
        ElseIf RequestStep1 = 4 Then
            RequestSupply(Serial_Supply1, "SOURS:VOLT " & CStr(TargetVolt))
            RequestStep1 = 0
        End If


        LbSupply1Volt.Text = ValueVolt1
        LbSupply1Amp.Text = ValueAmp1

    End Sub
    Sub Do_On(ByVal Num As Integer)

        Dim P1 As Integer
        Dim P2 As Integer

        Out_(Num) = 1

        If Out_(0) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 1
        If Out_(1) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 2
        If Out_(2) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 4
        If Out_(3) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 8
        If Out_(4) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 16
        If Out_(5) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 32
        If Out_(6) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 64
        If Out_(7) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 128

        If Out_(8) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 1
        If Out_(9) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 2
        If Out_(10) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 4
        If Out_(11) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 8
        If Out_(12) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 16
        If Out_(13) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 32
        If Out_(14) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 64
        If Out_(15) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 128

        Dim err As ErrorCode = ErrorCode.Success
        err = InstantDoCtrl1.Write(0, CByte(P1))
        err = InstantDoCtrl1.Write(1, CByte(P2))

        IO_OUT_LABEL(Num).BackColor = Color.Black

    End Sub
    Sub Do_Off(ByVal Num As Integer)

        Dim P1 As Integer
        Dim P2 As Integer

        Out_(Num) = 0

        If Out_(0) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 1
        If Out_(1) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 2
        If Out_(2) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 4
        If Out_(3) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 8
        If Out_(4) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 16
        If Out_(5) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 32
        If Out_(6) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 64
        If Out_(7) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 128

        If Out_(8) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 1
        If Out_(9) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 2
        If Out_(10) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 4
        If Out_(11) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 8
        If Out_(12) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 16
        If Out_(13) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 32
        If Out_(14) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 64
        If Out_(15) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 128

        Dim err As ErrorCode = ErrorCode.Success
        err = InstantDoCtrl1.Write(0, CByte(P1))
        err = InstantDoCtrl1.Write(1, CByte(P2))

        IO_OUT_LABEL(Num).BackColor = Color.White

    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmMain_Load(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Me.Load

        CheckForIllegalCrossThreadCalls = False

        ' PLC ActiveX 컨트롤 코드에서 생성
        ActPlc = New AxACTETHERLib.AxActQNUDECPUTCP()
        CType(ActPlc, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).BeginInit()
        Me.Controls.Add(ActPlc)
        CType(ActPlc, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).EndInit()
        ActPlc.Visible = False

        LhScanCompleted = False
        RhScanCompleted = False

        Thread3Delay = 500
        FlagLog = False
        wStep = 0

        ' SQLite 로컬 DB 초기화
        InitLocalDB()

        ' NORMAL 타겟 컬럼 생성 (없으면)
        EnsureNormalColumns()

        LoadPortData()
        LoadBarcodeData()
        LoadBasicData()
        LoadBasic2()
        InitControl()
        InitControlLH()
        InitTest()
        InitTestLH()
        SerialOpen()

        TmrWork.Interval = 100
        TmrWork.Start()

        Control2Arry()

        Try
            InstantDoCtrl1.SelectedDevice = New DeviceInformation(1)
            InstantDiCtrl1.SelectedDevice = New DeviceInformation(1)
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try

        TmrIO.Interval = 100
        TmrIO.Start()

        DaqStart()

        For i As Integer = 0 To 15
            Do_Off(i)
        Next

        Trd1 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask1)
        Trd1.IsBackground = True
        Trd1.Start()

        Trd2 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTaskTest)
        Trd2.IsBackground = True
        Trd2.Start()


        ActPlc.ActTimeOut = 500
        AddressOfPLc = PlcIpAddress
        FlagPlcConnection = False

        InitSrcDMap()

        Tmr_Connect.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Connect.Start()
        CanSTep = 0
        For i As Integer = 1 To 9
            WritePlc("D", "405" & CStr(i), "0")
        Next
        wStep = 0

    End Sub

    Private Sub SerialScanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles SerialScanner1.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim ScanData As String

        Incoming = SerialScanner1.ReadLine()
        ScanData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)

        SerialScanner1.DiscardInBuffer()
        srcScannerInput.Text = ScanData

        'If wStep = 1 Then
        If ScanData.Contains("21100-") = True Then 'LH
            'If ScanData.Contains("21100") = True Or ScanData.Contains("23000") = True Then 'LH
            If Len(ScanData) >= 23 Then
                CanSTep = 0
                InitControlLH()
                For i As Integer = 0 To 15
                    Do_Off(i)
                Next
                For i As Integer = 1 To 9
                    WritePlc("D", "405" & CStr(i), "0")
                Next
                LoadBasicData()
                LoadBasic2()
                InitTestLH()
                SearchLineSerial(ScanData)
                tmpLogCount = 0
                If TmpSerial <> "" And TmpPartNo <> "" Then
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcLbPartNo.Text = TmpPartNo
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcLbSerial.Text = TmpSerial
                    LoadPartLH(TmpPartNo)
                    wStep = 4
                Else
                    wStep = 2.1
                End If
            End If

        ElseIf ScanData.Contains("22100-") = True Then 'RH
            'ElseIf ScanData.Contains("22100") = True Or ScanData.Contains("24000") = True Then 'RH
            If Len(ScanData) >= 23 Then
                CanSTep = 0
                InitControl()
                For i As Integer = 0 To 15
                    Do_Off(i)
                Next
                For i As Integer = 1 To 9
                    WritePlc("D", "405" & CStr(i), "0")
                Next
                LoadBasicData()
                LoadBasic2()
                InitTest()
                SearchLineSerial(ScanData)
                tmpLogCount = 0
                If TmpSerial <> "" And TmpPartNo <> "" Then
                    srcLbPartNo.Text = TmpPartNo
                    srcLbSerial.Text = TmpSerial
                    LoadPartRH(TmpPartNo)
                    wStep = 4
                Else
                    wStep = 2.1
                End If
            End If

        End If

        'End If

    End Sub
    Private Sub SearchLineSerial(ByVal str As String)

        TmpPartNo = ""
        TmpSerial = ""
        TmpLHRH = ""

        ConnectionOpen()
        Dim Rs1 As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs1.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs1.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs1.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs1.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_MainLH WHERE LineSerialCush = '" & str & "' OR LineSerialRecl = '" & str & "' OR LineSerialBack = '" & str & "'", SqlConnect)
        If Rs1.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            TmpPartNo = Trim(Rs1.Fields("PartNO").Value)
            TmpSerial = Trim(Rs1.Fields("LineSerial").Value)
            TmpLHRH = "LH"
        End If
        Rs1.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs1.Close()
        ConnectionClose()
        ConnectionOpen()
        Dim Rs2 As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs2.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs2.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs2.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs2.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_MainRH WHERE LineSerialCush = '" & str & "' OR LineSerialRecl = '" & str & "' OR LineSerialBack = '" & str & "'", SqlConnect)
        If Rs2.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            TmpPartNo = Trim(Rs2.Fields("PartNO").Value)
            TmpSerial = Trim(Rs2.Fields("LineSerial").Value)
            TmpLHRH = "RH"
        End If
        Rs2.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs2.Close()
        ConnectionClose()

    End Sub
    Private Sub LoadPartLH(ByVal strPart As String)

        ConnectionOpen()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Partassy WHERE PartNo = '" & strPart & "'", SqlConnect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")
            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcLbPartName.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("PartName").Value)
            LhScanCompleted = True
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        ConnectionClose()

    End Sub
    Private Sub LoadPartRH(ByVal strPart As String)

        ConnectionOpen()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Partassy WHERE PartNo = '" & strPart & "'", SqlConnect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")
            srcLbPartName.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("PartName").Value)
            ' Type 필드로 모드 결정: STD→NORMAL(CAN 2.0), ICE→PE(CAN FD)
            Try
                CommType = Trim(CStr(Rs.Fields("Type").Value)).ToUpper()
            Catch
                CommType = "ICE"
            End Try
            RhScanCompleted = True
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        ConnectionClose()

    End Sub
    Private Function LoadToolData(ByVal strSErial As String) As String

        ConnectionOpen()

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE Serial_No = '" & strSErial & "'", SqlConnect)

        If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            Try
                tmp = Trim(Rs.Fields("OP20_2_TOOL_VALUE").Value)
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try
        Else
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        ConnectionClose()

        Return tmp

    End Function
    Private Function ConvertStr(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        If str = "NA" Then
            tmp = ""
        Else
            tmp = str
        End If
        Return tmp

    End Function

    Sub BarcodePrintLH_rs232()

        Dim StartCode As String
        Dim EndCode As String
        Dim aCode As String
        Dim vCode As String
        Dim pCode As String
        Dim sCode As String
        Dim eCode As String
        Dim tCode As String
        Dim mCode As String
        Dim cCode As String

        Dim RS As String = "_1e"
        Dim GS As String = "_1d"
        Dim EOT As String = "_04"

        Dim tmpSerial As String = FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcLbSerial.Text

        StartCode = "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS
        vCode = "V" & "SN1C" & GS
        pCode = "P" & FrmMainLH.srcLbPartNo.Text.Replace("-", "") & GS
        ' CommType별 sCode 분기
        Select Case CommType
            Case "ICE" : sCode = "S" & "GN01" & GS
            Case "HEV" : sCode = "S" & "GR01" & GS
            Case Else : sCode = "S" & "CN00" & GS
        End Select
        eCode = "E" & "" & GS
        tCode = "T" & Mid(tmpSerial, 3, 6) & "DA1SAS1GN7PF" & Mid(tmpSerial, 9, 4) & GS
        aCode = "A" & GS
        mCode = "M" & GS
        cCode = "C" & GS
        EndCode = RS & EOT

        TmpEndSerial = StartCode & vCode & pCode & sCode & eCode & tCode & mCode & cCode & EndCode

        SerialPrinter1.Write("^XA")
        SerialPrinter1.Write("^FO" & BarcodeBX & "," & BarcodeBY & "^BY5^BXN," & BarcodeBH & ",200,,,,^FH^FD" & TmpEndSerial & "^FS")
        SerialPrinter1.Write("^FO" & BarcodeS1X & "," & BarcodeS1Y & "^A0N," & BarcodeS1H & "," & BarcodeS1W & "^FD" & FrmMainLH.srcLbPartNo.Text & "^FS")
        SerialPrinter1.Write("^FO" & BarcodeS2X & "," & BarcodeS2Y & "^A0N," & BarcodeS2H & "," & BarcodeS2W & "^FD" & tmpSerial & "^FS")
        SerialPrinter1.Write("^FO" & BarcodeS3X & "," & BarcodeS3Y & "^A0N," & BarcodeS3H & "," & BarcodeS3W & "^FD" & FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcLbPartName.Text & "^FS")
        SerialPrinter1.Write("^XZ")

    End Sub

    Sub BarcodePrintLH_ethernet()

        Dim StartCode As String
        Dim EndCode As String
        Dim aCode As String
        Dim vCode As String
        Dim pCode As String
        Dim sCode As String
        Dim eCode As String
        Dim tCode As String
        Dim mCode As String
        Dim cCode As String

        Dim RS As String = "_1e"
        Dim GS As String = "_1d"
        Dim EOT As String = "_04"

        Dim tmpSerial As String = FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcLbSerial.Text

        StartCode = "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS
        vCode = "V" & "SN1C" & GS
        pCode = "P" & Mid(tmpSerial, 13, 5) & Mid(tmpSerial, 19, 5) & GS
        ' CommType별 sCode 분기
        Select Case CommType
            Case "ICE" : sCode = "S" & "GN01" & GS
            Case "HEV" : sCode = "S" & "GR01" & GS
            Case Else : sCode = "S" & "CN00" & GS
        End Select
        eCode = "E" & "" & GS
        tCode = "T" & Mid(tmpSerial, 3, 6) & "DA1SAS1GN7PF" & Mid(tmpSerial, 9, 4) & GS
        aCode = "A" & GS
        mCode = "M" & GS
        cCode = "C" & GS
        EndCode = RS & EOT

        TmpEndSerial = StartCode & vCode & pCode & sCode & eCode & tCode & mCode & cCode & EndCode

        ' -----------------------------
        '  ZPL 문자열 구성
        ' -----------------------------
        Dim sb As New StringBuilder()

        sb.Append("^XA")
        sb.Append($"^FO{BarcodeBX},{BarcodeBY}^BY5^BXN,{BarcodeBH},200,,,,^FH^FD{TmpEndSerial}^FS")
        sb.Append($"^FO{BarcodeS1X},{BarcodeS1Y}^A0N,{BarcodeS1H},{BarcodeS1W}^FD{Mid(tmpSerial, 13, 5)}-{Mid(tmpSerial, 19, 8)}^FS")
        sb.Append($"^FO{BarcodeS2X},{BarcodeS2Y}^A0N,{BarcodeS2H},{BarcodeS2W}^FD{tmpSerial}^FS")
        sb.Append($"^FO{BarcodeS3X},{BarcodeS3Y}^A0N,{BarcodeS3H},{BarcodeS3W}^FD{FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcLbPartName.Text}^FS")
        sb.Append("^XZ")

        Dim zpl As String = sb.ToString()

        ' -----------------------------
        '  이더넷(ZT411)으로 전송
        ' -----------------------------
        SendToZebraEthernetLH(zpl)

    End Sub
