    Private Sub SendToZebraEthernetRH(ByVal zpl As String)
        'ZT411 IP/포트 (프린터 설정에 맞게 변경)
        Const printerIp As String = "192.168.0.15"   ' ← ZT411 IP
        Const printerPort As Integer = 9100          ' RAW 포트(기본 9100)

        Dim client As TcpClient = Nothing
        Dim ns As NetworkStream = Nothing

        Try
            client = New TcpClient()
            client.Connect(printerIp, printerPort)

            ns = client.GetStream()
            Dim data As Byte() = Encoding.ASCII.GetBytes(zpl)

            ns.Write(data, 0, data.Length)
            ns.Flush()
        Catch ex As Exception
            ' 여기서 로그 함수 쓰면 됨
            ' AppendLog("Zebra 이더넷 전송 오류: " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            If ns IsNot Nothing Then
                ns.Close()
            End If
            If client IsNot Nothing Then
                client.Close()
            End If
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Function Laser2Angle(ByVal vLaser As Double) As Double

        Dim tmp As Double = 0
        Try
            For i As Integer = 0 To UBound(LASER) - 1
                If vLaser >= LASER(i) And vLaser <= LASER(i + 1) Then
                    tmp = Calc(LASER(i), ANGLE(i), LASER(i + 1), ANGLE(i + 1), vLaser)
                End If
            Next i

        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

        Return tmp

    End Function
    Private Function Laser2Angle_Frest(ByVal vLaser As Double) As Double

        Dim tmp As Double = 0
        Try
            For i As Integer = 0 To UBound(LASER_FREST) - 1
                If vLaser >= LASER_FREST(i) And vLaser <= LASER_FREST(i + 1) Then
                    tmp = Calc(LASER_FREST(i), ANGLE_FREST(i), LASER_FREST(i + 1), ANGLE_FREST(i + 1), vLaser)
                End If
            Next i

        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

        Return tmp

    End Function
    Public Function Calc(ByVal aLaser As Double, ByVal aAngle As Double, ByVal bLaser As Double, ByVal bAngle As Double, ByVal val As Double) As Double

        Dim t As Double
        Dim tmp As Double = 0
        Try
            If aLaser = 0 And aAngle = 0 And bLaser = 0 And bAngle = 0 Then
                tmp = 0
            Else
                t = (aAngle - bAngle) / (aLaser - bLaser)
                tmp = (t * val) - (t * bLaser) + bAngle
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
        Return tmp

    End Function
    Private Sub LoadAngleData(ByVal strOption As String)

        ConnectionOpenMdb()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim i As Integer

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Angle_" & strOption & " ORDER BY LEN(LASER_LENGTH),LASER_LENGTH", MdbConnect)

        ReDim ANGLE(Rs.RecordCount)
        ReDim LASER(Rs.RecordCount)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 0 Then

        ElseIf Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            ANGLE(0) = Rs.Fields("CONVERT_ANGLE").Value
            LASER(0) = Rs.Fields("LASER_LENGTH").Value

        ElseIf Rs.RecordCount > 1 Then

            i = 0
            Rs.MoveFirst()

            Do Until Rs.EOF
                ANGLE(i) = Rs.Fields("CONVERT_ANGLE").Value
                LASER(i) = Rs.Fields("LASER_LENGTH").Value
                i = i + 1
                Rs.MoveNext()
            Loop

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        ConnectionCloseMdb()

    End Sub

        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Angle_FOOTREST ORDER BY LEN(LASER_LENGTH),LASER_LENGTH", MdbConnect)

        ReDim ANGLE_FREST(Rs.RecordCount)
        ReDim LASER_FREST(Rs.RecordCount)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 0 Then

        ElseIf Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            ANGLE_FREST(0) = Rs.Fields("CONVERT_ANGLE").Value
            LASER_FREST(0) = Rs.Fields("LASER_LENGTH").Value

        ElseIf Rs.RecordCount > 1 Then

            i = 0
            Rs.MoveFirst()

            Do Until Rs.EOF
                ANGLE_FREST(i) = Rs.Fields("CONVERT_ANGLE").Value
                LASER_FREST(i) = Rs.Fields("LASER_LENGTH").Value
                i = i + 1
                Rs.MoveNext()
            Loop

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        ConnectionCloseMdb()

    End Sub

    Private Sub WritePlc(ByVal strChr As String, ByVal StartArry As String, ByVal ArryMessage As String)

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'

        If srcLbPlcConnectionState.Text = "OK" Then

            ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Len(ArryMessage))

            For i As Integer = 0 To Len(ArryMessage) - 1
                szDeviceName = szDeviceName & strChr & Format((Int(StartArry) + i), "0000")
                If i <> Len(ArryMessage - 1) Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName + ControlChars.Lf
                If i < Len(ArryMessage) - 1 Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName & ControlChars.Lf
                sharrDeviceValue(i) = Mid(ArryMessage, i + 1, 1)
            Next
            Try
                iReturnCode = ActPlc.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Len(ArryMessage), sharrDeviceValue(0))
            Catch exception As Exception
                ' COM 에러 로그만 남기고 계속 진행 (MessageBox 제거 - UI 블록 방지)
                System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine("[PLC Write] " & exception.Message)
                FlagPlcConnection = False
                Exit Sub
            End Try

        End If

        'The return code of the method Is displayed by the hexadecimal.
        'txt_ReturnCode.Text = String.Format("0x{0:x8} [HEX]", iReturnCode)

    End Sub
    Private Sub ReadPLc()

        Dim tmpPlcValue(200) As Integer
        Dim i As Integer
        Dim j As Integer
        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim iNumberOfDeviceName As Integer = 0  'Data for 'DeviceSize'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short         'Data for 'DeviceValue'
        Dim szarrData() As String               'Array for 'Data'
        Dim iNumber As Integer                  'Loop counter
        Dim Arrysize As Integer = 20 + 1

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Arrysize - 1)
        ReDim szarrData(Arrysize - 1)

        szDeviceName = "D4000" & vbLf & "D4001" & vbLf & "D4002" & vbLf & "D4003" & vbLf & "D4004" & vbLf & "D4005" & vbLf & "D4006" & vbLf & "D4007" & vbLf & "D4008" & vbLf & "D4009" & vbLf &
                       "D4050" & vbLf & "D4051" & vbLf & "D4052" & vbLf & "D4053" & vbLf & "D4054" & vbLf & "D4055" & vbLf & "D4056" & vbLf & "D4057" & vbLf & "D4058" & vbLf & "D4059" & vbLf & "D4060"


        Try
            iReturnCode = ActPlc.ReadDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Arrysize, sharrDeviceValue(0))
        Catch exException As Exception
            ' COM 에러 로그만 남기고 계속 진행 (MessageBox 제거 - UI 블록 방지)
            System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine("[PLC Read] " & exException.Message)
            Exit Sub
        End Try

        'When the ReadDeviceRandom2 method is succeeded, display the read data.
        If iReturnCode = 0 Then

            'Copy the read data to the 'lpszarrData'.
            For iNumber = 0 To iNumberOfDeviceName - 1
                szarrData(iNumber) = sharrDeviceValue(iNumber).ToString()
            Next iNumber
            For i = 0 To Arrysize - 1
                tmpPlcValue(i) = CInt(sharrDeviceValue(i))
            Next i

            For i = 0 To 9
                PlcValue(i + 4000) = tmpPlcValue(i)
            Next
            For i = 10 To 20
                PlcValue(i + 4040) = tmpPlcValue(i)
            Next

            srcD4000.Text = PlcValue(4000).ToString
            srcD4001.Text = PlcValue(4001).ToString
            srcD4002.Text = PlcValue(4002).ToString
            srcD4003.Text = PlcValue(4003).ToString
            srcD4004.Text = PlcValue(4004).ToString
            srcD4005.Text = PlcValue(4005).ToString
            srcD4006.Text = PlcValue(4006).ToString
            srcD4007.Text = PlcValue(4007).ToString
            srcD4008.Text = PlcValue(4008).ToString
            srcD4009.Text = PlcValue(4009).ToString

            srcD4050.Text = PlcValue(4050).ToString
            srcD4051.Text = PlcValue(4051).ToString
            srcD4052.Text = PlcValue(4052).ToString
            srcD4053.Text = PlcValue(4053).ToString
            srcD4054.Text = PlcValue(4054).ToString
            srcD4055.Text = PlcValue(4055).ToString
            srcD4056.Text = PlcValue(4056).ToString
            srcD4057.Text = PlcValue(4057).ToString
            srcD4058.Text = PlcValue(4058).ToString
            srcD4059.Text = PlcValue(4059).ToString
            srcD4060.Text = PlcValue(4060).ToString

            UpdatePlcLabelsFast()
            PlcConnectionError = "OK"

        Else

            PlcConnectionError = Dec2Hex(iReturnCode)

        End If

    End Sub

    Private ReadOnly _srcDMap As New Dictionary(Of Integer, Control)
    Private Sub InitSrcDMap()
        CacheRange(4000, 10)
        CacheRange(4050, 11)
    End Sub
    Private Sub CacheRange(ByVal ctrlStart As Integer, ByVal count As Integer)
        Dim i As Integer
        For i = 0 To count - 1
            Dim name As String = "srcD" & (ctrlStart + i).ToString()
            Dim found() As Control = Me.Controls.Find(name, True)
            If found IsNot Nothing AndAlso found.Length > 0 Then
                _srcDMap(ctrlStart + i) = found(0)
            End If
        Next
    End Sub
    Private Sub UpdatePlcLabelsFast()
        Dim i As Integer
        For i = 0 To 9
            Dim c As Control
            If _srcDMap.TryGetValue(4000 + i, c) Then
                c.Text = PlcValue(4000 + i)
                Showlabel(c)
            End If
        Next
        For i = 0 To 10
            Dim c As Control
            If _srcDMap.TryGetValue(4050 + i, c) Then
                c.Text = PlcValue(4050 + i)
                Showlabel(c)
            End If
        Next
    End Sub
    Private Sub Showlabel(tmplabel As System.Windows.Forms.Label)

        If tmplabel.Text = "0" Then
            tmplabel.BackColor = Color.Black
            tmplabel.ForeColor = Color.White
        Else
            tmplabel.BackColor = Color.White
            tmplabel.ForeColor = Color.Black
        End If

    End Sub
    Private Sub ConnectPLc()

        ActPlc.ActCpuType = 209

        ActPlc.ActHostAddress = AddressOfPLc
        If ActPlc.Open <> 0 Then
            FlagPlcConnection = False
        Else
            FlagPlcConnection = True
        End If

    End Sub
    Private Sub Tmr_Connect_Tick(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Connect.Tick

        If FrmMainLH.FrmLH.WindowState = FormWindowState.Normal Then
            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.WindowState = FormWindowState.Maximized
        End If
        If PlcConnectionError = "OK" Then
            srcLbPlcConnectionState.Text = PlcConnectionError
            srcLbPlcConnectionState.BackColor = Color.Blue
            srcLbPlcConnectionState.ForeColor = Color.White
        Else
            srcLbPlcConnectionState.Text = PlcConnectionError
            srcLbPlcConnectionState.BackColor = Color.Red
            srcLbPlcConnectionState.ForeColor = Color.White
        End If

        If PlcConnectionStep = 0 Then
            ConnectPLc()
            PlcConnectionStep = 2
        ElseIf PlcConnectionStep = 2 Then
            If FlagPlcConnection = True Then
                PlcConnectionStep = 3
            Else
                PlcConnectionStep = 0
            End If
        ElseIf PlcConnectionStep = 3 Then
            PlcConnectionError = ""
            ReadPLc()
            PlcConnectionStep = 4
        ElseIf PlcConnectionStep = 4 Then
            If PlcConnectionError <> "" Then
                If PlcConnectionError = "OK" Then
                    PlcConnectionStep = 2
                Else
                    ActPlc.Close()
                    PlcConnectionStep = 0
                End If
            End If
        End If

    End Sub

            End If
        Else

        End If

    End Sub
    Private Function DelSpace(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            If Mid(str, i, 1) = " " Then
            Else
                tmp = tmp & Mid(str, i, 1)
            End If
        Next

        tmp = tmp & Chr(13)
        Return tmp

    End Function

    ' 값 표시 + 판정 공통 함수
    Private Sub DecideControl(
    ByVal valueLabel As System.Windows.Forms.Label,
    ByVal decisionLabel As System.Windows.Forms.Label,
    ByVal minValue As Double,
    ByVal maxValue As Double,
    ByVal measuredValue As Double,
    Optional ByVal formatString As String = "0.0"
)

        valueLabel.Text = measuredValue.ToString(formatString)

        If measuredValue >= minValue AndAlso measuredValue <= maxValue Then
            decisionLabel.Text = "OK"
            decisionLabel.BackColor = Color.Blue
        Else
            decisionLabel.Text = "NG"
            decisionLabel.BackColor = Color.Red
        End If

    End Sub

    ' 시간 범위 내에서 Max Amp / Noise 공통 계산
    Private Sub CalcMaxInRange(
    ByVal timeArr() As Double,
    ByVal ampArr() As Double,
    ByVal noiseArr() As Double,
    ByVal count As Integer,
    ByVal rangeStart As Double,
    ByVal rangeEnd As Double,
    ByRef maxAmp As Double,
    ByRef maxNoise As Double)

        maxAmp = 0.0
        maxNoise = 0.0

        For idx As Integer = 0 To count - 1
            Dim t As Double = timeArr(idx)
            If t >= rangeStart AndAlso t <= rangeEnd Then
                If maxAmp < ampArr(idx) Then maxAmp = ampArr(idx)
                If maxNoise < noiseArr(idx) Then maxNoise = noiseArr(idx)
            End If
        Next

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTaskTest()

        Dim i As Int64
        ' testSw, stats → 클래스 필드로 이동 (tmrNormalTest에서도 사용)

        Do

            If wStep = 60 Then

                ClassZedGraph.InitGraph(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphVentAmp, "통풍 전류 그래프", "Current (A)", 0, 4)
                ClassZedGraph.InitGraph(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphVentNoise, "통풍 소음 그래프", "Noise (dB)", 20, 80)

                ErrCount1 = 0
                testSw.Restart()
                TmpAmpMAx1 = 0
                TmpNoiseMax1 = 0
                stats.Reset()
                CalcCount1 = 0
                IGN_ON()
                RL_VENT_ON()
                wStep = 61

            ElseIf wStep = 61 Then

                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                stats.Push(TotalTime1, ValueAmp1, ValueNoise)

                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphVentAmp, 0, TotalTime1, ValueAmp1)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphVentNoise, 0, TotalTime1, ValueNoise)

                If TotalTime1 >= BasicVentTestTime Then
                    _can.RemoveJob("RR_VENT_ON")
                    _can.RemoveJob("RL_VENT_ON")
                    _can.RemoveJob("IGN")
                    VENT_OFF()
                    wStep = 62
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 62 Then

                ' Vent 구간 Max 계산
                stats.GetMaxInRange(VentDecSecStart,
                                TotalTime1 - VentDecSecEnd,
                                TmpAmpMAx1,
                                TmpNoiseMax1)

                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphVentAmp,
                  yLines:=New Double() {},
                  xLines:=New Double() {VentDecSecStart, TotalTime1 - VentDecSecEnd},
                  yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                  lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)

                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphVentNoise,
                  yLines:=New Double() {},
                  xLines:=New Double() {VentDecSecStart, TotalTime1 - VentDecSecEnd},
                  yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                  lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)

                ' 판정
                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValVentAmp,
                          FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecVentAmp,
                          BAsicVentAmpMin, BasicVentAMpMax,
                          TmpAmpMAx1, "0.0")

                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValVentNoise,
                          FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecVentNoise,
                          BasicVentNoiseMin, BasicVentNoiseMax,
                          TmpNoiseMax1, "0.0")

                testSw.Restart()
                wStep = 63

            ElseIf wStep = 63 Then

                If testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 1 Then wStep = 64

            ElseIf wStep = 64 Then

                If DecideNG() = False Then
                    wStep = 60 '재검
                Else
                    testSw.Restart()
                    wStep = 65
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 65 Then

                ClassZedGraph.InitGraph(srcGraphVentAmp, "통풍 전류 그래프", "Current (A)", 0, 4)
                ClassZedGraph.InitGraph(srcGraphVentNoise, "통풍 소음 그래프", "Noise (dB)", 20, 80)
                IGN_ON()
                RR_VENT_ON()
                ErrCount1 = 0
                testSw.Restart()
                TmpAmpMAx1 = 0
                TmpNoiseMax1 = 0
                stats.Reset()
                CalcCount1 = 0
                wStep = 66

            ElseIf wStep = 66 Then

                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                stats.Push(TotalTime1, ValueAmp1, ValueNoise)

                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(srcGraphVentAmp, 0, TotalTime1, ValueAmp1)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(srcGraphVentNoise, 0, TotalTime1, ValueNoise)

                If TotalTime1 >= BasicVentTestTime Then
                    _can.RemoveJob("RR_VENT_ON")
                    _can.RemoveJob("RL_VENT_ON")
                    _can.RemoveJob("IGN")
                    VENT_OFF()
                    wStep = 67
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 67 Then

                stats.GetMaxInRange(VentDecSecStart,
                                TotalTime1 - VentDecSecEnd,
                                TmpAmpMAx1,
                                TmpNoiseMax1)

                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(srcGraphVentAmp,
                  yLines:=New Double() {},
                  xLines:=New Double() {VentDecSecStart, TotalTime1 - VentDecSecEnd},
                  yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                  lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)

                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(srcGraphVentNoise,
                  yLines:=New Double() {},
                  xLines:=New Double() {VentDecSecStart, TotalTime1 - VentDecSecEnd},
                  yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                  lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)

                DecideControl(srclbValVentAmp,
                          srclbDecVentAmp,
                          BAsicVentAmpMin, BasicVentAMpMax,
                          TmpAmpMAx1, "0.0")

                DecideControl(srclbValVentNoise,
                          srclbDecVentNoise,
                          BasicVentNoiseMin, BasicVentNoiseMax,
                          TmpNoiseMax1, "0.0")

                ThreadCount = 0
                testSw.Restart()
                wStep = 68

            ElseIf wStep = 68 Then

    Private Sub TmrWork_Tick(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles TmrWork.Tick

        srcStep1.Text = wStep

        PcAliveCount = PcAliveCount + 1
        If PcAliveCount = 10 Then
            WritePlc("D", "4050", "1")
        ElseIf PcAliveCount = 20 Then
            WritePlc("D", "4050", "0")
            PcAliveCount = 0
        End If

        If PlcValue(4000) = 0 And wStep <> 0 Then
            InitControl()
            InitControlLH()
            For i As Integer = 1 To 9
                WritePlc("D", "405" & CStr(i), "0")
            Next
            For i As Integer = 0 To 15
                Do_Off(i)
            Next
            wStep = 0
        End If

        If RstStep = 0 Then

            If wStep = 0 Then
                'wStep = 1
            ElseIf wStep = 1 Then '스캔대기

            ElseIf wStep = 21 Then
                srcAlarm.Visible = True
                wStep = 0

            ElseIf wStep = 4 Then '스캔완료

                If LhScanCompleted = True And RhScanCompleted = True Then
                    WritePlc("D", "4051", "1") 'LH COMPPLETED
                    WritePlc("D", "4052", "1") 'RH COMPPLETED
                    FlagLog = True
                    If FolderCheck(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Log\" &
                                    Format(Now, "yyyy") & "\" & Format(Now, "MM") & "\" & Format(Now, "dd")) = False Then
                        FolderMake(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Log\" &
                                    Format(Now, "yyyy") & "\" & Format(Now, "MM") & "\" & Format(Now, "dd"))
                    End If

                    LogTmpFolder = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Log\" & Format(Now, "yyyy") & "\" & Format(Now, "MM") & "\" & Format(Now, "dd")
                    LogTmpFIlename = "Log_" & "RH_" & srcLbSerial.Text & "_LH_" & FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcLbSerial.Text
                    If FileCheck(LogTmpFolder, "\" & LogTmpFIlename & ".txt") = False Then FileMake(LogTmpFolder, "\" & LogTmpFIlename & ".txt")

                    ' CAN 로그 버퍼 초기화
                    SyncLock _canLogLock
                        _canLogBuffer.Clear()
                    End SyncLock
                    BufferCanLog("========== 검사 시작 ==========")
                    BufferCanLog($"RH Serial: {srcLbSerial.Text}, LH Serial: {FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcLbSerial.Text}")
                    BufferCanLog($"RH PartNo: {srcLbPartNo.Text}, CommType: {CommType}")

                    ' 웹캠 열기 (프레임 수집만, 화면 표시 안함)
                    _camRetry = 0
                    _webcam.Open()

                    wStep = 41
                ElseIf LhScanCompleted = False And RhScanCompleted = True Then
                ElseIf LhScanCompleted = True And RhScanCompleted = False Then
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 41 Then
                ' 웹캠 프레임 대기 후 촬영
                If _webcam.HasFrame Then
                    Dim photoRoot As String = PhotoSavePath.Trim()
                    If photoRoot.Length = 1 AndAlso Char.IsLetter(photoRoot(0)) Then
                        photoRoot = photoRoot & ":\"
                    ElseIf photoRoot.Length = 2 AndAlso photoRoot(1) = ":"c Then
                        photoRoot = photoRoot & "\"
                    End If

                    Dim photoFile As String = ""
                    Dim doSave As Boolean = False
                    If photoRoot = "" OrElse Not Directory.Exists(photoRoot) Then
                        AppendWorkLog("※ 사진 저장 경로 없음 - 저장 생략 (" & PhotoSavePath & ")")
                    Else
                        Dim photoDir As String = photoRoot & Format(Now, "yyyy") & "\" & Format(Now, "MM") & "\" & Format(Now, "dd") & "\"
                        photoFile = photoDir & srcLbSerial.Text & ".jpg"
                        ' 동일 시리얼 파일 존재 시 _1, _2 ... 접미사
                        If File.Exists(photoFile) Then
                            Dim idx As Integer = 1
                            Do
                                photoFile = photoDir & srcLbSerial.Text & "_" & idx.ToString() & ".jpg"
                                idx += 1
                            Loop While File.Exists(photoFile)
                        End If
                        doSave = True
                    End If

                    srcPicSc.Visible = True
                    Try
                        If _webcam.Capture(srcPicSc, If(doSave, photoFile, "")) Then
                            If doSave Then
                                AppendWorkLog("사진 저장 완료: " & photoFile)
                            Else
                                AppendWorkLog("사진 촬영 완료 (저장 생략)")
                            End If
                        Else
                            AppendWorkLog("사진 촬영 실패")
                        End If
                    Catch ex As Exception
                        AppendWorkLog("사진 촬영 오류: " & ex.Message)
                    End Try
                    _webcam.Close()
                    wStep = 41.1
                Else
                    _camRetry += 1
                    If _camRetry > 30 Then ' 3초 초과 시 스킵
                        AppendWorkLog("※ 웹캠 프레임 수신 실패 - 촬영 생략")
                        _webcam.Close()
                        wStep = 41.1
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 41.1 Then

                If PlcValue(4005) = 1 Then
                    LhScanCompleted = False
                    RhScanCompleted = False
                    BufferStepLog("42", "PLC 준비완료 → 버전체크 시작")
                    wStep = 42
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 42 Then

                For i As Integer = 0 To 15
                    Do_Off(i)
                Next
                If CommType = "STD" Then
                    ' NORMAL 모드 타겟 표시
                    srcSWTargetRPSU.Text = TargetRPSUSwNml
                    srcHWTargetRPSU.Text = TargetRPSUHwNml
                    srcSWTargetRRCCS.Text = TargetRRCCSSwNml
                    srcHWTargetRRCCS.Text = TargetRRCCSHwNml
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcSWTargetRLCCS.Text = TargetRLCCSSwNml
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcHWTargetRLCCS.Text = TargetRLCCSHwNml
                Else
                    ' PE 모드 타겟 표시
                    srcSWTargetRPSU.Text = TargetRPSUSw
                    srcHWTargetRPSU.Text = TargetRPSUHw
                End If
                boolSessionStart = False
                wStep = 43

            ElseIf wStep = 43 Then

                If CommType = "STD" Then
                    ' NORMAL 모드: tmrNormalTest에서 CAN 연결 + 버전 체크
                    AppendWorkLog("NORMAL 모드 시작 - CAN 연결 + 버전 체크")

                    tmrNormalTest.Start()
                    wStep = 998
                Else
                    ' PE 모드: 기존 CAN FD 흐름
                    CanStart()
                    wStep = 44
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 44 Then

                If FlagCanStart = True Then wStep = 45

            ElseIf wStep = 45 Then

                Session_Start()
                wStep = 45.1

            ElseIf wStep = 45.1 Then

                If boolSessionStart = True Then
                    wStep = 45.2
                Else
                    wStep = 45
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 45.2 Then

                Tester_Present()
                wStep = 47

            ElseIf wStep = 47 Then

                strVersion = ""

                wStep = 48

            ElseIf wStep = 48 Then

                If strVersion <> "" Then

            ElseIf wStep = 52 Then

    Public Function Bin2Dec(ByVal value As String) As Integer

        Dim bin(7) As Integer
        Dim i As Integer
        Dim tmp As Integer
        Dim total As Integer

        ' 올바른 형식의 String인지 확인
        For i = 1 To value.Length
            total = total + (CInt(Mid(value, i, 1)) * (2 ^ (value.Length - i)))
        Next
        Bin2Dec = total
        Return Bin2Dec

    End Function

#Region "NI DAQMX"

    Private myTask As Task  'Main Task which is Assigned when the Start Button is Clicked
    Private runningTask As Task
    Private data As AnalogWaveform(Of Double)()
    Private analogInReader As AnalogMultiChannelReader
    Private analogCallback As AsyncCallback
    Private dataColumn As DataColumn()
    Private dataTable As DataTable = New DataTable

    Private Sub AnalogInCallback(ByVal ar As IAsyncResult)
        Try
            If (Not (runningTask Is Nothing)) AndAlso runningTask Is ar.AsyncState Then
                data = analogInReader.EndReadWaveform(ar)
                dataToDataTable(data, dataTable)
                analogInReader.BeginMemoryOptimizedReadWaveform(100, analogCallback, myTask, data)
            End If
        Catch ex As DaqException
            MessageBox.Show(ex.Message)
            runningTask = Nothing
            myTask.Dispose()
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private ValueNoise As Double
    Private ValueLaser1 As Double
    Private ValueLaser2 As Double

    Private Sub dataToDataTable(ByVal sourceArray As AnalogWaveform(Of Double)(), ByRef dataTable As DataTable)

        Dim maxSamples As Integer = 10

        ' 채널별 합/카운트 배열 (0: Ch1, 1: Ch2, 2: Ch3)
        Dim chSum(2) As Double
        Dim chCount(2) As Integer

        Dim currentLineIndex As Integer = 0

        For Each waveform As AnalogWaveform(Of Double) In sourceArray
            If currentLineIndex > 2 Then
                Exit For ' 3채널까지만 사용
            End If

            Dim available As Integer = waveform.Samples.Count
            Dim dataCount As Integer = Math.Min(available, maxSamples)

            For sample As Integer = 0 To dataCount - 1
                ' DataTable 크기 체크는 호출부에서 맞춰놨다고 가정
                dataTable.Rows(sample)(currentLineIndex) = waveform.Samples(sample).Value

                chSum(currentLineIndex) += waveform.Samples(sample).Value
                chCount(currentLineIndex) += 1
            Next

            currentLineIndex += 1
        Next

        ' 0으로 나누기 방지
        Dim ch1Avg As Double = 0.0
        Dim ch2Avg As Double = 0.0
        Dim ch3Avg As Double = 0.0

        If chCount(0) > 0 Then ch1Avg = chSum(0) / chCount(0)
        If chCount(1) > 0 Then ch2Avg = chSum(1) / chCount(1)
        If chCount(2) > 0 Then ch3Avg = chSum(2) / chCount(2)

        ' 기존 로직 유지 + 포맷은 Math.Round로 대체
        ValueNoise = Math.Round(ch1Avg * 100.0, 1) + MicroPhone_Tol
        ValueLaser1 = Math.Round(ch2Avg * 50.0 + 50.0, 1)
        ValueLaser2 = Math.Round(ch3Avg * 50.0 + 50.0, 1) ' ★ 원래 Ch2로 되어 있던 부분 수정 제안

        srcNoise.Text = ValueNoise.ToString("0.00")
        srcLaser1.Text = ValueLaser1.ToString("0.00")
        srcLaser2.Text = ValueLaser2.ToString("0.00")

    End Sub

    Public Sub InitializeDataTable(ByVal channelCollection As AIChannelCollection, ByRef data As DataTable)
        Dim numOfChannels As Int16 = channelCollection.Count
        data.Rows.Clear()
        data.Columns.Clear()
        dataColumn = New DataColumn(numOfChannels) {}
        Dim numOfRows As Int16 = 10
        Dim currentChannelIndex As Int16 = 0
        Dim currentDataIndex As Int16 = 0
        For currentChannelIndex = 0 To (numOfChannels - 1)
            dataColumn(currentChannelIndex) = New DataColumn
            dataColumn(currentChannelIndex).DataType = System.Type.GetType("System.Double")
            dataColumn(currentChannelIndex).ColumnName = channelCollection(currentChannelIndex).PhysicalName
        Next
        data.Columns.AddRange(dataColumn)
        For currentDataIndex = 0 To (numOfRows - 1)
            Dim rowArr As Object() = New Object(numOfChannels - 1) {}
            data.Rows.Add(rowArr)
        Next
    End Sub

    Private Sub DaqStart()

        If runningTask Is Nothing Then
            Try
                myTask = New Task()
                myTask.AIChannels.CreateVoltageChannel("Dev2/ai12", "", CType(-1, AITerminalConfiguration), 0, 10, AIVoltageUnits.Volts)
                myTask.AIChannels.CreateVoltageChannel("Dev2/ai14", "", CType(-1, AITerminalConfiguration), 0, 10, AIVoltageUnits.Volts)
                myTask.AIChannels.CreateVoltageChannel("Dev2/ai15", "", CType(-1, AITerminalConfiguration), 0, 10, AIVoltageUnits.Volts)

                myTask.Timing.ConfigureSampleClock("", 1000, SampleClockActiveEdge.Rising, SampleQuantityMode.ContinuousSamples, 100)

                myTask.Control(TaskAction.Verify)
                runningTask = myTask
                analogInReader = New AnalogMultiChannelReader(myTask.Stream)
                analogCallback = New AsyncCallback(AddressOf AnalogInCallback)
                InitializeDataTable(myTask.AIChannels, dataTable)
                acquisitionDataGrid.DataSource = dataTable
                analogInReader.SynchronizeCallbacks = True
                analogInReader.BeginReadWaveform(100, analogCallback, myTask)
            Catch exception As DaqException
                MessageBox.Show(exception.Message)
                runningTask = Nothing
                myTask.Dispose()
            End Try
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub DaqEnd()
        runningTask = Nothing
        myTask.Dispose()
    End Sub

    Private boolSlideLimitCheck As Boolean
    Private RoutineResponse As String
    Private LimitCheckCount As Integer
    Private TryLimitCount As Integer
    Private Sub Appendlog(msg As String)

        If msg.Contains("0x17FC009D ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x17FC00AB ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x25D ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x30B ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x30C ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x316 ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x317 ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x3E9 ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x3EA ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x51A ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x51B ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x1 ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x30D ") Then Exit Sub

        ' CAN TX/RX 버퍼 기록 (전류값 포함)
        If msg.Contains("TX ") OrElse msg.Contains("RX ") Then
            BufferCanLog(msg & $" [A={ValueAmp1:0.00}]")
        End If

        If Me.IsDisposed Then Return
        If Me.InvokeRequired Then
            Me.BeginInvoke(CType(Sub() Appendlog(msg), MethodInvoker))
            Return
        End If
        ' STD(NORMAL) 모드일 때 CAN raw 프레임은 TextBox1에 표시 안 함
        If CommType = "STD" Then
            ' 동작 로그([NORMAL])는 AppendWorkLog로 별도 출력하므로 여기선 스킵
        Else
            TextBox1.AppendText(msg & Environment.NewLine)
        End If
        '           TX ID = 0x731 DLC=8 BRS DATA=05 31 01 12 A7 F0 00 00
        '[09:36:17] RX ID=0x739 DLC=8 BRS DATA=10 19 71 01 12 A7 02 00 TS=472156126477

        '[13:04:32] RX ID=0x739 DLC=8 BRS DATA=10 19 71 01 12 A7 02 00 TS=778999624569

        If msg.Contains("0x739") And msg.Contains("10 19 71 01 12 A7 02 00") Then
            boolSlideLimitCheck = True
            RoutineResponse = "0x739 - 10 19 71 01 12 A7 02 00"
            TextBox1.AppendText("*********************************************************************************************" & Environment.NewLine)
            TextBox1.AppendText("****************************************** 학습 완료 ****************************************" & Environment.NewLine)
            TextBox1.AppendText("*********************************************************************************************" & Environment.NewLine)
        End If
    End Sub


    Private Sub OnCanLog(ByVal line As String)
        ' CAN raw 로그는 Appendlog로 (TextBox1 출력)
        Appendlog(line)
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>동작 로그 (TextBox1에 시간+메시지 출력, CAN 신호와 구분)</summary>
    Private Sub AppendWorkLog(ByVal msg As String)
        ' 동작 로그도 CAN 로그 버퍼에 기록
        BufferCanLog("[WORK] " & msg)

        If Me.IsDisposed Then Return
        If Me.InvokeRequired Then
            Me.BeginInvoke(CType(Sub() AppendWorkLog(msg), MethodInvoker))
            Return
        End If
        Dim line As String = "[" & Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss") & "] " & msg
        TextBox1.AppendText(line & Environment.NewLine)
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>CAN 로그 버퍼에 한 줄 추가 (스레드 안전)</summary>
    Private Sub BufferCanLog(ByVal msg As String)
        If Not FlagLog Then Return
        Dim line As String = "[" & Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & "] " & msg
        SyncLock _canLogLock
            _canLogBuffer.Add(line)
        End SyncLock
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>스텝 전환 코멘트를 버퍼에 추가 + 전류값 포함</summary>
    Private Sub BufferStepLog(ByVal stepName As String, ByVal comment As String)
        BufferCanLog($"--- STEP {stepName}: {comment} (전류={ValueAmp1:0.00}A, 소음={ValueNoise:0.0}dB) ---")
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>버퍼 데이터를 파일로 저장 후 초기화</summary>
    Private Sub FlushCanLog()
        Dim lines() As String
        SyncLock _canLogLock
            If _canLogBuffer.Count = 0 Then Return
            lines = _canLogBuffer.ToArray()
            _canLogBuffer.Clear()
        End SyncLock

        Try
            Dim logRoot As String = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "CAN_RAW\" & Format(Now, "yyyy") & "\" & Format(Now, "MM") & "\" & Format(Now, "dd")
            If Not Directory.Exists(logRoot) Then
                Directory.CreateDirectory(logRoot)
            End If
            Dim logFile As String = logRoot & "\" & srcLbSerial.Text & ".txt"
            File.WriteAllLines(logFile, lines, Encoding.UTF8)
            AppendWorkLog("CAN 로그 저장 완료: " & logFile & " (" & lines.Length & "줄)")
        Catch ex As Exception
            AppendWorkLog("CAN 로그 저장 오류: " & ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private FlagCanEnabled As Boolean = False
    Private FlagCanStart As Boolean = False

    Private _can As CanBusService
    Private Sub CanStart()
        ' 기존 연결 끊기
        If FlagCanStart Then CanStop()

        Dim isFd As Boolean = (CommType = "ICE")
        _can = New CanBusService(PCANBasic.PCAN_USBBUS1, isFd)

        AddHandler _can.Log, Sub(s) BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() Appendlog(s)))
        AddHandler _can.[Error], Sub(st) BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() Appendlog("[ERR] " & st)))
        AddHandler _can.FrameDecoded, Sub(id, data)
                                          BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() OnFrameDecoded(id, data)))
                                      End Sub
        AddHandler _can.UdsCompleted, Sub(respId, uds)
                                          BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() OnUdsCompleted(respId, uds)))
                                      End Sub

        Dim canSt As TPCANStatus
        If isFd Then
            canSt = _can.Init()        ' FD bitrate
        Else
            canSt = _can.Init("")       ' 500K Standard
        End If

        If canSt = TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_OK Then
            FlagCanEnabled = True
            _can.StartPolling()
            FlagCanStart = True
        Else
            FlagCanEnabled = False
        End If

        _can.LogAllRawRxFrames = True
        _can.LogAllRawTxFrames = True
        _can.LogVerboseInternalState = True

    End Sub
    Private Sub CanStop()
        If (FlagCanStart) Then
            _can.Dispose()
            FlagCanStart = False
        End If
    End Sub
    Private Sub OnFrameDecoded(ByVal id As UInteger, ByVal data As Byte())
        If data Is Nothing Then Return
        Dim hex As String = String.Join(" ", data.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2")))

        Select Case id
            Case &H3C3 ' 0x3C3
                'Parse_0x3C3(data)
            Case Else
                ' Do nothing
        End Select
    End Sub

    Private FlagGetUdsFrame As Boolean = False
    Private strVersion As String = ""

    Private boolSessionStart As Boolean = False
    Private boolUds As Boolean = False
    Private Sub OnUdsCompleted(ByVal respId As UInteger, ByVal uds As Byte())
        If uds Is Nothing Then Return
        Dim hex As String = String.Join(" ", uds.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2")))

        ' VB.NET 14 (VS 2015) 이상에서 $ 문자열 보간 지원
        Appendlog($"[OnUds] RX ID=0x{respId:X3} DATA={hex}")
        boolUds = True
        If hex.Contains("50 03 00 32 01 F4") Then
            boolSessionStart = True
        End If

        ' Scheduler started.
        '[01:07:21] TX ID=0x731 DLC=8 BRS DATA=02 10 03 00 00 00 00 00
        'Job removed: RL_Session
        '[01:07:21] RX ID=0x739 DLC=8 BRS DATA=06 50 03 00 32 01 F4 AA TS=131168785188
        '[OnUds] RX ID=0x739 DATA=50 03 00 32 01 F4
        '[uds] 50 03 00 32 01 F4

        'Job removed: RL_Session
        '[00:13:31] RX ID=0x739 DLC=8 BRS DATA=06 50 03 00 32 01 F4 AA TS=127938464591
        '[OnUds] RX ID=0x739 DATA=50 03 00 32 01 F4
        '[uds] 50 03 00 32 01 F4

        If uds.Length >= 3 AndAlso uds(0) = &H62 Then ' RDBI 긍정 응답
            Dim payload = uds.Skip(3).ToArray()
            Dim ascii As Boolean = payload.All(Function(b) b >= &H20 AndAlso b <= &H7E)
            Dim val As String = If(ascii,
                             Encoding.ASCII.GetString(payload),
                             String.Join(" ", payload.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2"))))

            ' RPSU(0x739) - SW(F1B1) / HW(F193) 구분
            If respId = &H739 Then
                If uds.Length >= 3 AndAlso uds(2) = &H93 Then
                    strHwVersion = val
                Else
                    strVersion = val
                End If
                FlagGetUdsFrame = True
            End If

            ' RRCCS(0x70F), RLCCS(0x71A) - SW(F1B1) / HW(F193) 구분
            If respId = &H70F OrElse respId = &H71A Then
                If uds.Length >= 3 AndAlso uds(2) = &H93 Then
                    _nmlHwVersion = val
                    _nmlHwRespId = respId
                Else
                    _nmlSwVersion = val
                    _nmlSwRespId = respId
                End If
            End If

        ElseIf uds.Length >= 5 AndAlso uds(0) = &H71 Then ' RoutineControl 긍정 응답
            ' 기존 PE 학습체크 (boolSlideLimitCheck)
            If uds(1) = &H1 AndAlso uds(2) = &H12 AndAlso uds(3) = &HA7 AndAlso uds(4) = &H2 Then
                boolSlideLimitCheck = True
                RoutineResponse = hex
            End If

            ' NORMAL EDU 수락 응답 (71 01 12 A6/A7) - 로그만 남김
            If uds(1) = &H1 AndAlso uds(2) = &H12 Then
                Dim eduSide As String = If(uds(3) = &HA6, "LH", "RH")
                AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] {eduSide} EDU 수락 응답 수신")
            End If

            ' NORMAL 학습체크 결과 (31 03 12 A6/A7 → 71 03 12 A6/A7 XX)
            If uds(1) = &H3 AndAlso uds(2) = &H12 AndAlso (uds(3) = &HA6 OrElse uds(3) = &HA7) Then
                If uds(4) = &H2 Then
                    _nmlEduCheckResult = "OK"
                ElseIf uds(4) = &H1 Then
                    _nmlEduCheckResult = "NG"
                End If
            End If

        ElseIf uds.Length >= 1 AndAlso uds(0) = &H54 Then ' ClearDTC 긍정 응답
            _nmlDtcClearResult = "OK"

        End If

    End Sub

        Dim id As UInteger = &H731

        ' UDS SF (Single Frame), Length=2
        ' SID = 0x10 (Diagnostic Session Control)

    Private Sub Request_Security_Seed()
        Dim id As UInteger = &H731
        ' UDS SF (Single Frame), Length=2
        ' SID = 0x27 (Security Access)
        ' Sub-function = 0x01 (Request Seed - Level 1)
        _can.AddJobOnce($"Request Security Seed-{id}", id,
            &H2, &H27, &H1, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub
    Private Sub Request_SW_Version()
        Dim id As UInteger = &H731
        ' UDS SF (Single Frame), Length=3
        ' SID = 0x22 (RDBI)
        ' DID = 0xF1A6
        ' 나머지는 CAN 프레임 8바이트 패딩
        Appendlog("Request SW Version")
        _can.AddJobOnce($"Request SW Version-{id}", id, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &HB1, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        '0x03, 0x22, 0xF1, 0x91, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00
        '0x03, 0x22, 0xF1, 0x91, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00
        '03 22 F1 B1 00 00 00 00
    End Sub
    Private Sub Request_HW_Version()
        Dim id As UInteger = &H731
        ' UDS SF (Single Frame), Length=3
        ' SID = 0x22 (RDBI)
        ' DID = 0xF1A2
        ' 나머지는 CAN 프레임 8바이트 패딩
        Appendlog("Request HW Version")
        _can.AddJobOnce($"Request HW Version-{id}", id,
            &H3, &H22, &HF1, &H93, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)

        'HW 버전:   03 22 F1 93 00 00 00 00

    End Sub

    Private Function BytesToHex(ByVal data() As Byte) As String
        Dim sb As New System.Text.StringBuilder()
        Dim i As Integer
        For i = 0 To data.Length - 1
            sb.AppendFormat("{0:X2}", data(i))
        Next
        Return sb.ToString()
    End Function

            ' PE: CAN FD 32byte 전체 0 전송
            _can.AddJobOnce32("RR_VENT_ON", &H49B, &HFF, &HFF, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,

    ' NORMAL 벤트 타이머 시퀀스 시작
    Private Sub StartNmlVentSequence(ByVal side As String)
        tmrNmlVent.Stop()
        _nmlVentSide = side
        _nmlVentStep = 0
        tmrNmlVent.Start()
    End Sub

    ' NORMAL 벤트 타이머 핸들러 (FrmCanFd.tmrVent_Tick과 동일)
    Private Sub tmrNmlVent_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmrNmlVent.Tick
        If _can Is Nothing OrElse String.IsNullOrEmpty(_nmlVentSide) Then
            tmrNmlVent.Stop()
            Return
        End If

        Select Case _nmlVentStep
            Case 0
                ' STOP
                If _nmlVentSide = "LH" Then
                    _can.AddJobOnce("V_STOP", &H4A5, &H0, &H0, &H4, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                Else
                    _can.AddJobOnce("V_STOP", &H4A5, &H0, &H0, &H40, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                End If
                _nmlVentStep = 1

            Case 1
                ' 3E0 초기화
                _can.AddJobOnce("V_3E0_INIT", &H3E0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                _nmlVentStep = 2

            Case 2
                ' 3E0 활성화
                _can.AddJobOnce("V_3E0_ACT", &H3E0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H50, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                _nmlVentStep = 3

            Case 3
                ' 4A2 (LH/RH 분기)
                If _nmlVentSide = "LH" Then
                    _can.AddJobOnce("V_4A2", &H4A2, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H50, &H0, &H0)
                Else
                    _can.AddJobOnce("V_4A2", &H4A2, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H5, &H0, &H0)
                End If
                _nmlVentStep = 4

            Case 4
                ' 418
                _can.AddJobOnce("V_418", &H418, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H10, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                _nmlVentStep = 5

            Case 5
                ' 3E0 반복 (→ step4로 돌아감)
                _can.AddJobOnce("V_3E0_RPT", &H3E0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H50, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                _nmlVentStep = 4

        End Select
    End Sub

    Private Sub RR_FWD()
        If CommType = "STD" Then
            ' NORMAL: 0x4A5 RH FWD (byte2=0x80) 500ms 반복
            NmlMotorStart(New Byte() {&H0, &H0, &H80, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0})
        Else
            ' PE: UDS IOControl DID F043
            Dim id As UInteger = &H731
            _can.AddJobOnce($"RR FWD-{id}", id, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H43, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        End If

            ' NORMAL: 0x4A5 RH BWD (byte2=0x20) 500ms 반복
            NmlMotorStart(New Byte() {&H0, &H0, &H20, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0})
        Else
            ' PE: UDS IOControl DID F044
            Dim id As UInteger = &H731
            _can.AddJobOnce($"RR BWD-{id}", id, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H44, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        End If

    Private Sub RR_STOP()

            _can.RemoveJob(NML_MOTOR_JOB)
            _can.AddJobOnce("NML_RH_STP", &H4A5, &H0, &H0, &H40, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        Else
            ' PE: UDS IOControl F043/F044 Stop
            Dim id As UInteger = &H731
            _can.AddJobOnce($"RR STOP-{id}", id, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H43, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
            _can.AddJobOnce($"RR STOP-{id}", id, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H44, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        End If
