    ' =========================================================
    '  NORMAL 자동검사 시퀀스 (tmrNormalTest)
    ' =========================================================

    Private nStep As Integer = 0
    Private nStepCount As Integer = 0
    Private nStepTime As New Stopwatch()
    Private FlagNmlVerDone As Boolean = False
    Private FlagNmlDone As Boolean = False
    Private _savedTargetVolt As Double = 0
    Private testSw As New Stopwatch()         ' TmrWork + tmrNormalTest 공용
    Private stats As New TestStats()          ' TmrWork + tmrNormalTest 공용
    Private _nmlEduCheckResult As String = ""
    Private _nmlEduCheckCount As Integer = 0
    Private _nmlVerRetry As Integer = 0            ' 버전 체크 재시도 횟수

    ' NORMAL 모터 제어 (0x4A5 500ms 주기)
    Private Const NML_MOTOR_JOB As String = "NML_MOTOR"

    ' NORMAL 벤트 시퀀스 상태
    Private _nmlVentSide As String = ""    ' "LH", "RH", ""
    Private _nmlVentStep As Integer = 0

    Private Sub NmlMotorStart(ByVal data As Byte())
        _can.RemoveJob(NML_MOTOR_JOB)
        _can.AddJob(NML_MOTOR_JOB, &H4A5, 500, data(0), data(1), data(2), data(3), data(4), data(5), data(6), data(7))
    End Sub

    Private Sub NmlMotorStop()
        _can.RemoveJob(NML_MOTOR_JOB)
        ' LH STOP + RH STOP
        _can.AddJobOnce("NML_LH_STP", &H4A5, &H0, &H0, &H4, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        _can.AddJobOnce("NML_RH_STP", &H4A5, &H0, &H0, &H40, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    Private Sub tmrNormalTest_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmrNormalTest.Tick

        Try

            ' ─── nStep 1-9: CAN 연결 + ECU 버전 체크 (SW→HW 2패스) ───
            If nStep = 1 Then
                CanStart()
                _versionPhase = "SW"
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 2

            ElseIf nStep = 2 Then
                If FlagCanStart = True Then
                    ' RPSU 버전 요청 (SW: F1B1, HW: F1B0)
                    If _versionPhase = "SW" Then
                        strVersion = ""
                        _can.AddJobOnce("RPSU_SW", &H731, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &HB1, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    Else
                        strHwVersion = ""
                        _can.AddJobOnce("RPSU_HW", &H731, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &H93, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    End If
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 3
                ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 5 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] CAN 연결 실패")
                    nStep = 0
                    tmrNormalTest.Stop()
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 3 Then
                ' RPSU 응답 대기
                If _versionPhase = "SW" Then
                    If strVersion <> "" Then
                        srcSWValRPSU.Text = strVersion
                        srcSWValRPSU2.Text = strVersion
                        If strVersion.Contains(TargetRPSUSwNml) Then
                            srcSWDecRPSU.Text = "OK"
                            srcSWDecRPSU.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        Else
                            srcSWDecRPSU.Text = "NG"
                            srcSWDecRPSU.BackColor = Color.Red
                        End If
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 4
                    ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 3 Then
                        strVersion = ""
                        _can.AddJobOnce("RPSU_SW2", &H731, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &HB1, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                    End If
                Else ' HW
                    If strHwVersion <> "" Then
                        srcHWValRPSU.Text = strHwVersion
                        srcHWValRPSU2.Text = strHwVersion
                        If strHwVersion.Contains(TargetRPSUHwNml) Then
                            srcHWDecRPSU.Text = "OK"
                            srcHWDecRPSU.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        Else
                            srcHWDecRPSU.Text = "NG"
                            srcHWDecRPSU.BackColor = Color.Red
                        End If
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 4
                    ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 3 Then
                        strHwVersion = ""
                        _can.AddJobOnce("RPSU_HW2", &H731, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &H93, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 4 Then
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 0.5 Then
                    ' RRCCS 버전 요청
                    _nmlVerRetry = 0
                    If _versionPhase = "SW" Then
                        _nmlSwVersion = ""
                        _nmlSwRespId = 0
                        _can.AddJobOnce("RRCCS_SW", &H707, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &HB1, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    Else
                        _nmlHwVersion = ""
                        _nmlHwRespId = 0
                        _can.AddJobOnce("RRCCS_HW", &H707, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &H93, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    End If
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 5
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 5 Then
                ' RRCCS 응답 대기
                If _versionPhase = "SW" Then
                    If _nmlSwRespId = &H70F Then
                        srcSWValRRCCS.Text = _nmlSwVersion
                        srcSWValRRCCS2.Text = _nmlSwVersion
                        If _nmlSwVersion.Contains(TargetRRCCSSwNml) Then
                            srcSWDecRRCCS.Text = "OK"
                            srcSWDecRRCCS.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        Else
                            srcSWDecRRCCS.Text = "NG"
                            srcSWDecRRCCS.BackColor = Color.Red
                        End If
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 6
                    ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 3 Then
                        _nmlVerRetry += 1
                        If _nmlVerRetry <= 2 Then
                            AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] RRCCS SW 응답 없음 → 재전송 ({_nmlVerRetry}/2)")
                            _nmlSwVersion = ""
                            _nmlSwRespId = 0
                            _can.AddJobOnce("RRCCS_SW", &H707, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &HB1, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                            nStepTime.Restart()
                        Else
                            srcSWDecRRCCS.Text = "NG"
                            srcSWDecRRCCS.BackColor = Color.Red
                            nStepTime.Restart()
                            nStep = 6
                        End If
                    End If
                Else ' HW
                    If _nmlHwRespId = &H70F Then
                        srcHWValRRCCS.Text = _nmlHwVersion
                        srcHWValRRCCS2.Text = _nmlHwVersion
                        If _nmlHwVersion.Contains(TargetRRCCSHwNml) Then
                            srcHWDecRRCCS.Text = "OK"
                            srcHWDecRRCCS.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        Else
                            srcHWDecRRCCS.Text = "NG"
                            srcHWDecRRCCS.BackColor = Color.Red
                        End If
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 6
                    ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 3 Then
                        _nmlVerRetry += 1
                        If _nmlVerRetry <= 2 Then
                            AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] RRCCS HW 응답 없음 → 재전송 ({_nmlVerRetry}/2)")
                            _nmlHwVersion = ""
                            _nmlHwRespId = 0
                            _can.AddJobOnce("RRCCS_HW", &H707, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &H93, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                            nStepTime.Restart()
                        Else
                            srcHWDecRRCCS.Text = "NG"
                            srcHWDecRRCCS.BackColor = Color.Red
                            nStepTime.Restart()
                            nStep = 6
                        End If
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 6 Then
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 0.5 Then
                    ' RLCCS 버전 요청
                    _nmlVerRetry = 0
                    If _versionPhase = "SW" Then
                        _nmlSwVersion = ""
                        _nmlSwRespId = 0
                        _can.AddJobOnce("RLCCS_SW", &H712, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &HB1, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    Else
                        _nmlHwVersion = ""
                        _nmlHwRespId = 0
                        _can.AddJobOnce("RLCCS_HW", &H712, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &H93, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    End If
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 7
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 7 Then
                ' RLCCS 응답 대기
                If _versionPhase = "SW" Then
                    If _nmlSwRespId = &H71A Then
                        FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcSWValRLCCS.Text = _nmlSwVersion
                        FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcSWValRLCCS2.Text = _nmlSwVersion
                        If _nmlSwVersion.Contains(TargetRLCCSSwNml) Then
                            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcSWDecRLCCS.Text = "OK"
                            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcSWDecRLCCS.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        Else
                            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcSWDecRLCCS.Text = "NG"
                            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcSWDecRLCCS.BackColor = Color.Red
                        End If
                        nStep = 9
                    ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 3 Then
                        _nmlVerRetry += 1
                        If _nmlVerRetry <= 2 Then
                            AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] RLCCS SW 응답 없음 → 재전송 ({_nmlVerRetry}/2)")
                            _nmlSwVersion = ""
                            _nmlSwRespId = 0
                            _can.AddJobOnce("RLCCS_SW", &H712, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &HB1, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                            nStepTime.Restart()
                        Else
                            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcSWDecRLCCS.Text = "NG"
                            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcSWDecRLCCS.BackColor = Color.Red
                            nStep = 9
                        End If
                    End If
                Else ' HW
                    If _nmlHwRespId = &H71A Then
                        FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcHWValRLCCS.Text = _nmlHwVersion
                        FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcHWValRLCCS2.Text = _nmlHwVersion
                        If _nmlHwVersion.Contains(TargetRLCCSHwNml) Then
                            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcHWDecRLCCS.Text = "OK"
                            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcHWDecRLCCS.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        Else
                            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcHWDecRLCCS.Text = "NG"
                            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcHWDecRLCCS.BackColor = Color.Red
                        End If
                        nStep = 9
                    ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 3 Then
                        _nmlVerRetry += 1
                        If _nmlVerRetry <= 2 Then
                            AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] RLCCS HW 응답 없음 → 재전송 ({_nmlVerRetry}/2)")
                            _nmlHwVersion = ""
                            _nmlHwRespId = 0
                            _can.AddJobOnce("RLCCS_HW", &H712, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &H93, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                            nStepTime.Restart()
                        Else
                            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcHWDecRLCCS.Text = "NG"
                            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcHWDecRLCCS.BackColor = Color.Red
                            nStep = 9
                        End If
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 9 Then
                ' SW 완료 → HW 패스 시작, HW 완료 → 버전 체크 종료
                If _versionPhase = "SW" Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] SW 버전 체크 완료, HW 체크 시작")
                    _versionPhase = "HW"
                    nStep = 2
                Else
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] 버전 체크 완료 (SW+HW)")
                    FlagNmlVerDone = True
                    nStep = 0
                    tmrNormalTest.Stop()
                End If

                ' ─── nStep 10-19: 버니싱 ───
            ElseIf nStep = 10 Then
                If NumBurnishing = 0 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] 버니싱 건너뜀 (NumBurnishing=0)")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 19
                Else
                    AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] 버니싱 FWD ({BurnishingCount + 1}/{NumBurnishing})")
                    ' LH+RH FWD (0x4A5, {0,0,0x88,0,0,0,0,0})
                    NmlMotorStart(New Byte() {&H0, &H0, &H88, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0})
                    CalcCount1 = 0
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 11
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 11 Then
                ' FWD 모터 시작 대기
                If ValueAmp1 > 1 Then
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 12
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 12 Then
                ' FWD 끝 정지 감지 (CalcCount>=5)
                TotalTime1 = nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                If TotalTime1 > 2 Then
                    If ValueAmp1 < 0.32 Then
                        CalcCount1 += 1
                    Else
                        CalcCount1 = 0
                    End If
                    If CalcCount1 >= 5 Then
                        NmlMotorStop()
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 13
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 13 Then
                ' 1초 대기
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 1 Then nStep = 14

            ElseIf nStep = 14 Then
                ' LH+RH BWD (0x4A5, {0,0,0x22,0,0,0,0,0})
                AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] 버니싱 BWD ({BurnishingCount + 1}/{NumBurnishing})")
                NmlMotorStart(New Byte() {&H0, &H0, &H22, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0})
                CalcCount1 = 0
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 15

            ElseIf nStep = 15 Then
                ' BWD 모터 시작 대기
                If ValueAmp1 > 1 Then
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 16
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 16 Then
                ' BWD 끝 정지 감지 (CalcCount>=5)
                TotalTime1 = nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                If TotalTime1 > 2 Then
                    If ValueAmp1 < 0.32 Then
                        CalcCount1 += 1
                    Else
                        CalcCount1 = 0
                    End If
                    If CalcCount1 >= 5 Then
                        NmlMotorStop()
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 17
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 17 Then
                ' 1초 대기 후 카운트 증가
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 1 Then
                    BurnishingCount += 1
                    AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] 버니싱 완료 ({BurnishingCount}/{NumBurnishing})")
                    If BurnishingCount < NumBurnishing Then
                        nStep = 10
                    Else
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 19
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 19 Then
                ' 리미트 세팅 전 1초 대기
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 1 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] 리미트 세팅 전 1초 대기 완료")
                    nStep = 20
                End If

                ' ─── nStep 20-24: 리미트 세팅 (LH 전류감지 → RH 전류감지 → 완료) ───
            ElseIf nStep = 20 Then
                AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] 1차 리미트 세팅 시작 (LH EDU 연속전송)")
                _can.AddJob("NML_EDU_LH", &H731, 500, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA6, &H42, &H0, &H0)
                CalcCount1 = 0
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 21

            ElseIf nStep = 21 Then
                ' LH 시작 대기 (전류 > 2.5A)
                If ValueAmp1 > 2.5 Then
                    AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] LH 시작 감지 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A, {nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds:F1}초)")
                    ' RH EDU 연속전송 추가
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] RH EDU 연속전송 시작")
                    _can.AddJob("NML_EDU_RH", &H731, 500, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA7, &H42, &H0, &H0)
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 22
                End If
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 30 Then
                    AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] LH 시작 타임아웃 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A)")
                    _can.RemoveJob("NML_EDU_LH")
                    srclbDecEcuEDURH.Text = "NG"
                    srclbDecEcuEDURH.BackColor = Color.Red
                    nStep = 99
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 22 Then
                ' RH 추가 시작 대기 (전류 > 5A = 둘 다 동작)
                If ValueAmp1 > 5 Then
                    _can.RemoveJob("NML_EDU_LH")
                    _can.RemoveJob("NML_EDU_RH")
                    AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] LH+RH 모두 시작 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A, {nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds:F1}초) → EDU 전송 중단")
                    CalcCount1 = 0
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 23
                End If
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 30 Then
                    AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] RH 시작 타임아웃 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A)")
                    _can.RemoveJob("NML_EDU_LH")
                    _can.RemoveJob("NML_EDU_RH")
                    srclbDecEcuEDURH.Text = "NG"
                    srclbDecEcuEDURH.BackColor = Color.Red
                    nStep = 99
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 23 Then
                ' 모터 정지 대기 (전류 < 0.3A = LH+RH 둘 다 완료)
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 2 Then
                    If ValueAmp1 < 0.3 Then
                        CalcCount1 += 1
                    Else
                        CalcCount1 = 0
                    End If
                    If CalcCount1 >= 5 Then
                        _can.RemoveJob("NML_EDU_LH")
                        _can.RemoveJob("NML_EDU_RH")
                        AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] 1차 리미트 세팅 완료 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A, {nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds:F1}초)")
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 25
                    End If
                End If
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 60 Then
                    _can.RemoveJob("NML_EDU_LH")
                    _can.RemoveJob("NML_EDU_RH")
                    AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] 리미트 세팅 타임아웃 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A)")
                    srclbDecEcuEDURH.Text = "NG"
                    srclbDecEcuEDURH.BackColor = Color.Red
                    nStep = 99
                End If

                ' ─── nStep 25-29: 리미트세팅확인 LH (학습체크) ───
            ElseIf nStep = 25 Then
                ' 1초 대기 후 학습체크 시작
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 1 Then
                    _nmlEduCheckResult = ""
                    _nmlEduCheckCount = 0
                    nStep = 26
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 26 Then
                ' LH 학습체크 요청 (31 01 12 A6 F0)
                AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] LH 학습체크 요청 (시도 {_nmlEduCheckCount + 1}/5)")
                _can.AddJobOnce("EDU_CHK_LH_A", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA6, &HF0, &H0, &H0)
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 27

            ElseIf nStep = 27 Then
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 0.5 Then
                    ' LH 학습결과 조회 (31 03 12 A6)
                    _nmlEduCheckResult = ""
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] LH 학습결과 조회 (31 03 12 A6)")
                    _can.AddJobOnce("EDU_CHK_LH_B", &H731, &H4, &H31, &H3, &H12, &HA6, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 28
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 28 Then
                If _nmlEduCheckResult = "OK" Then
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULH.Text = "OK"
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULH.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] LH 학습체크 OK")
                    nStep = 30
                ElseIf _nmlEduCheckResult = "NG" Then
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULH.Text = "NG"
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULH.BackColor = Color.Red
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] LH 학습체크 NG (ECU 응답 NG)")
                    nStep = 30
                ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 2 Then
                    _nmlEduCheckCount += 1
                    AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] LH 학습체크 응답 없음 ({_nmlEduCheckCount}/5)")
                    If _nmlEduCheckCount > 5 Then
                        FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULH.Text = "NG"
                        FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULH.BackColor = Color.Red
                        AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] LH 학습체크 NG (5회 응답 없음)")
                        nStep = 30
                    Else
                        nStep = 26  ' 재시도
                    End If
                End If

                ' ─── nStep 30-39: 리미트세팅확인 RH (동일 패턴, DID A7) ───
            ElseIf nStep = 30 Then
                _nmlEduCheckResult = ""
                _nmlEduCheckCount = 0
                nStep = 31

            ElseIf nStep = 31 Then
                ' RH 학습체크 요청 (31 01 12 A7 F0)
                AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] RH 학습체크 요청 (시도 {_nmlEduCheckCount + 1}/5)")
                _can.AddJobOnce("EDU_CHK_RH_A", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA7, &HF0, &H0, &H0)
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 32

            ElseIf nStep = 32 Then
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 0.5 Then
                    _nmlEduCheckResult = ""
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] RH 학습결과 조회 (31 03 12 A7)")
                    _can.AddJobOnce("EDU_CHK_RH_B", &H731, &H4, &H31, &H3, &H12, &HA7, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 33
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 33 Then
                If _nmlEduCheckResult = "OK" Then
                    srclbDecEcuEDURH.Text = "OK"
                    srclbDecEcuEDURH.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] RH 학습체크 OK")
                    nStep = 40
                ElseIf _nmlEduCheckResult = "NG" Then
                    srclbDecEcuEDURH.Text = "NG"
                    srclbDecEcuEDURH.BackColor = Color.Red
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] RH 학습체크 NG (ECU 응답 NG)")
                    nStep = 40
                ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 2 Then
                    _nmlEduCheckCount += 1
                    AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] RH 학습체크 응답 없음 ({_nmlEduCheckCount}/5)")
                    If _nmlEduCheckCount > 5 Then
                        srclbDecEcuEDURH.Text = "NG"
                        srclbDecEcuEDURH.BackColor = Color.Red
                        AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] RH 학습체크 NG (5회 응답 없음)")
                        nStep = 40
                    Else
                        nStep = 31  ' 재시도
                    End If
                End If

                ' ─── nStep 40-49: ECU 전원차단 5초 ───
            ElseIf nStep = 40 Then
                _savedTargetVolt = TargetVolt
                TargetVolt = 0
                AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] ECU 전원 차단")
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 41

            ElseIf nStep = 41 Then
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 5 Then
                    TargetVolt = _savedTargetVolt
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] ECU 전원 복원")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 42
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 42 Then
                ' 전압 안정 대기
                If ValueVolt1 > _savedTargetVolt * 0.9 Then
                    If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 2 Then
                        nStep = 50
                    End If
                Else
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                End If

                ' ─── nStep 50: CAN 끊고 재연결 ───
            ElseIf nStep = 50 Then
                AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] CAN 재연결")
                CanStop()
                Thread.Sleep(500)
                CanStart()
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 51

                ' ─── nStep 51-69: 레스트모드 슬라이드 검사 (소음/전류/거리/속도 측정) ───

                ' ── LH Relax (FWD) ──
            ElseIf nStep = 51 Then
                If FlagCanStart = False Then
                    If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 5 Then
                        AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] CAN 재연결 실패")
                        nStep = 99
                    End If
                Else
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] LH Relax (FWD) 시작")
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideFwdStartPos.Text = srcLaser2.Text
                    _can.AddJobOnce("LH_RELAX_1", &H2A5, &H18, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    _can.AddJobOnce("LH_RELAX_2", &H2A5, &H18, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    ErrCount1 = 0
                    TmpAmpMAx1 = 0
                    TmpNoiseMax1 = 0
                    stats.Reset()
                    CalcCount1 = 0
                    StopStep = 0
                    LaserBefore = 0
                    LaserNow = 0
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 52
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 52 Then
                ' LH Relax 모터 시작 대기
                If ValueAmp1 > 1 Then
                    testSw.Restart()
                    nStep = 53
                End If
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 10 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] LH Relax 타임아웃")
                    nStep = 55
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 53 Then
                ' LH FWD 데이터 수집 (소음/전류/레이저)
                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                stats.Push(TotalTime1, ValueAmp1, ValueNoise)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphSlideAmp, 0, TotalTime1, ValueAmp1)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphSlideNoise, 0, TotalTime1, ValueNoise)
                FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideFwdTicTime.Text = TotalTime1.ToString("0.0#")

                If TotalTime1 > 2 Then
                    If StopStep = 0 Then
                        LaserBefore = CDbl(srcLaser2.Text)
                        StopStep = 1
                    ElseIf StopStep = 1 Then
                        LaserNow = CDbl(srcLaser2.Text)
                        StopStep = 0
                    End If
                    If ValueAmp1 < 0.32 Then
                        CalcCount1 += 1
                    Else
                        CalcCount1 = 0
                    End If
                    If CalcCount1 >= 3 Then
                        nStep = 54
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 54 Then
                ' LH FWD 판정
                stats.GetMaxInRange(1.0, TotalTime1 - 1.0, TmpAmpMAx1, TmpNoiseMax1)

                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphSlideAmp,
                      yLines:=New Double() {},
                      xLines:=New Double() {1, TotalTime1 - 2},
                      yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                      lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)
                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphSlideNoise,
                      yLines:=New Double() {},
                      xLines:=New Double() {1, TotalTime1 - 2},
                      yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                      lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)

                Dim lhFwdStart As Double = CDbl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideFwdStartPos.Text)
                Dim lhFwdEnd As Double = CDbl(srcLaser2.Text)
                Dim lhFwdLen As Double = lhFwdEnd - lhFwdStart + LhFwdLenTol
                Dim lhFwdTime As Double = CDbl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideFwdTicTime.Text)
                Dim lhFwdSpeed As Double = lhFwdLen / Math.Max(0.001, lhFwdTime)

                FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideFwdEndPos.Text = lhFwdEnd.ToString("#0.0#")

                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideFwdLength,
                              FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideFwdLength,
                              BasicSlideFwdMovingLengthMin, BasicSlideFwdMovingLengthMax,
                              lhFwdLen, "#0.0#")
                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideFwdAmp,
                              FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideFwdAmp,
                              BasicSlideFwdAmpMin, BasicSlideFwdAmpMax,
                              TmpAmpMAx1, "0.0")
                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideFwdNoise,
                              FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideFwdNoise,
                              BasicSlideFwdNoiseMin, BasicSlideFwdNoiseMax,
                              TmpNoiseMax1, "0.0")
                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideFwdSpeed,
                              FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideFwdSpeed,
                              BasicSlideFwdSpeedMin, BasicSlideFwdSpeedMax,
                              lhFwdSpeed, "#0.0#")

                AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] LH Relax 완료 (Len={lhFwdLen:F1} Amp={TmpAmpMAx1:F2} Noise={TmpNoiseMax1:F1} Spd={lhFwdSpeed:F2})")
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 55

                ' ── LH Return (BWD) ──
            ElseIf nStep = 55 Then
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 1 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] LH Return (BWD) 시작")
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdStartPos.Text = srcLaser2.Text
                    _can.AddJobOnce("LH_RETURN_1", &H2A5, &H10, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    _can.AddJobOnce("LH_RETURN_2", &H2A5, &H10, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    ErrCount1 = 0
                    TmpAmpMAx1 = 0
                    TmpNoiseMax1 = 0
                    stats.Reset()
                    CalcCount1 = 0
                    StopStep = 0
                    LaserBefore = 0
                    LaserNow = 0
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 56
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 56 Then
                ' LH Return 모터 시작 대기
                If ValueAmp1 > 1 Then
                    testSw.Restart()
                    nStep = 57
                End If
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 10 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] LH Return 타임아웃")
                    nStep = 59
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 57 Then
                ' LH BWD 데이터 수집
                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                stats.Push(TotalTime1, ValueAmp1, ValueNoise)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphSlideAmp, 1, TotalTime1, ValueAmp1)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphSlideNoise, 1, TotalTime1, ValueNoise)
                FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdTicTime.Text = TotalTime1.ToString("0.0#")

                If TotalTime1 > 2 Then
                    If StopStep = 0 Then
                        LaserBefore = CDbl(srcLaser2.Text)
                        StopStep = 1
                    ElseIf StopStep = 1 Then
                        LaserNow = CDbl(srcLaser2.Text)
                        StopStep = 0
                    End If
                    If ValueAmp1 < 0.32 Then
                        CalcCount1 += 1
                    Else
                        CalcCount1 = 0
                    End If
                    If CalcCount1 >= 3 Then
                        nStep = 58
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 58 Then
                ' LH BWD 판정
                stats.GetMaxInRange(1.0, TotalTime1 - 1.0, TmpAmpMAx1, TmpNoiseMax1)

                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphSlideAmp,
                      yLines:=New Double() {},
                      xLines:=New Double() {1, TotalTime1 - 2},
                      yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                      lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)
                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphSlideNoise,
                      yLines:=New Double() {},
                      xLines:=New Double() {1, TotalTime1 - 2},
                      yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                      lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)

                Dim lhBwdStart As Double = CDbl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdStartPos.Text)
                Dim lhBwdEnd As Double = CDbl(srcLaser2.Text)
                Dim lhBwdLen As Double = Math.Abs(lhBwdEnd - lhBwdStart) + LhBwdLenTol
                Dim lhBwdTime As Double = CDbl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdTicTime.Text)
                Dim lhBwdSpeed As Double = lhBwdLen / Math.Max(0.001, lhBwdTime)

                FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdEndPos.Text = lhBwdEnd.ToString("#0.0#")

                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdLength,
                              FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideBwdLength,
                              BasicSlideBwdMovingLengthMin, BasicSlideBwdMovingLengthMax,
                              lhBwdLen, "#0.0#")
                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdAmp,
                              FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideBwdAmp,
                              BasicSlideBwdAmpMin, BasicSlideBwdAmpMax,
                              TmpAmpMAx1, "0.0")
                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdNoise,
                              FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideBwdNoise,
                              BasicSlideBwdNoiseMin, BasicSlideBwdNoiseMax,
                              TmpNoiseMax1, "0.0")
                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdSpeed,
                              FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideBwdSpeed,
                              BasicSlideBwdSpeedMin, BasicSlideBwdSpeedMax,
                              lhBwdSpeed, "0.0")

                AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] LH Return 완료 (Len={lhBwdLen:F1} Amp={TmpAmpMAx1:F2} Noise={TmpNoiseMax1:F1} Spd={lhBwdSpeed:F2})")
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 59

                ' ── RH Relax (FWD) ──
            ElseIf nStep = 59 Then
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 1 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] RH Relax (FWD) 시작")
                    srclbValSlideFwdStartPos.Text = srcLaser1.Text
                    _can.AddJobOnce("RH_RELAX_1", &H2A5, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    _can.AddJobOnce("RH_RELAX_2", &H2A5, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    ErrCount1 = 0
                    TmpAmpMAx1 = 0
                    TmpNoiseMax1 = 0
                    stats.Reset()
                    CalcCount1 = 0
                    StopStep = 0
                    LaserBefore = 0
                    LaserNow = 0
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 60
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 60 Then
                ' RH Relax 모터 시작 대기
                If ValueAmp1 > 1 Then
                    testSw.Restart()
                    nStep = 61
                End If
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 10 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] RH Relax 타임아웃")
                    nStep = 63
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 61 Then
                ' RH FWD 데이터 수집
                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                stats.Push(TotalTime1, ValueAmp1, ValueNoise)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(srcGraphSlideAmp, 0, TotalTime1, ValueAmp1)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(srcGraphSlideNoise, 0, TotalTime1, ValueNoise)
                srclbValSlideFwdTicTime.Text = TotalTime1.ToString("0.0#")

                If TotalTime1 > 2 Then
                    If StopStep = 0 Then
                        LaserBefore = CDbl(srcLaser1.Text)
                        StopStep = 1
                    ElseIf StopStep = 1 Then
                        LaserNow = CDbl(srcLaser1.Text)
                        StopStep = 0
                    End If
                    If ValueAmp1 < 0.32 Then
                        CalcCount1 += 1
                    Else
                        CalcCount1 = 0
                    End If
                    If CalcCount1 >= 3 Then
                        nStep = 62
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 62 Then
                ' RH FWD 판정
                stats.GetMaxInRange(1.0, TotalTime1 - 1.0, TmpAmpMAx1, TmpNoiseMax1)

                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(srcGraphSlideAmp,
                      yLines:=New Double() {},
                      xLines:=New Double() {1, TotalTime1 - 2},
                      yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                      lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)
                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(srcGraphSlideNoise,
                      yLines:=New Double() {},
                      xLines:=New Double() {1, TotalTime1 - 2},
                      yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                      lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)

                Dim rhFwdStart As Double = CDbl(srclbValSlideFwdStartPos.Text)
                Dim rhFwdEnd As Double = CDbl(srcLaser1.Text)
                Dim rhFwdLen As Double = rhFwdEnd - rhFwdStart + RhFwdLenTol
                Dim rhFwdTime As Double = CDbl(srclbValSlideFwdTicTime.Text)
                Dim rhFwdSpeed As Double = rhFwdLen / Math.Max(0.001, rhFwdTime)

                srclbValSlideFwdEndPos.Text = rhFwdEnd.ToString("#0.0#")

                DecideControl(srclbValSlideFwdLength,
                              srclbDecSlideFwdLength,
                              BasicSlideFwdMovingLengthMin, BasicSlideFwdMovingLengthMax,
                              rhFwdLen, "#0.0#")
                DecideControl(srclbValSlideFwdAmp,
                              srclbDecSlideFwdAmp,
                              BasicSlideFwdAmpMin, BasicSlideFwdAmpMax,
                              TmpAmpMAx1, "0.0")
                DecideControl(srclbValSlideFwdNoise,
                              srclbDecSlideFwdNoise,
                              BasicSlideFwdNoiseMin, BasicSlideFwdNoiseMax,
                              TmpNoiseMax1, "0.0")
                DecideControl(srclbValSlideFwdSpeed,
                              srclbDecSlideFwdSpeed,
                              BasicSlideFwdSpeedMin, BasicSlideFwdSpeedMax,
                              rhFwdSpeed, "#0.0#")

                AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] RH Relax 완료 (Len={rhFwdLen:F1} Amp={TmpAmpMAx1:F2} Noise={TmpNoiseMax1:F1} Spd={rhFwdSpeed:F2})")
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 63

                ' ── RH Return (BWD) ──
            ElseIf nStep = 63 Then
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 1 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] RH Return (BWD) 시작")
                    srclbValSlideBwdStartPos.Text = srcLaser1.Text
                    _can.AddJobOnce("RH_RETURN_1", &H2A5, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H2, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    _can.AddJobOnce("RH_RETURN_2", &H2A5, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H2, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    ErrCount1 = 0
                    TmpAmpMAx1 = 0
                    TmpNoiseMax1 = 0
                    stats.Reset()
                    CalcCount1 = 0
                    StopStep = 0
                    LaserBefore = 0
                    LaserNow = 0
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 64
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 64 Then
                ' RH Return 모터 시작 대기
                If ValueAmp1 > 1 Then
                    testSw.Restart()
                    nStep = 65
                End If
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 10 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] RH Return 타임아웃")
                    nStep = 70
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 65 Then
                ' RH BWD 데이터 수집
                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                stats.Push(TotalTime1, ValueAmp1, ValueNoise)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(srcGraphSlideAmp, 1, TotalTime1, ValueAmp1)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(srcGraphSlideNoise, 1, TotalTime1, ValueNoise)
                srclbValSlideBwdTicTime.Text = TotalTime1.ToString("0.0#")

                If TotalTime1 > 2 Then
                    If StopStep = 0 Then
                        LaserBefore = CDbl(srcLaser1.Text)
                        StopStep = 1
                    ElseIf StopStep = 1 Then
                        LaserNow = CDbl(srcLaser1.Text)
                        StopStep = 0
                    End If
                    If ValueAmp1 < 0.32 Then
                        CalcCount1 += 1
                    Else
                        CalcCount1 = 0
                    End If
                    If CalcCount1 >= 3 Then
                        nStep = 66
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 66 Then
                ' RH BWD 판정
                stats.GetMaxInRange(1.0, TotalTime1 - 1.0, TmpAmpMAx1, TmpNoiseMax1)

                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(srcGraphSlideAmp,
                      yLines:=New Double() {},
                      xLines:=New Double() {1, TotalTime1 - 2},
                      yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                      lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)
                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(srcGraphSlideNoise,
                      yLines:=New Double() {},
                      xLines:=New Double() {1, TotalTime1 - 2},
                      yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                      lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)

                Dim rhBwdStart As Double = CDbl(srclbValSlideBwdStartPos.Text)
                Dim rhBwdEnd As Double = CDbl(srcLaser1.Text)
                Dim rhBwdLen As Double = Math.Abs(rhBwdEnd - rhBwdStart) + RhBwdLenTol
                Dim rhBwdTime As Double = CDbl(srclbValSlideBwdTicTime.Text)
                Dim rhBwdSpeed As Double = rhBwdLen / Math.Max(0.001, rhBwdTime)

                srclbValSlideBwdEndPos.Text = rhBwdEnd.ToString("#0.0#")

                DecideControl(srclbValSlideBwdLength,
                              srclbDecSlideBwdLength,
                              BasicSlideBwdMovingLengthMin, BasicSlideBwdMovingLengthMax,
                              rhBwdLen, "#0.0#")
                DecideControl(srclbValSlideBwdAmp,
                              srclbDecSlideBwdAmp,
                              BasicSlideBwdAmpMin, BasicSlideBwdAmpMax,
                              TmpAmpMAx1, "0.0")
                DecideControl(srclbValSlideBwdNoise,
                              srclbDecSlideBwdNoise,
                              BasicSlideBwdNoiseMin, BasicSlideBwdNoiseMax,
                              TmpNoiseMax1, "0.0")
                DecideControl(srclbValSlideBwdSpeed,
                              srclbDecSlideBwdSpeed,
                              BasicSlideBwdSpeedMin, BasicSlideBwdSpeedMax,
                              rhBwdSpeed, "0.0")

                AppendWorkLog($"[NORMAL] RH Return 완료 (Len={rhBwdLen:F1} Amp={TmpAmpMAx1:F2} Noise={TmpNoiseMax1:F1} Spd={rhBwdSpeed:F2})")
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 70

                ' ─── nStep 70-77: 2차 학습체크 (리미트 세팅 없이 체크만) ───
            ElseIf nStep = 70 Then
                ' 1초 대기 후 LH 학습체크 시작
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 1 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] 2차 LH 학습체크 시작")
                    _nmlEduCheckResult = ""
                    _nmlEduCheckCount = 0
                    _can.AddJobOnce("EDU2_CHK_LH_A", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA6, &HF0, &H0, &H0)
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 71
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 71 Then
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 0.5 Then
                    _nmlEduCheckResult = ""
                    _can.AddJobOnce("EDU2_CHK_LH_B", &H731, &H4, &H31, &H3, &H12, &HA6, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 72
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 72 Then
                If _nmlEduCheckResult = "OK" Then
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULHFINAL.Text = "OK"
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULHFINAL.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] 2차 LH 학습체크 OK")
                    nStep = 74
                ElseIf _nmlEduCheckResult = "NG" Then
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULHFINAL.Text = "NG"
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULHFINAL.BackColor = Color.Red
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] 2차 LH 학습체크 NG")
                    nStep = 74
                ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 2 Then
                    _nmlEduCheckCount += 1
                    If _nmlEduCheckCount > 5 Then
                        FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULHFINAL.Text = "NG"
                        FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULHFINAL.BackColor = Color.Red
                        nStep = 74
                    Else
                        nStep = 70
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 74 Then
                ' RH 학습체크 시작
                _nmlEduCheckResult = ""
                _nmlEduCheckCount = 0
                _can.AddJobOnce("EDU2_CHK_RH_A", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA7, &HF0, &H0, &H0)
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 75

            ElseIf nStep = 75 Then
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 0.5 Then
                    _nmlEduCheckResult = ""
                    _can.AddJobOnce("EDU2_CHK_RH_B", &H731, &H4, &H31, &H3, &H12, &HA7, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 76
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 76 Then
                If _nmlEduCheckResult = "OK" Then
                    srclbDecEcuEDURHFINAL.Text = "OK"
                    srclbDecEcuEDURHFINAL.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] 2차 RH 학습체크 OK")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 90
                ElseIf _nmlEduCheckResult = "NG" Then
                    srclbDecEcuEDURHFINAL.Text = "NG"
                    srclbDecEcuEDURHFINAL.BackColor = Color.Red
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] 2차 RH 학습체크 NG")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 90
                ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 2 Then
                    _nmlEduCheckCount += 1
                    If _nmlEduCheckCount > 5 Then
                        srclbDecEcuEDURHFINAL.Text = "NG"
                        srclbDecEcuEDURHFINAL.BackColor = Color.Red
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 90
                    Else
                        nStep = 74
                    End If
                End If

                ' ─── nStep 90-91: RPSU DTC 클리어 (0x731) ───
            ElseIf nStep = 90 Then
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 0.5 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] RPSU DTC Clear (0x731)")
                    _nmlDtcClearResult = ""
                    _can.AddJobOnce("RPSU_CLR", &H731, &H4, &H14, &HFF, &HFF, &HFF, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 91
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 91 Then
                If _nmlDtcClearResult = "OK" Then
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbrpsudtcclear.Text = "OK"
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbrpsudtcclear.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] RPSU DTC Clear OK")
                    nStep = 99
                ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 3 Then
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbrpsudtcclear.Text = "NG"
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbrpsudtcclear.BackColor = Color.Red
                    AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] RPSU DTC Clear NG (타임아웃)")
                    nStep = 99
                End If

                ' ─── nStep 99: 완료 ───
            ElseIf nStep = 99 Then
                AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL] 전체 시퀀스 완료")
                FlagNmlDone = True
                nStep = 0
                tmrNormalTest.Stop()

            End If

        Catch ex As Exception
            AppendWorkLog("[NORMAL 예외] " & ex.Message)
        End Try

    End Sub

    ' NORMAL SW 버전 응답용 변수
    Private _nmlSwVersion As String = ""
    Private _nmlSwRespId As UInteger = 0
    Private _nmlHwVersion As String = ""
    Private _nmlHwRespId As UInteger = 0
    Private strHwVersion As String = ""
    Private _versionPhase As String = "SW"  ' "SW" → "HW" 2패스

    ' NORMAL DTC 클리어 응답용 변수
    Private _nmlDtcClearResult As String = ""

End Class

Imports System.Linq
Imports Peak.Can.Basic

''' <summary>
''' CAN FD (PE/ICE) 전용 테스트 폼
''' - 모터/벤트: UDS IOControl + 0x49B FD 32byte
''' - UDS 진단: Session, TP, SW/HW Ver, IGN ON, Limit Set/Check/Clear
''' - 레스트 모드: 0x3DB FD 32byte (PSeat AutoPlayCmd)
''' - DTC 클리어: ECU별 개별 + Functional(ALL)
''' </summary>
Public Class FrmCanIce

    Private _can As CanBusService
    Private _isConnected As Boolean

    ' ===== 폼 이벤트 =====

    Private Sub FrmCanIce_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load
        Me.Text = "CAN 테스트 - [PE]"
        _savedVolt = Module1.TargetVolt
        UpdateVoltToggleButton()
        tmrSupply.Start()
        SetButtonsEnabled(False)
    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmCanIce_FormClosing(sender As Object, e As Windows.Forms.FormClosingEventArgs) Handles MyBase.FormClosing
        tmrSupply.Stop()
        DoCanClose()
    End Sub

    ' ===== 버튼 활성화 =====

    Private Sub SetButtonsEnabled(ByVal enabled As Boolean)
        grpMotor.Enabled = enabled
        grpVent.Enabled = enabled
        grpUds.Enabled = enabled
        grpRest.Enabled = enabled
        grpDtc.Enabled = enabled
        btnCanOpen.Enabled = Not enabled
        btnCanClose.Enabled = enabled
    End Sub

    ' ===== 로그 =====

    Private Sub AppendLog(ByVal msg As String)
        If txtLog.InvokeRequired Then
            txtLog.BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() AppendLog(msg)))
            Return
        End If
        If txtLog.TextLength > 50000 Then
            txtLog.Text = txtLog.Text.Substring(txtLog.TextLength - 30000)
        End If
        txtLog.AppendText(msg & vbCrLf)
    End Sub

    Private Sub AppendResult(ByVal msg As String)
        If txtResult.InvokeRequired Then
            txtResult.BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() AppendResult(msg)))
            Return
        End If
        If txtResult.TextLength > 10000 Then
            txtResult.Text = txtResult.Text.Substring(txtResult.TextLength - 5000)
        End If
        txtResult.AppendText(msg & vbCrLf)
    End Sub

    Private Sub UpdateStatus(ByVal msg As String)
        If StatusStrip1.InvokeRequired Then
            StatusStrip1.BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() UpdateStatus(msg)))
            Return
        End If
        lblStatus.Text = msg
    End Sub

    ' ===== CAN Open / Close =====

    Private Sub btnCanOpen_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnCanOpen.Click
        Try
            _can = New CanBusService(PCANBasic.PCAN_USBBUS1, True) ' 항상 CAN FD

            AddHandler _can.Log, Sub(s) AppendLog(s)
            AddHandler _can.Error, Sub(errSt) AppendLog("[오류] " & errSt.ToString())
            AddHandler _can.UdsCompleted, AddressOf OnUdsCompleted
            AddHandler _can.FrameDecoded, AddressOf OnFrameDecoded

            _can.LogAllRawTxFrames = True
            _can.LogAllRawRxFrames = True

            Dim st As TPCANStatus = _can.Init() ' CAN FD 기본 bitrate

            If st <> TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_OK Then
                AppendLog("CAN 초기화 실패: " & st.ToString())
                _can.Dispose()
                _can = Nothing
                Return
            End If

            _can.StartPolling()
            _isConnected = True
            SetButtonsEnabled(True)
            UpdateStatus("연결됨 [PE - CAN FD]")
            AppendLog("=== CAN PE 연결 완료 ===")

        Catch ex As Exception
            AppendLog("[예외] " & ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnCanClose_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnCanClose.Click
        DoCanClose()
    End Sub

    Private Sub DoCanClose()
        If _can IsNot Nothing Then
            Try
                _can.Dispose()
            Catch
            End Try
            _can = Nothing
        End If
        _isConnected = False
        SetButtonsEnabled(False)
        UpdateStatus("연결 해제")
        AppendLog("=== CAN 연결 해제 ===")
    End Sub

    ' ===== UDS 응답 처리 =====

    Private Sub OnUdsCompleted(ByVal respId As UInteger, ByVal data As Byte())
        If data Is Nothing OrElse data.Length = 0 Then Return

        Dim hex As String = String.Join(" ", data.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2")))
        Dim ecuName As String = GetEcuName(respId)

        If data(0) = &H62 AndAlso data.Length >= 4 Then
            ' RDBI 긍정 응답
            Dim did As String = data(1).ToString("X2") & data(2).ToString("X2")
            Dim payload = data.Skip(3).ToArray()
            Dim ascii As Boolean = payload.All(Function(b) b >= &H20 AndAlso b <= &H7E)
            Dim val As String = If(ascii, System.Text.Encoding.ASCII.GetString(payload),
                                  String.Join(" ", payload.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2"))))
            AppendResult("[RDBI] " & ecuName & " DID=" & did & " → " & val)

        ElseIf data(0) = &H71 Then
            ' Routine Control 긍정 응답
            AppendResult("[Routine] " & ecuName & " → " & hex)

        ElseIf data(0) = &H7F AndAlso data.Length >= 3 Then
            ' NRC
            AppendResult("[NRC] " & ecuName & " SID=0x" & data(1).ToString("X2") & " NRC=0x" & data(2).ToString("X2"))

        ElseIf data(0) = &H54 Then
            ' ClearDTC 긍정 응답
            AppendResult("[ClearDTC] " & ecuName & " OK")

        ElseIf data(0) = &H50 Then
            ' Session 긍정 응답
            AppendResult("[Session] " & ecuName & " OK")

        Else
            AppendResult("[UDS] " & ecuName & " → " & hex)
        End If
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>응답 ID → ECU 이름 매핑</summary>
    Private Shared Function GetEcuName(ByVal respId As UInteger) As String
        Select Case respId
            Case &H739 : Return "PSU_RR(0x739)"
            Case &H7AB : Return "PSU_Drv(0x7AB)"
            Case &H79F : Return "PSU_Ast(0x79F)"
            Case &H759 : Return "DPSS(0x759)"
            Case &H5EE : Return "APSS(0x5EE)"
            Case &H5CE : Return "RLPSS(0x5CE)"
            Case &H5CF : Return "RRPSS(0x5CF)"
            Case &H77B : Return "RARS(0x77B)"
            Case Else : Return "0x" & respId.ToString("X3")
        End Select
    End Function

    Private Sub OnFrameDecoded(ByVal canId As UInteger, ByVal data As Byte())
        ' 필요 시 특정 ID 프레임 파싱 추가
    End Sub

    ' =========================================================
    '  모터 제어 (UDS IOControl)
    ' =========================================================

    Private Sub btnRlFwd_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRlFwd.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RL FWD")
        _can.AddJobOnce("RL FWD", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H63, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnRlBwd_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRlBwd.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RL BWD")
        _can.AddJobOnce("RL BWD", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H64, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnRrFwd_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRrFwd.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RR FWD")
        _can.AddJobOnce("RR FWD", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H43, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnRrBwd_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRrBwd.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RR BWD")
        _can.AddJobOnce("RR BWD", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H44, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnStop_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnStop.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("전체 STOP")
        ' RL STOP
        _can.AddJobOnce("RL STOP1", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H63, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        _can.AddJobOnce("RL STOP2", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H64, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        ' RR STOP
        _can.AddJobOnce("RR STOP1", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H43, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        _can.AddJobOnce("RR STOP2", &H731, &H4, &H2F, &HF0, &H44, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        ' 레스트 모드도 중지
        _can.RemoveJob("REST_MODE")
    End Sub

    ' =========================================================
    '  벤트 (CAN FD 0x49B 32byte)
    ' =========================================================

    Private Sub btnRlVent_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRlVent.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RL VENT ON (0x49B)")
        _can.AddJob32("RL_VENT_ON", &H49B, 500,
                      &HFF, &HFF, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H5,
                      &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H10,
                      &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                      &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnRrVent_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRrVent.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("RR VENT ON (0x49B)")
        _can.AddJob32("RR_VENT_ON", &H49B, 500,
                      &HFF, &HFF, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                      &H0, &H5, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H10,
                      &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                      &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnVentOff_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnVentOff.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("VENT OFF (0x49B)")
        _can.AddJobOnce32("VENT_OFF", &H49B,
                          &HFF, &HFF, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                          &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                          &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                          &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    ' =========================================================
    '  UDS / 진단
    ' =========================================================

    Private Sub btnSession_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnSession.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("Session Start (Extended)")
        _can.AddJobOnce("Session", &H731, &H2, &H10, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnTp_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnTp.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("Tester Present 시작 (2초 주기)")
        _can.AddJob("TP", &H731, 2000, &H2, &H3E, &H80, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnSwVer_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnSwVer.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("Request SW Version (DID F1B1)")
        _can.AddJobOnce("SW_VER", &H731, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &HB1, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnHwVer_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnHwVer.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("Request HW Version (DID F193)")
        _can.AddJobOnce("HW_VER", &H731, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &H93, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnIgnOn_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnIgnOn.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("IGN ON (0x3D1, 200ms 주기)")
        _can.AddJob32("IGN", &H3D1, 200,
                      &HFF, &HFF, &H0, &H55, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                      &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                      &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                      &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnLimitSet_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnLimitSet.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("Slide Limit Set (DID 12A7, Param 0x40)")
        _can.AddJobOnce("LimitSet", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA7, &H40, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnLimitCheck_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnLimitCheck.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("Slide Limit Check (DID 12A7, Param 0xF0)")
        _can.AddJobOnce("LimitCheck", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA7, &HF0, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnLimitClear_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnLimitClear.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("Slide Limit Clear (RoutineID FF00)")
        _can.AddJobOnce("LimitClear", &H731, &H4, &H31, &H1, &HFF, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    ' =========================================================
    '  레스트 모드 (CAN FD 0x3DB, 32byte, 200ms 주기)
    '  PSeat_RLAutoPlayCmd_New: bit 144 (byte[18] bit 0-5)
    '  PSeat_RRAutoPlayCmd_New: bit 150 (byte[18] bit 6 ~ byte[19] bit 3)
    '  Value: 0x00=Off, 0x01=Relax, 0x02=Return
    ' =========================================================

    ''' <summary>0x3DB 레스트 모드 32byte 데이터 생성</summary>
    Private Function BuildRestData(ByVal rlValue As Byte, ByVal rrValue As Byte) As Byte()
        Dim data(31) As Byte
        ' RL (bit 144-149): byte[18] bits 0-5
        ' RR (bit 150-155): byte[18] bits 6-7 + byte[19] bits 0-3
        data(18) = CByte((rlValue And &H3F) Or ((rrValue And &H3) << 6))
        data(19) = CByte((rrValue >> 2) And &HF)
        Return data
    End Function

    Private Sub SendRestMode(ByVal jobName As String, ByVal rlVal As Byte, ByVal rrVal As Byte, ByVal logMsg As String)
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog(logMsg)
        ' 기존 레스트 Job 제거 후 새로 등록
        _can.RemoveJob("REST_MODE")
        Dim d = BuildRestData(rlVal, rrVal)
        _can.AddJob32("REST_MODE", &H3DB, 200,
                      d(0), d(1), d(2), d(3), d(4), d(5), d(6), d(7),
                      d(8), d(9), d(10), d(11), d(12), d(13), d(14), d(15),
                      d(16), d(17), d(18), d(19), d(20), d(21), d(22), d(23),
                      d(24), d(25), d(26), d(27), d(28), d(29), d(30), d(31))
        AppendResult("[REST] " & logMsg & " → byte[18]=0x" & d(18).ToString("X2") & " byte[19]=0x" & d(19).ToString("X2"))
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnLhRelax_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnLhRelax.Click
        ' LH(RL) Relax: RL=0x01, RR=0x00
        SendRestMode("LH_RELAX", &H1, &H0, "LH Relax (0x3DB, RL=0x01)")
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnLhReturn_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnLhReturn.Click
        ' LH(RL) Return: RL=0x02, RR=0x00
        SendRestMode("LH_RETURN", &H2, &H0, "LH Return (0x3DB, RL=0x02)")
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnRhRelax_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRhRelax.Click
        ' RH(RR) Relax: RL=0x00, RR=0x01
        SendRestMode("RH_RELAX", &H0, &H1, "RH Relax (0x3DB, RR=0x01)")
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnRhReturn_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRhReturn.Click
        ' RH(RR) Return: RL=0x00, RR=0x02
        SendRestMode("RH_RETURN", &H0, &H2, "RH Return (0x3DB, RR=0x02)")
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnRestOff_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnRestOff.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("REST OFF (0x3DB)")
        _can.RemoveJob("REST_MODE")
        ' Off 메시지 1회 전송
        _can.AddJobOnce32("REST_OFF", &H3DB,
                          &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                          &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                          &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                          &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        AppendResult("[REST] OFF")
    End Sub

    ' =========================================================
    '  DTC 클리어 (UDS 0x14 FF FF FF → 각 ECU)
    ' =========================================================

    Private Sub SendDtcClear(ByVal ecuName As String, ByVal reqId As UInteger)
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        Dim idHex As String = "0x" & reqId.ToString("X3")
        AppendLog("DTC Clear " & ecuName & " (" & idHex & ")")
        _can.AddJobOnce("DTC_" & ecuName, reqId, &H4, &H14, &HFF, &HFF, &HFF, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        AppendResult("[DTC] " & ecuName & " (" & idHex & ") 요청 전송")
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnDtcDrv_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnDtcDrv.Click
        SendDtcClear("PSU_Drv", &H7A3)
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnDtcAst_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnDtcAst.Click
        SendDtcClear("PSU_Ast", &H797)
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnDtcRr_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnDtcRr.Click
        SendDtcClear("PSU_RR", &H731)
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnDtcDpss_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnDtcDpss.Click
        SendDtcClear("DPSS", &H751)
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnDtcApss_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnDtcApss.Click
        SendDtcClear("APSS", &H5E6)
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnDtcRlpss_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnDtcRlpss.Click
        SendDtcClear("RLPSS", &H5C6)
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnDtcRrpss_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnDtcRrpss.Click
        SendDtcClear("RRPSS", &H5C7)
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnDtcAll_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnDtcAll.Click
        If _can Is Nothing Then Return
        AppendLog("DTC Clear ALL (Functional 0x7DF)")
        _can.AddJobOnce("DTC_ALL", &H7DF, &H4, &H14, &HFF, &HFF, &HFF, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        AppendResult("[DTC] ALL (0x7DF) 요청 전송")
    End Sub

    ' =========================================================
    '  파워서플라이 제어
    ' =========================================================

    Private _savedVolt As Double = 0

    Private Sub tmrSupply_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmrSupply.Tick
        lblSupplyVolt.Text = "V: " & Module1.ValueVolt1.ToString("F2")
        lblSupplyAmp.Text = "A: " & Module1.ValueAmp1.ToString("F3")
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnVoltToggle_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnVoltToggle.Click
        If Module1.TargetVolt > 0 Then
            Module1.TargetVolt = 0
        Else
            Module1.TargetVolt = _savedVolt
        End If
        UpdateVoltToggleButton()
    End Sub

    Private Sub UpdateVoltToggleButton()
        If Module1.TargetVolt > 0 Then
            btnVoltToggle.Text = "ON " & Module1.TargetVolt.ToString("F1") & "V"
            btnVoltToggle.BackColor = System.Drawing.Color.LightGreen
        Else
            btnVoltToggle.Text = "OFF 0V"
            btnVoltToggle.BackColor = System.Drawing.Color.LightCoral
        End If
    End Sub

    ' ===== 로그 지우기 =====

    Private Sub btnLogClear_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnLogClear.Click
        txtLog.Clear()
    End Sub

End Class

IGN ON의 0x3D1 TX가 200ms마다 로그를 도배하고 있네요. TX 로그도 끕니다. 동작 로그("IGN ON", "Request SW Version" 등)는 AppendLog로 별도 남으니까요.
